commands.cmdDescription: Carrega chaves de host conhecidas do sistema
commands.cmdCode:
import paramiko
import os

client = paramiko.SSHClient()

# Exemplo 1: Carregar chaves do sistema
client.load_system_host_keys()
print('Chaves do sistema carregadas')

# Exemplo 2: Verificar arquivos carregados
print('\nArquivos de known_hosts carregados:')
# Paramiko carrega de vГЎrios locais padrГЈo
known_hosts_locations = [
    '/etc/ssh/ssh_known_hosts',
    '/etc/ssh/ssh_known_hosts2',
    os.path.expanduser('~/.ssh/known_hosts'),
    os.path.expanduser('~/.ssh/known_hosts2')
]

for location in known_hosts_locations:
    if os.path.exists(location):
        print(f'вң“ {location}')
    else:
        print(f'вң— {location} (nГЈo existe)')

# Exemplo 3: Carregar arquivo especГӯfico
try:
    client.load_host_keys(os.path.expanduser('~/.ssh/known_hosts'))
    print('\nArquivo especГӯfico carregado')
except FileNotFoundError:
    print('\nArquivo known_hosts nГЈo encontrado')

# Exemplo 4: Verificar se host estГЎ nas chaves conhecidas
def check_known_host(hostname, port=22):
    key = client.get_host_keys().get(hostname, port)
    if key:
        print(f'\nHost {hostname}:{port} conhecido')
        print(f'Tipo: {key.get_name()}')
        print(f'Fingerprint: {key.get_fingerprint().hex()}')
        return True
    else:
        print(f'\nHost {hostname}:{port} nГЈo conhecido')
        return False

# Exemplo 5: Adicionar host manualmente
from paramiko import RSAKey
import base64

# Gerar chave de exemplo (nГЈo usar em produГ§ГЈo)
key_data = 'AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQABAAABAQC8...'
key = RSAKey(data=base64.b64decode(key_data))

client.get_host_keys().add('exemplo.com', 'ssh-rsa', key)
print('\nHost exemplo.com adicionado manualmente')

# Exemplo 6: Salvar chaves em arquivo
def save_host_keys(client, filename):
    with open(filename, 'w') as f:
        for hostname, keydict in client.get_host_keys().items():
            for keytype, key in keydict.items():
                line = f'{hostname[0]} {hostname[1]} {keytype} {key.get_base64()}\n'
                f.write(line)
    print(f'Chaves salvas em {filename}')

# Exemplo 7: PolГӯtica com chaves do sistema
client.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.RejectPolicy())
print('\nPolГӯtica RejectPolicy com chaves do sistema carregadas')

# Exemplo 8: Limpar chaves carregadas
client.get_host_keys().clear()
print('Chaves limpas')

# Exemplo 9: Carregar com fallback
if not client.get_host_keys():
    print('Nenhuma chave carregada, usando AutoAddPolicy')
    client.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

commands.cmdDescription: Canal de comunicaГ§ГЈo SSH para operaГ§Гөes de baixo nГӯvel
commands.cmdCode:
import paramiko
import time

# Simular conexГЈo
client = paramiko.SSHClient()
client.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

# Exemplo 1: Criar canal a partir de transporte
transport = client.get_transport()
if transport:
    channel = transport.open_session()
    print(f'Canal criado: {channel}')
    
    # Exemplo 2: Executar comando no canal
    channel.exec_command('ls -la')
    
    # Exemplo 3: Ler saГӯda
    while not channel.closed:
        if channel.recv_ready():
            output = channel.recv(1024).decode()
            print(f'SaГӯda: {output}')
        if channel.recv_stderr_ready():
            error = channel.recv_stderr(1024).decode()
            print(f'Erro: {error}')
        
        # Verificar se canal fechou
        if channel.exit_status_ready():
            exit_status = channel.recv_exit_status()
            print(f'CГіdigo de saГӯda: {exit_status}')
            break
        
        time.sleep(0.1)
    
    # Exemplo 4: Fechar canal
    channel.close()
    print(f'Canal fechado: {channel.closed}')

# Exemplo 5: Canal com PTY
channel = transport.open_session()
channel.get_pty(term='xterm', width=80, height=24)
channel.exec_command('top -n 1')

if channel.recv_ready():
    output = channel.recv(4096).decode()
    print(f'\nSaГӯda com PTY (primeiras 100 chars): {output[:100]}...')

# Exemplo 6: Canal para shell interativo
channel = transport.open_session()
channel.invoke_shell()

channel.send('echo "OlГЎ do canal"\n')
time.sleep(0.5)

if channel.recv_ready():
    response = channel.recv(1024).decode()
    print(f'\nResposta do shell: {response}')

# Exemplo 7: Configurar canal
channel.set_combine_stderr(True)  # Combinar stdout e stderr
channel.settimeout(10)  # Timeout de 10 segundos

print(f'\nConfiguraГ§Гөes do canal:')
print(f'Timeout: {channel.gettimeout()}')
print(f'Combine stderr: {channel.combine_stderr}')

# Exemplo 8: Canal para forwarding
# channel.request_x11()  # Forwarding X11
# channel.request_forward_agent()  # Forwarding de agente

# Exemplo 9: EstatГӯsticas do canal
print(f'\nEstatГӯsticas:')
print(f'Bytes enviados: {channel.send_bytes}')
print(f'Bytes recebidos: {channel.recv_bytes}')

# Exemplo 10: Verificar estado
print(f'\nEstado do canal:')
print(f'Fechado: {channel.closed}')
print(f'Ativo: {channel.active}')
print(f'Exit status ready: {channel.exit_status_ready()}')

name: Faker
description: Faker Г© uma biblioteca Python para geraГ§ГЈo de dados falsos realistas em mГәltiplos idiomas. Ela permite criar nomes, endereГ§os, textos, nГәmeros, datas, perfis completos e muito mais, sendo essencial para testes, desenvolvimento, populating de bancos de dados e prototipagem.

commands.cmdDescription: Inicializa o gerador de dados falsos com locale e seed opcionais
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

# Exemplo 1: InstГўncia padrГЈo (en_US)

print(f'Nome: {fake.name()}')

# Exemplo 2: Locale brasileiro

print(f'Nome BR: {fake_br.name()}')

for _ in range(3):
    print(f'Multi: {fake_multi.name()}')

# Exemplo 4: Com seed para resultados reproduzГӯveis
Faker.seed(42)
fake = Faker()
print(f'\nCom seed 42: {fake.name()}')

Faker.seed(42)
fake = Faker()
print(f'Mesma seed 42: {fake.name()}')

# Exemplo 5: Seed por instГўncia
fake1 = Faker()
fake1.seed_instance(100)
print(f'\nInstГўncia 1: {fake1.name()}')

fake2 = Faker()
fake2.seed_instance(100)
print(f'InstГўncia 2: {fake2.name()}')

# Exemplo 6: Locales disponГӯveis comuns
locales_comuns = ['pt_BR', 'en_US', 'en_GB', 'es_ES', 'fr_FR', 'de_DE', 'it_IT', 'ja_JP', 'zh_CN', 'ru_RU']
for loc in locales_comuns:
    f = Faker(loc)

commands.cmdDescription: Gera perfil completo de pessoa com mГәltiplos campos de uma vez
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

fake = Faker('pt_BR')

# Exemplo 1: Perfil completo
profile = fake.profile()
print('Perfil completo:')
for key, value in profile.items():
    print(f'  {key}: {value}')

# Exemplo 2: Perfil com campos especГӯficos
profile = fake.profile(fields=['name', 'mail', 'job', 'company'])
print('\nPerfil parcial:')
for key, value in profile.items():
    print(f'  {key}: {value}')

# Exemplo 3: Perfil simples
profile = fake.simple_profile()
print('\nPerfil simples:')
for key, value in profile.items():
    print(f'  {key}: {value}')

# Exemplo 4: MГәltiplos perfis
print('\n--- 3 perfis resumidos ---')
for i in range(3):
    p = fake.simple_profile()
    print(f'{i+1}. {p["name"]} | {p["mail"]} | {p["sex"]}')

# Exemplo 5: Perfil com gГӘnero
profile_m = fake.simple_profile(sex='M')
print(f'\nMasculino: {profile_m["name"]} ({profile_m["sex"]})')

profile_f = fake.simple_profile(sex='F')
print(f'Feminino: {profile_f["name"]} ({profile_f["sex"]})')

# Exemplo 6: Campos disponГӯveis no perfil completo
full = fake.profile()
print(f'\nCampos disponГӯveis: {list(full.keys())}')

from faker import Faker

fake = Faker()

# Exemplo 1: Inteiro padrГЈo (0-9999)
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'PadrГЈo: {fake.random_int()}')

# Exemplo 2: Inteiro com intervalo
print(f'\n1-100: {fake.random_int(min=1, max=100)}')
print(f'1000-9999: {fake.random_int(min=1000, max=9999)}')
print(f'-50 a 50: {fake.random_int(min=-50, max=50)}')

# Exemplo 3: Inteiro com step
print(f'\nStep 10 (0-100): {fake.random_int(min=0, max=100, step=10)}')
print(f'Step 5 (0-50): {fake.random_int(min=0, max=50, step=5)}')

# Exemplo 4: random_digit (0-9)
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'DГӯgito: {fake.random_digit()}')

# Exemplo 5: random_digit_not_null (1-9)
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'DГӯgito nГЈo-zero: {fake.random_digit_not_null()}')

# Exemplo 6: NГәmero de ponto flutuante
print(f'\nFloat: {fake.pyfloat()}')
print(f'Float positivo: {fake.pyfloat(positive=True)}')
print(f'Float 2 dГӯgitos: {fake.pyfloat(left_digits=2, right_digits=2, positive=True)}')
print(f'Float min/max: {fake.pyfloat(min_value=1.0, max_value=10.0)}')

# Exemplo 7: Decimal
from decimal import Decimal
print(f'\nDecimal: {fake.pydecimal()}')
print(f'Decimal positivo: {fake.pydecimal(positive=True, left_digits=3, right_digits=2)}')

# Exemplo 8: random_number
print(f'\nNГәmero aleatГіrio (5 dГӯgitos): {fake.random_number(digits=5)}')
print(f'NГәmero aleatГіrio (10 dГӯgitos): {fake.random_number(digits=10)}')
print(f'NГәmero aleatГіrio (fixo 5): {fake.random_number(digits=5, fix_len=True)}')

# Exemplo 9: random_element e random_elements
print(f'\nElemento aleatГіrio: {fake.random_element(elements=("A", "B", "C", "D"))}')
print(f'Elementos aleatГіrios: {fake.random_elements(elements=("X", "Y", "Z"), length=2)}')
print(f'Elementos Гәnicos: {fake.random_elements(elements=("X", "Y", "Z"), length=2, unique=True)}')

commands.cmdDescription: Garante que os valores gerados nГЈo se repitam dentro da mesma instГўncia
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

fake = Faker('pt_BR')

# Exemplo 1: Nomes Гәnicos
print('Nomes Гәnicos:')
nomes = set()
for _ in range(10):
    nome = fake.unique.first_name()
    nomes.add(nome)
    print(f'  {nome}')

print(f'Total Гәnicos: {len(nomes)}')

# Exemplo 2: Emails Гәnicos
print('\nEmails Гәnicos:')
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.email()}')

# Exemplo 3: Inteiros Гәnicos
print('\nInteiros Гәnicos (1-20):')
for _ in range(10):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.random_int(min=1, max=20)}')

# Exemplo 4: CPFs Гәnicos
print('\nCPFs Гәnicos:')
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.cpf()}')

# Exemplo 5: Limpar cache de Гәnicos
fake.unique.clear()
print('\nCache de Гәnicos limpo')

# Exemplo 6: Erro quando esgota possibilidades
fake2 = Faker()
try:
    for _ in range(20):
        fake2.unique.random_int(min=1, max=5)  # SГі 5 possibilidades
except Exception as e:
    print(f'\nErro (esgotou): {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

# Exemplo 7: Unique por provider
print('\nDatas Гәnicas:')
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.date_this_year()}')

# Exemplo 8: Uso em loop para banco de dados
fake.unique.clear()
print('\nRegistros para banco de dados:')
for i in range(5):
    registro = {
        'id': i + 1,
        'email': fake.unique.email(),
        'cpf': fake.unique.cpf(),
        'username': fake.unique.user_name()
    }
    print(f'  {registro}')

commands.cmdDescription: Define seed global ou por instГўncia para reprodutibilidade dos dados
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

# Exemplo 1: Seed global
Faker.seed(42)
fake1 = Faker()
print('Seed 42 - Rodada 1:')
print(f'  Nome: {fake1.name()}')
print(f'  Email: {fake1.email()}')
print(f'  EndereГ§o: {fake1.address()}')

Faker.seed(42)
fake2 = Faker()
print('\nSeed 42 - Rodada 2 (idГӘntica):')
print(f'  Nome: {fake2.name()}')
print(f'  Email: {fake2.email()}')
print(f'  EndereГ§o: {fake2.address()}')

# Exemplo 2: Seed por instГўncia
fake_a = Faker()
fake_a.seed_instance(100)
print('\nInstГўncia A (seed 100):')
for _ in range(3):
    print(f'  {fake_a.name()}')

fake_b = Faker()
fake_b.seed_instance(100)
print('\nInstГўncia B (seed 100 - idГӘntica):')
for _ in range(3):
    print(f'  {fake_b.name()}')

# Exemplo 3: Seeds diferentes = dados diferentes
fake_x = Faker()
fake_x.seed_instance(1)
print(f'\nSeed 1: {fake_x.name()}')

fake_y = Faker()
fake_y.seed_instance(2)
print(f'Seed 2: {fake_y.name()}')

# Exemplo 4: Sem seed = aleatГіrio
fake_rand = Faker()
print(f'\nSem seed: {fake_rand.name()}')
print(f'Sem seed: {fake_rand.name()}')

# Exemplo 5: Seed para testes
def test_user_generation():
    Faker.seed(12345)
    fake = Faker()
    user = {
        'name': fake.name(),
        'email': fake.email(),
        'age': fake.random_int(min=18, max=80)
    }
    return user

result1 = test_user_generation()
result2 = test_user_generation()
print(f'\nTeste reproduzГӯvel:')
print(f'  Rodada 1: {result1}')
print(f'  Rodada 2: {result2}')
print(f'  Iguais: {result1 == result2}')

commands.cmdDescription: Gera dados estruturados em formatos JSON, CSV e similares
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker
import json

fake = Faker('pt_BR')

# Exemplo 1: JSON bГЎsico
data = fake.json(data_columns=[
    ('Nome', 'name'),
    ('Email', 'email'),
    ('Telefone', 'phone_number')
], num_rows=3)
print('JSON bГЎsico:')
print(data)

# Exemplo 2: JSON com tipos variados
data = fake.json(data_columns=[
    ('id', 'random_int'),
    ('nome', 'name'),
    ('ativo', 'pybool'),
    ('salГЎrio', 'pyfloat:left_digits=4,right_digits=2,positive=True')
], num_rows=2)
print(f'\nJSON tipos variados:')
print(data)

# Exemplo 3: CSV
csv_data = fake.csv(header=('Nome', 'Email', 'Cidade'), 
                     data_columns=('{{name}}', '{{email}}', '{{city}}'),
                     num_rows=5)
print(f'\nCSV:')
print(csv_data)

# Exemplo 4: DSV (Delimiter Separated Values) com delimitador personalizado
dsv_data = fake.dsv(header=('Nome', 'Idade', 'Cidade'),
                     data_columns=('{{name}}', '{{random_int:min=18,max=80}}', '{{city}}'),
                     num_rows=3,
                     delimiter='|')
print(f'DSV (pipe):')
print(dsv_data)

# Exemplo 5: TSV (Tab Separated Values)
tsv_data = fake.tsv(header=('Nome', 'Email'),
                     data_columns=('{{name}}', '{{email}}'),
                     num_rows=3)
print(f'TSV:')
print(tsv_data)

# Exemplo 6: JSON manual com dicionГЎrio
def gerar_usuario():
    return {
        'id': fake.unique.random_int(min=1, max=10000),
        'nome': fake.name(),
        'email': fake.email(),
        'cpf': fake.cpf(),
        'nascimento': str(fake.date_of_birth(minimum_age=18, maximum_age=65)),
        'endereco': {
            'rua': fake.street_name(),
            'numero': fake.building_number(),
            'cidade': fake.city(),
            'estado': fake.state_abbr(),
            'cep': fake.postcode()
        },
        'ativo': fake.pybool()
    }

fake.unique.clear()
usuarios = [gerar_usuario() for _ in range(3)]
print('\nJSON manual:')
print(json.dumps(usuarios, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))

commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre quando .unique nГЈo consegue gerar mais valores Гәnicos
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker
from faker.exceptions import UniquenessException

fake = Faker()

# Exemplo 1: Esgotando possibilidades com random_int
try:
    for i in range(20):
        valor = fake.unique.random_int(min=1, max=5)
        print(f'  IteraГ§ГЈo {i+1}: {valor}')
except UniquenessException as e:
    print(f'Erro na iteraГ§ГЈo {i+1}: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: Esgotando com random_element
fake.unique.clear()
try:
    for i in range(10):
        val = fake.unique.random_element(elements=('A', 'B', 'C'))
        print(f'  IteraГ§ГЈo {i+1}: {val}')
except UniquenessException:
    print(f'Erro: Apenas 3 elementos possГӯveis, nГЈo pode gerar {i+1}')

# Exemplo 3: SoluГ§ГЈo - limpar cache
fake.unique.clear()
print('\nCache limpo, pode reusar valores:')
for _ in range(3):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.random_int(min=1, max=5)}')

# Exemplo 4: SoluГ§ГЈo - ampliar range
fake.unique.clear()
print('\nRange ampliado (1-1000):')
for _ in range(10):
    print(f'  {fake.unique.random_int(min=1, max=1000)}')

# Exemplo 5: Boa prГЎtica - verificar limites antes
def safe_unique_ints(fake, count, min_val, max_val):
    possible = max_val - min_val + 1
    if count > possible:
        raise ValueError(f'ImpossГӯvel gerar {count} Гәnicos no range {min_val}-{max_val} ({possible} possГӯveis)')
    
    fake.unique.clear()
    return [fake.unique.random_int(min=min_val, max=max_val) for _ in range(count)]

try:
    result = safe_unique_ints(fake, 3, 1, 10)
    print(f'\nSafe: {result}')
    
    result = safe_unique_ints(fake, 15, 1, 10)
except ValueError as e:
    print(f'Erro prevenido: {e}')

# Exemplo 6: Causas comuns
print('\nCausas comuns de UniquenessException:')
print('  1. Range muito pequeno para quantidade de valores')
print('  2. Poucas opГ§Гөes em random_element()')
print('  3. Esqueceu de limpar cache com .unique.clear()')
print('  4. Loop infinito tentando gerar valores Гәnicos')

  IteraГ§ГЈo 2: 1
  IteraГ§ГЈo 3: 5
  IteraГ§ГЈo 4: 2
  IteraГ§ГЈo 5: 4
Erro na iteraГ§ГЈo 6: Got duplicated values after 1000 iterations.

  IteraГ§ГЈo 1: B
  IteraГ§ГЈo 2: A

  2. Poucas opГ§Гөes em random_element()

commands.cmdName: Erro: AttributeError - Locale nГЈo possui provider
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao chamar mГ©todo nГЈo disponГӯvel para o locale configurado
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

# Exemplo 1: MГ©todo especГӯfico de locale
fake_us = Faker('en_US')
try:
    print(fake_us.cpf())  # CPF Г© especГӯfico do pt_BR
except AttributeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 1: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: MГ©todo correto para o locale
fake_br = Faker('pt_BR')
print(f'CPF (pt_BR): {fake_br.cpf()}')

# Exemplo 3: SSN Г© especГӯfico dos EUA
fake_br = Faker('pt_BR')
try:
    ssn = fake_br.ssn()  # Pode funcionar mas retorna CPF no pt_BR
    print(f'SSN no BR retorna: {ssn}')
except AttributeError as e:
    print(f'Erro: {e}')

# Exemplo 4: MГ©todo inexistente
try:
    fake_us.dados_inexistentes()
except AttributeError as e:
    print(f'\nErro mГ©todo inexistente: {e}')

# Exemplo 5: Verificar mГ©todos disponГӯveis
fake = Faker('pt_BR')

# Listar alguns providers
providers = [p for p in dir(fake) if not p.startswith('_')]
print(f'\nTotal de mГ©todos disponГӯveis: {len(providers)}')
print(f'Primeiros 10: {providers[:10]}')

# Exemplo 6: Verificar se mГ©todo existe
metodo = 'cpf'
if hasattr(fake, metodo):
    print(f'\nMГ©todo {metodo} existe: {getattr(fake, metodo)()}')
else:
    print(f'MГ©todo {metodo} nГЈo existe')

# Exemplo 7: MГ©todos especГӯficos por locale
print('\nMГ©todos especГӯficos por locale:')
print('  pt_BR: cpf(), cnpj(), rg(), bairro()')
print('  en_US: ssn(), zipcode(), state_abbr()')
print('  ja_JP: kana_name(), romanized_name()')
print('  de_DE: vat_id()')
print('  fr_FR: siren(), siret()')

commands.cmdDescription: Gera strings com padrГөes de letras (#=dГӯgito, ?=letra, ambos) e numerify/lexify
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

fake = Faker()

# Exemplo 1: bothify - # para dГӯgito, ? para letra
print('Bothify (# e ?):')
print(f'  Placa BR: {fake.bothify(text="???-####")}')
print(f'  Placa Mercosul: {fake.bothify(text="???#?##")}')
print(f'  CГіdigo: {fake.bothify(text="??-####-??")}')

# Exemplo 2: bothify com letras maiГәsculas
print(f'\n  MaiГәscula: {fake.bothify(text="???-####", letters="ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ")}')

# Exemplo 3: numerify - apenas # para dГӯgito
print('\nNumerify (# para dГӯgito):')
print(f'  Telefone: {fake.numerify(text="(##) #####-####")}')
print(f'  CEP: {fake.numerify(text="#####-###")}')
print(f'  CPF: {fake.numerify(text="###.###.###-##")}')
print(f'  CartГЈo: {fake.numerify(text="#### #### #### ####")}')
print(f'  Protocolo: {fake.numerify(text="####.####.####/####-##")}')

# Exemplo 4: lexify - apenas ? para letra
print('\nLexify (? para letra):')
print(f'  CГіdigo: {fake.lexify(text="????-????-????")}')
print(f'  Token: {fake.lexify(text="????????????????")}')
print(f'  Prefixo: {fake.lexify(text="???")}')

# Exemplo 5: lexify com letras especГӯficas
print(f'  Hex: {fake.lexify(text="??????", letters="0123456789abcdef")}')

# Exemplo 6: hexify
print(f'\nHexify:')
print(f'  MAC: {fake.hexify(text="^^:^^:^^:^^:^^:^^")}')
print(f'  Cor: #{fake.hexify(text="^^^^^^")}')

# Exemplo 7: CombinaГ§Гөes prГЎticas
print('\nCombinaГ§Гөes prГЎticas:')
print(f'  NВә Processo: {fake.numerify(text="####.####.#.##.####")}')
print(f'  RENAVAM: {fake.numerify(text="###########")}')
print(f'  MatrГӯcula: {fake.bothify(text="???#####")}')
print(f'  Chassi: {fake.bothify(text="#??######??######")}')
print(f'  Cod. Barras: {fake.numerify(text="#" * 44)}')

commands.cmdDescription: Gera datetime aleatГіrio entre duas datas com suporte a datas relativas
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker
from datetime import datetime, date

fake = Faker()

# Exemplo 1: Entre duas datas fixas
dt = fake.date_time_between(start_date=datetime(2020, 1, 1), end_date=datetime(2024, 12, 31))
print(f'2020-2024: {dt}')

# Exemplo 2: Datas relativas
print(f'\nГҡltimos 30 dias: {fake.date_time_between(start_date="-30d", end_date="now")}')
print(f'Гҡltimo ano: {fake.date_time_between(start_date="-1y", end_date="now")}')
print(f'Гҡltimos 5 anos: {fake.date_time_between(start_date="-5y", end_date="now")}')
print(f'PrГіximos 30 dias: {fake.date_time_between(start_date="now", end_date="+30d")}')
print(f'PrГіximo ano: {fake.date_time_between(start_date="now", end_date="+1y")}')

# Exemplo 3: date_between (sem hora)
print(f'\nDate entre: {fake.date_between(start_date="-1y", end_date="today")}')
print(f'Date entre: {fake.date_between(start_date=date(2023, 1, 1), end_date=date(2024, 12, 31))}')

# Exemplo 4: VariaГ§Гөes de data/hora
print(f'\nEste sГ©culo: {fake.date_time_this_century()}')
print(f'Esta dГ©cada: {fake.date_time_this_decade()}')
print(f'Este ano: {fake.date_time_this_year()}')
print(f'Este mГӘs: {fake.date_time_this_month()}')

# Exemplo 5: Data e hora futura
print(f'\nFuturo datetime: {fake.future_datetime()}')
print(f'Futuro date: {fake.future_date()}')
print(f'Passado datetime: {fake.past_datetime()}')
print(f'Passado date: {fake.past_date()}')

# Exemplo 6: Uso prГЎtico - log de eventos
print('\n--- Log de eventos ---')
for i in range(5):
    ts = fake.date_time_between(start_date='-7d', end_date='now')
    level = fake.random_element(elements=('INFO', 'WARNING', 'ERROR', 'DEBUG'))
    msg = fake.sentence(nb_words=5)
    print(f'[{ts}] {level}: {msg}')

# Exemplo 7: Uso prГЎtico - sГ©rie temporal
print('\n--- SГ©rie temporal ---')
base = datetime(2024, 1, 1)
for i in range(5):
    ts = fake.date_time_between(start_date=base, end_date=datetime(2024, 12, 31))
    valor = fake.pyfloat(min_value=100.0, max_value=500.0, right_digits=2)
    print(f'{ts.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")} | R$ {valor:,.2f}')

commands.cmdDescription: Gera senhas aleatГіrias com controle de complexidade
commands.cmdCode:
from faker import Faker

fake = Faker()

# Exemplo 1: Senha padrГЈo (10 chars)
for _ in range(5):
    print(f'Senha: {fake.password()}')

# Exemplo 2: Senha com tamanho especГӯfico
print(f'\n8 chars: {fake.password(length=8)}')
print(f'12 chars: {fake.password(length=12)}')
print(f'16 chars: {fake.password(length=16)}')
print(f'20 chars: {fake.password(length=20)}')
print(f'32 chars: {fake.password(length=32)}')

# Exemplo 3: Controlando complexidade
print(f'\nApenas letras minГәsculas: {fake.password(length=12, special_chars=False, digits=False, upper_case=False)}')
print(f'Sem especiais: {fake.password(length=12, special_chars=False)}')
print(f'Sem dГӯgitos: {fake.password(length=12, digits=False)}')
print(f'Sem maiГәsculas: {fake.password(length=12, upper_case=False)}')
print(f'Sem minГәsculas: {fake.password(length=12, lower_case=False)}')
print(f'Tudo habilitado: {fake.password(length=16, special_chars=True, digits=True, upper_case=True, lower_case=True)}')

# Exemplo 4: Gerador de senhas fortes
def generate_strong_passwords(count=5):
    for i in range(count):
        pwd = fake.password(length=20, special_chars=True, 
                           digits=True, upper_case=True, lower_case=True)
        strength = 'Forte' if len(pwd) >= 16 else 'MГ©dia'
        print(f'  {i+1}. {pwd} ({strength})')

print('\nSenhas fortes:')
generate_strong_passwords()

# Exemplo 5: Uso em cadastro
print('\n--- Cadastro com senha ---')
for _ in range(3):
    user = fake.user_name()
    pwd = fake.password(length=14)
    print(f'  UsuГЎrio: {user} | Senha: {pwd}')

# Exemplo 2: Boolean com chance customizada
print(f'\n70% True: {fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=70)}')
print(f'30% True: {fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=30)}')
print(f'90% True: {fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=90)}')
print(f'10% True: {fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=10)}')

# Exemplo 3: DistribuiГ§ГЈo estatГӯstica
print('\nDistribuiГ§ГЈo (1000 amostras):')

for chance in [25, 50, 75, 90]:
    results = [fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=chance) for _ in range(1000)]
    counter = Counter(results)
    true_pct = counter[True] / 10
    print(f'  {chance}% chance: True={counter[True]} ({true_pct:.1f}%) | False={counter[False]}')

# Exemplo 4: Uso prГЎtico - status ativo/inativo
print('\nUsuГЎrios (80% ativos):')
for _ in range(5):
    nome = fake.name()
    ativo = fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=80)
    print(f'  {nome}: {"Ativo" if ativo else "Inativo"}')

# Exemplo 5: MГәltiplos flags
print('\nProdutos com flags:')
for _ in range(3):
    produto = {
        'nome': fake.word(),
        'em_estoque': fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=70),
        'destaque': fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=20),
        'frete_gratis': fake.boolean(chance_of_getting_true=40)
    }
    print(f'  {produto}')

# Exemplo 6: pybool (equivalente)
print(f'\npybool: {fake.pybool()}')
print(f'pybool: {fake.pybool()}')

name: CustomTkinter
description: CustomTkinter Г© uma biblioteca que estende o Tkinter com widgets modernos e estilizados, oferecendo aparГӘncia similar a frameworks como Bootstrap. Ela fornece componentes prontos com temas claro/escuro, animaГ§Гөes suaves e suporte a cores personalizadas, ideal para criar interfaces grГЎficas profissionais e atraentes.

commands.cmdDescription: Cria a janela principal da aplicaГ§ГЈo CustomTkinter com tema moderno
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

# Exemplo 1: Janela bГЎsica
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Minha AplicaГ§ГЈo')
app.geometry('600x400')
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 2: Janela com configuraГ§Гөes avanГ§adas
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('App AvanГ§ado')
app.geometry('800x600+100+50')  # largura x altura + x_offset + y_offset
app.minsize(400, 300)
app.maxsize(1200, 800)
app.resizable(True, True)  # largura, altura
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 3: Janela nГЈo redimensionГЎvel
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Janela Fixa')
app.geometry('500x350')
app.resizable(False, False)
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 4: Janela com Гӯcone e transparГӘncia
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Com TransparГӘncia')
app.geometry('600x400')
app.attributes('-alpha', 0.95)  # TransparГӘncia 95%
# app.iconbitmap('icon.ico')  # ГҚcone personalizado
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 5: Janela centralizada na tela
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Centralizada')
width, height = 600, 400
screen_w = app.winfo_screenwidth()
screen_h = app.winfo_screenheight()
x = (screen_w - width) // 2
y = (screen_h - height) // 2
app.geometry(f'{width}x{height}+{x}+{y}')
app.mainloop()

$ python script.py

(Janela principal aparece com tГӯtulo 'Minha AplicaГ§ГЈo', dimensГөes 600x400)
(Janela com tema escuro padrГЈo do CustomTkinter)
(Barra de tГӯtulo e bordas com estilo moderno do sistema operacional)

commands.cmdDescription: Define o modo de aparГӘncia global (claro, escuro ou sistema)
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

# Exemplo 1: Modo escuro
ctk.set_appearance_mode('dark')
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Modo Escuro')
app.geometry('400x300')
ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Tema Escuro').pack(pady=20)
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 2: Modo claro
ctk.set_appearance_mode('light')
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Modo Claro')
app.geometry('400x300')
ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Tema Claro').pack(pady=20)
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 3: Seguir configuraГ§ГЈo do sistema
ctk.set_appearance_mode('system')
app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Seguindo Sistema')
app.geometry('400x300')
ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Tema do Sistema').pack(pady=20)
app.mainloop()

# Exemplo 4: Alternar tema em tempo real
ctk.set_appearance_mode('dark')

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Alternar Tema')
app.geometry('400x300')

def toggle_theme():
    current = ctk.get_appearance_mode()
    if current == 'Dark':
        ctk.set_appearance_mode('light')
    else:
        ctk.set_appearance_mode('dark')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Alternar Tema', command=toggle_theme).pack(pady=20)
ctk.CTkLabel(app, text=f'Modo atual: {ctk.get_appearance_mode()}').pack()
app.mainloop()

(Modo 'light': fundo claro #f0f0f0, textos escuros, widgets com estilo limpo)
(Modo 'system': segue a configuraГ§ГЈo do Windows/macOS/Linux automaticamente)
(BotГЈo 'Alternar Tema' muda entre dark e light em tempo real)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria campo de entrada de texto com placeholder e estilo moderno
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Entries')
app.geometry('500x500')

# Exemplo 1: Entry bГЎsico
entry1 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Digite seu nome')
entry1.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 2: Entry com largura fixa
entry2 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, width=300, placeholder_text='Largura 300')
entry2.pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 3: Entry para senha
entry3 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Senha', show='*')
entry3.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 4: Entry com cores customizadas
entry4 = ctk.CTkEntry(
    app,
    placeholder_text='Customizado',
    fg_color='#1a1a2e',
    text_color='#e94560',
    border_color='#0f3460',
    border_width=2,
    corner_radius=15,
    placeholder_text_color='gray50'
)
entry4.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 5: Entry desabilitado
entry5 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Desabilitado', state='disabled')
entry5.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 6: Entry somente leitura
entry6 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, state='readonly')
entry6.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 7: Obter e inserir texto
entry7 = ctk.CTkEntry(app)
entry7.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
entry7.insert(0, 'Texto prГ©-preenchido')

def get_text():
    valor = entry7.get()
    print(f'Texto digitado: {valor}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Obter Texto', command=get_text).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 8: Entry com validaГ§ГЈo
def validate_entry(event):
    text = entry8.get()
    if text.isdigit():
        entry8.configure(border_color='green')
    else:
        entry8.configure(border_color='red')

entry8 = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Apenas nГәmeros')
entry8.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
entry8.bind('<KeyRelease>', validate_entry)

# Exemplo 9: Entry com fonte grande
entry9 = ctk.CTkEntry(
    app,
    placeholder_text='Fonte Grande',
    font=('Arial', 18),
    height=45
)
entry9.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 10: Limpar entry
def clear_entry():
    entry7.delete(0, 'end')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Limpar', command=clear_entry).pack(pady=5)

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria container/frame para agrupar e organizar widgets
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Frames')
app.geometry('600x500')

# Exemplo 1: Frame bГЎsico
frame1 = ctk.CTkFrame(app)
frame1.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
ctk.CTkLabel(frame1, text='Frame BГЎsico').pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 2: Frame com cor e borda
frame2 = ctk.CTkFrame(
    app,
    fg_color='#1a1a2e',
    border_color='#e94560',
    border_width=2,
    corner_radius=15
)
frame2.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
ctk.CTkLabel(frame2, text='Frame Colorido', text_color='white').pack(pady=15)

# Exemplo 3: Frames lado a lado
container = ctk.CTkFrame(app)
container.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

left_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(container, fg_color='#2d3436')
left_frame.pack(side='left', expand=True, fill='both', padx=5, pady=5)
ctk.CTkLabel(left_frame, text='Esquerda').pack(pady=20, padx=20)

right_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(container, fg_color='#636e72')
right_frame.pack(side='right', expand=True, fill='both', padx=5, pady=5)
ctk.CTkLabel(right_frame, text='Direita').pack(pady=20, padx=20)

# Exemplo 4: Frame com dimensГөes fixas
frame4 = ctk.CTkFrame(app, width=300, height=100)
frame4.pack(pady=10)
frame4.pack_propagate(False)  # Impede que o frame encolha
ctk.CTkLabel(frame4, text='Tamanho Fixo 300x100').pack(expand=True)

# Exemplo 5: Frames aninhados
outer = ctk.CTkFrame(app, fg_color='#0984e3')
outer.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

inner = ctk.CTkFrame(outer, fg_color='#74b9ff')
inner.pack(pady=15, padx=15, fill='x')
ctk.CTkLabel(inner, text='Frame Aninhado').pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 6: Frame transparente
frame6 = ctk.CTkFrame(app, fg_color='transparent')
frame6.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
ctk.CTkLabel(frame6, text='Frame Transparente').pack()
ctk.CTkButton(frame6, text='BotГЈo no Frame').pack(pady=5)

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:

(Janela com mГәltiplos frames organizados)
(frame1: container com fundo padrГЈo do tema)
(frame2: fundo escuro com borda vermelha e cantos arredondados)
(container: dois frames lado a lado, esquerdo escuro e direito cinza)
(frame4: frame 300x100 que nГЈo encolhe com conteГәdo)
(outer/inner: frame azul escuro com frame azul claro dentro)
(frame6: frame sem fundo visГӯvel com label e botГЈo)

# Exemplo 9: Obter valor
def show_values():

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botГЈo de opГ§ГЈo (radio button) para seleГ§ГЈo exclusiva
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('RadioButtons')
app.geometry('400x400')

# Exemplo 1: Grupo de radio buttons
radio_var = ctk.StringVar(value='opcao1')

radio1 = ctk.CTkRadioButton(app, text='OpГ§ГЈo 1', variable=radio_var, value='opcao1')
radio1.pack(pady=10, padx=20, anchor='w')

radio2 = ctk.CTkRadioButton(app, text='OpГ§ГЈo 2', variable=radio_var, value='opcao2')
radio2.pack(pady=10, padx=20, anchor='w')

radio3 = ctk.CTkRadioButton(app, text='OpГ§ГЈo 3', variable=radio_var, value='opcao3')
radio3.pack(pady=10, padx=20, anchor='w')

# Exemplo 2: Com callback
def on_radio():
    print(f'Selecionado: {radio_var.get()}')

radio1.configure(command=on_radio)
radio2.configure(command=on_radio)
radio3.configure(command=on_radio)

# Exemplo 3: Radio buttons com IntVar
int_var = ctk.IntVar(value=0)

for i in range(1, 4):
    ctk.CTkRadioButton(
        app,
        text=f'NГӯvel {i}',
        variable=int_var,
        value=i
    ).pack(pady=5, padx=20, anchor='w')

# Exemplo 4: Radio com cores customizadas
color_var = ctk.StringVar(value='red')

for color, name in [('#e74c3c', 'Vermelho'), ('#2ecc71', 'Verde'), ('#3498db', 'Azul')]:
    ctk.CTkRadioButton(
        app,
        text=name,
        variable=color_var,
        value=color,
        fg_color=color,
        hover_color=color,
        border_color=color
    ).pack(pady=5, padx=20, anchor='w')

# Exemplo 5: Obter seleГ§ГЈo
def show_selection():
    print(f'String: {radio_var.get()}')
    print(f'Int: {int_var.get()}')
    print(f'Color: {color_var.get()}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Ver SeleГ§ГЈo', command=show_selection).pack(pady=20)

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:

(Janela com grupos de radio buttons)
(Grupo 1: OpГ§ГЈo 1 selecionada por padrГЈo)
(Clicar imprime: Selecionado: opcao2)
(Grupo 2: NГӯvel 1, 2, 3 com IntVar)
(Grupo 3: Radio buttons coloridos vermelho, verde, azul)
(BotГЈo imprime: String: opcao1, Int: 0, Color: red)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria controle deslizante (slider) para seleГ§ГЈo de valores numГ©ricos

commands.cmdDescription: Cria menu dropdown para seleГ§ГЈo de opГ§Гөes

import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('OptionMenu')
app.geometry('400x400')

# Exemplo 1: OptionMenu bГЎsico
option1 = ctk.CTkOptionMenu(app, values=['OpГ§ГЈo 1', 'OpГ§ГЈo 2', 'OpГ§ГЈo 3'])

option2.set('Python')  # Valor inicial
option2.pack(pady=15, padx=20)

# Exemplo 3: OptionMenu com callback

    print(f'Selecionado: {choice}')

    app,
    values=['Pequeno', 'MГ©dio', 'Grande'],
    command=option_callback
)

var4 = ctk.StringVar(value='Brasil')
option4 = ctk.CTkOptionMenu(

    values=['Brasil', 'Argentina', 'Chile', 'Uruguai', 'Paraguai'],
    variable=var4
)

    app,

)

# Exemplo 6: Obter valor e alterar opГ§Гөes

    print(f'Option 1: {option1.get()}')

commands.cmdDescription: Cria barra de progresso com animaГ§ГЈo e estilo moderno
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk
import threading
import time

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('ProgressBar')
app.geometry('500x400')

# Exemplo 1: ProgressBar bГЎsica
progress1 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress1.pack(pady=15, padx=20, fill='x')
progress1.set(0.5)  # 50%

# Exemplo 2: ProgressBar com valor especГӯfico
label2 = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='75%')
label2.pack()
progress2 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress2.pack(pady=5, padx=20, fill='x')
progress2.set(0.75)

# Exemplo 3: ProgressBar com cores customizadas
progress3 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(
    app,
    fg_color='#2d3436',
    progress_color='#e94560',
    border_color='#e94560',
    border_width=1,
    corner_radius=10,
    height=20
)
progress3.pack(pady=15, padx=20, fill='x')
progress3.set(0.6)

# Exemplo 4: ProgressBar indeterminada (loading)
progress4 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app, mode='indeterminate')
progress4.pack(pady=15, padx=20, fill='x')
progress4.start()  # Iniciar animaГ§ГЈo
# progress4.stop()  # Parar animaГ§ГЈo

# Exemplo 5: ProgressBar com atualizaГ§ГЈo dinГўmica
label5 = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='0%')
label5.pack()
progress5 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress5.pack(pady=5, padx=20, fill='x')
progress5.set(0)

def simulate_progress():
    for i in range(101):
        progress5.set(i / 100)
        label5.configure(text=f'{i}%')
        app.update()
        time.sleep(0.03)

def start_progress():
    thread = threading.Thread(target=simulate_progress)
    thread.start()

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Iniciar Progresso', command=start_progress).pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 6: ProgressBar com variГЎvel
var6 = ctk.DoubleVar(value=0.3)
progress6 = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app, variable=var6)
progress6.pack(pady=15, padx=20, fill='x')

# Exemplo 7: Controlar com slider
def update_progress(value):
    progress6.set(value)
    label6.configure(text=f'{int(float(value)*100)}%')

label6 = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='30%')
label6.pack()
slider = ctk.CTkSlider(app, from_=0, to=1, command=update_progress)
slider.set(0.3)
slider.pack(pady=5, padx=20, fill='x')

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com barras de progresso)
(progress1: barra azul preenchida em 50%)
(progress2: barra em 75% com label mostrando '75%')
(progress3: barra vermelha com fundo escuro em 60%)
(progress4: barra com animaГ§ГЈo contГӯnua de loading)
(progress5: barra que preenche de 0% a 100% ao clicar 'Iniciar Progresso')
(progress6: barra controlada pelo slider abaixo)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria frame com scrollbar automГЎtica para conteГәdo longo
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('ScrollableFrame')
app.geometry('500x500')

# Exemplo 1: Scroll vertical
scroll_frame1 = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(app, width=400, height=200, label_text='Lista de Itens')
scroll_frame1.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='both')

for i in range(30):
    ctk.CTkLabel(scroll_frame1, text=f'Item {i+1}').pack(pady=2, padx=10, anchor='w')

# Exemplo 2: Scroll com widgets interativos
scroll_frame2 = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(app, width=400, height=200, label_text='ConfiguraГ§Гөes')
scroll_frame2.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='both')

switches = []
for i in range(15):
    switch = ctk.CTkSwitch(scroll_frame2, text=f'OpГ§ГЈo {i+1}')
    switch.pack(pady=5, padx=10, anchor='w')

# Exemplo 3: Scroll horizontal

    app,
    width=400,
    height=80,
    orientation='horizontal',
    label_text='Horizontal'
)
scroll_frame3.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

for i in range(20):
    ctk.CTkButton(
        scroll_frame3,
        text=f'Btn {i+1}',
        width=80
    ).pack(side='left', padx=5, pady=5)

# Exemplo 4: Scroll com cores customizadas
scroll_frame4 = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(
    app,
    width=400,
    height=100,
    fg_color='#1a1a2e',
    scrollbar_button_color='#e94560',
    scrollbar_button_hover_color='#c0392b',
    label_text='Customizado',
    label_fg_color='#e94560'
)
# scroll_frame4.pack(pady=10, padx=20)  # Descomente

# Exemplo 5: Obter switches ativados
def show_active():
    active = [s.cget('text') for s in switches if s.get() == 1]
    print(f'Ativos: {active}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Mostrar Ativos', command=show_active).pack(pady=10)

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria janela secundГЎria (popup/dialog) com estilo CustomTkinter
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Janela Principal')
app.geometry('400x300')

# Exemplo 1: Toplevel bГЎsico
def open_basic():
    top = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    top.title('Janela SecundГЎria')
    top.geometry('300x200')
    ctk.CTkLabel(top, text='Janela SecundГЎria!').pack(pady=20)
    ctk.CTkButton(top, text='Fechar', command=top.destroy).pack(pady=10)

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Abrir Janela', command=open_basic).pack(pady=15)

# Exemplo 2: Dialog modal (grab_set)
def open_modal():
    dialog = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    dialog.title('Modal')
    dialog.geometry('300x200')
    dialog.transient(app)  # Vincula Г  janela principal
    dialog.grab_set()  # Bloqueia interaГ§ГЈo com janela principal
    
    ctk.CTkLabel(dialog, text='Janela Modal!', font=('Arial', 16)).pack(pady=20)
    
    def close_modal():
        dialog.grab_release()
        dialog.destroy()
    
    ctk.CTkButton(dialog, text='OK', command=close_modal).pack(pady=10)

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Abrir Modal', command=open_modal).pack(pady=15)

# Exemplo 3: Dialog com retorno de valor
def open_input_dialog():
    dialog = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    dialog.title('Input')
    dialog.geometry('300x180')
    dialog.transient(app)
    dialog.grab_set()
    
    ctk.CTkLabel(dialog, text='Digite seu nome:').pack(pady=10)
    entry = ctk.CTkEntry(dialog, width=200)
    entry.pack(pady=5)
    
    result = ctk.StringVar()
    
    def confirm():
        result.set(entry.get())
        dialog.grab_release()
        dialog.destroy()
    
    ctk.CTkButton(dialog, text='Confirmar', command=confirm).pack(pady=10)
    
    dialog.wait_window()  # Esperar janela fechar
    name = result.get()
    if name:
        print(f'Nome digitado: {name}')
        label_result.configure(text=f'Bem-vindo, {name}!')

label_result = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Nenhum nome informado')
label_result.pack(pady=10)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Input Dialog', command=open_input_dialog).pack(pady=15)

# Exemplo 4: Toplevel com configuraГ§Гөes
def open_config():
    config = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    config.title('ConfiguraГ§Гөes')
    config.geometry('350x250')
    config.resizable(False, False)
    config.attributes('-topmost', True)  # Sempre no topo
    
    ctk.CTkLabel(config, text='ConfiguraГ§Гөes', font=('Arial', 18, 'bold')).pack(pady=10)
    ctk.CTkSwitch(config, text='Modo Escuro').pack(pady=5, padx=20, anchor='w')
    ctk.CTkSwitch(config, text='NotificaГ§Гөes').pack(pady=5, padx=20, anchor='w')
    ctk.CTkOptionMenu(config, values=['Pequeno', 'MГ©dio', 'Grande']).pack(pady=10)
    ctk.CTkButton(config, text='Fechar', command=config.destroy).pack(pady=10)

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='ConfiguraГ§Гөes', command=open_config).pack(pady=15)

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela principal com 4 botГөes)
(BotГЈo 'Abrir Janela': abre janela secundГЎria simples)
(BotГЈo 'Abrir Modal': abre janela que bloqueia a principal)
(BotГЈo 'Input Dialog': abre dialog, usuГЎrio digita nome, imprime 'Nome digitado: JoГЈo')
(BotГЈo 'ConfiguraГ§Гөes': abre janela com switches e opГ§Гөes, sempre no topo)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria imagem compatГӯvel com temas claro e escuro usando Pillow

import customtkinter as ctk
from PIL import Image
import os

app = ctk.CTk()

        dark_image=Image.open('icon.png'),

    )

    label1.pack(pady=10)

    img2 = ctk.CTkImage(
        light_image=Image.open('icon_light.png'),
        dark_image=Image.open('icon_dark.png'),
        size=(40, 40)
    )
    label2 = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Tema AdaptГЎvel', image=img2, compound='left')
    label2.pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 3: Imagem em botГЈo
if os.path.exists('icon.png'):
    btn_img = ctk.CTkImage(Image.open('icon.png'), size=(20, 20))
    btn = ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Com ГҚcone', image=btn_img, compound='left')

# Criar Гӯcone simples

draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img_pil)
draw.rounded_rectangle([10, 10, 90, 90], radius=15, fill='#3B8ED0')

label4.pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 5: Redimensionar imagem
if os.path.exists('photo.jpg'):
    original = Image.open('photo.jpg')

    img5 = ctk.CTkImage(original, size=(200, 150))
    label5 = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='', image=img5)

# Exemplo 6: Imagem com diferentes tamanhos
print('\nCTkImage suporta:')
print('  light_image: imagem para tema claro')
print('  dark_image: imagem para tema escuro')
print('  size: (largura, altura) em pixels')

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botГЈo segmentado para seleГ§ГЈo entre opГ§Гөes
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('SegmentedButton')
app.geometry('500x400')

# Exemplo 1: Segmented button bГЎsico
seg1 = ctk.CTkSegmentedButton(app, values=['Tab 1', 'Tab 2', 'Tab 3'])
seg1.set('Tab 1')
seg1.pack(pady=15, padx=20)

# Exemplo 2: Com callback
def seg_callback(value):
    print(f'Selecionado: {value}')
    label_result.configure(text=f'SeleГ§ГЈo: {value}')

label_result = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='SeleГ§ГЈo: Nenhuma')
label_result.pack()

seg2 = ctk.CTkSegmentedButton(
    app,
    values=['Dia', 'Semana', 'MГӘs', 'Ano'],
    command=seg_callback
)
seg2.set('Semana')
seg2.pack(pady=15, padx=20)

# Exemplo 3: Com variГЎvel
var3 = ctk.StringVar(value='Python')
seg3 = ctk.CTkSegmentedButton(
    app,
    values=['Python', 'Java', 'C++', 'Go'],
    variable=var3
)
seg3.pack(pady=15, padx=20)

# Exemplo 4: Com cores customizadas
seg4 = ctk.CTkSegmentedButton(
    app,
    values=['Dark', 'Light', 'System'],
    fg_color='#1a1a2e',

    selected_hover_color='#c0392b',

    text_color_disabled='gray50',
    corner_radius=8
)
seg4.set('Dark')
seg4.pack(pady=15, padx=20)

# Exemplo 5: Alterar valores dinamicamente
def update_segments():
    seg1.configure(values=['Novo 1', 'Novo 2', 'Novo 3', 'Novo 4'])
    seg1.set('Novo 1')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Atualizar Segmentos', command=update_segments).pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 6: Obter valor
def show_values():
    print(f'Seg 1: {seg1.get()}')
    print(f'Seg 2: {seg2.get()}')

    print(f'Seg 4: {seg4.get()}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Valores', command=show_values).pack(pady=10)

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria diГЎlogo de entrada de texto pronto para uso
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('InputDialog')
app.geometry('400x300')

# Exemplo 1: InputDialog bГЎsico
def open_dialog_basic():
    dialog = ctk.CTkInputDialog(
        text='Digite seu nome:',
        title='Input'
    )
    result = dialog.get_input()  # Bloqueia atГ© resposta
    if result:
        print(f'Nome: {result}')
        label.configure(text=f'Bem-vindo, {result}!')
    else:
        print('Cancelado')
        label.configure(text='Entrada cancelada')

label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Nenhuma entrada', font=('Arial', 16))
label.pack(pady=20)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Nome', command=open_dialog_basic).pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 2: InputDialog para idade
def open_dialog_age():
    dialog = ctk.CTkInputDialog(
        text='Qual sua idade?',
        title='Idade'
    )
    result = dialog.get_input()
    if result and result.isdigit():
        print(f'Idade: {result}')
    elif result:
        print('Idade invГЎlida')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Idade', command=open_dialog_age).pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 3: InputDialog para senha
def open_dialog_password():
    dialog = ctk.CTkInputDialog(
        text='Digite a senha:',
        title='Senha'
    )
    # Nota: CTkInputDialog nГЈo suporta 'show' nativamente
    # Para senha, use CTkToplevel customizado
    result = dialog.get_input()
    if result:
        print(f'Senha: {"*" * len(result)}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Senha', command=open_dialog_password).pack(pady=10)

# Exemplo 4: InputDialog com cores
def open_dialog_custom():
    dialog = ctk.CTkInputDialog(
        text='Valor customizado:',
        title='Custom',
        fg_color='#1a1a2e',
        button_fg_color='#e94560',
        button_hover_color='#c0392b',
        button_text_color='white',
        entry_fg_color='#16213e',
        entry_border_color='#e94560',
        entry_text_color='white'
    )
    result = dialog.get_input()
    print(f'Custom: {result}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Dialog Custom', command=open_dialog_custom).pack(pady=10)

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Posiciona widgets usando layout de grade (grid) no CustomTkinter
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Grid Layout')
app.geometry('500x500')

# Configurar peso das colunas e linhas
app.grid_columnconfigure(0, weight=1)
app.grid_columnconfigure(1, weight=1)
app.grid_rowconfigure(4, weight=1)

# Exemplo 1: FormulГЎrio com grid
ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Nome:').grid(row=0, column=0, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='e')
ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Seu nome').grid(row=0, column=1, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='ew')

ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Email:').grid(row=1, column=0, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='e')
ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='email@exemplo.com').grid(row=1, column=1, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='ew')

ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Senha:').grid(row=2, column=0, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='e')
ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Senha', show='*').grid(row=2, column=1, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='ew')

# Exemplo 2: BotГөes em grid
btn_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(app)
btn_frame.grid(row=3, column=0, columnspan=2, pady=20)

ctk.CTkButton(btn_frame, text='Salvar', width=120).grid(row=0, column=0, padx=10)
ctk.CTkButton(btn_frame, text='Cancelar', width=120, fg_color='gray40').grid(row=0, column=1, padx=10)
ctk.CTkButton(btn_frame, text='Limpar', width=120, fg_color='#e94560').grid(row=0, column=2, padx=10)

# Exemplo 3: Grid com sticky (preenchimento)
frame = ctk.CTkFrame(app)
frame.grid(row=4, column=0, columnspan=2, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='nsew')
frame.grid_columnconfigure((0, 1, 2), weight=1)
frame.grid_rowconfigure((0, 1), weight=1)

for i in range(2):
    for j in range(3):
        ctk.CTkButton(
            frame,
            text=f'({i},{j})',
            width=80
        ).grid(row=i, column=j, padx=5, pady=5, sticky='nsew')

# Exemplo 4: Columnspan e rowspan
# ctk.CTkTextbox(app).grid(row=5, column=0, columnspan=2, padx=20, pady=10, sticky='ew')

# Sticky values:
# 'n' = top, 's' = bottom, 'e' = right, 'w' = left
# 'ns' = stretch vertical, 'ew' = stretch horizontal
# 'nsew' = stretch both directions

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Altera propriedades de qualquer widget em tempo de execuГ§ГЈo
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Configure')
app.geometry('500x500')

# Widgets para demonstraГ§ГЈo
label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Texto Original', font=('Arial', 16))
label.pack(pady=15)

button = ctk.CTkButton(app, text='BotГЈo Original')
button.pack(pady=10)

entry = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Campo original')
entry.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

progress = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
progress.set(0.3)

# Exemplo 1: Alterar texto
def change_text():
    label.configure(text='Texto Alterado!')
    button.configure(text='BotГЈo Alterado!')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Mudar Textos', command=change_text).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 2: Alterar cores
def change_colors():
    label.configure(text_color='#e94560')
    button.configure(
        fg_color='#e94560',
        hover_color='#c0392b',
        text_color='white'
    )
    entry.configure(
        border_color='#e94560',
        fg_color='#1a1a2e',
        text_color='#e94560'
    )
    progress.configure(progress_color='#e94560')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Mudar Cores', command=change_colors).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 3: Alterar fonte
def change_font():
    label.configure(font=('Courier', 20, 'bold'))

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Mudar Fonte', command=change_font).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 4: Habilitar/Desabilitar
def toggle_state():
    current = button.cget('state')
    if current == 'normal':
        button.configure(state='disabled')
        entry.configure(state='disabled')
    else:
        button.configure(state='normal')
        entry.configure(state='normal')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Toggle Estado', command=toggle_state).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 5: Alterar dimensГөes
def change_size():
    button.configure(width=300, height=50, corner_radius=25)

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Mudar Tamanho', command=change_size).pack(pady=5)

# Exemplo 6: Obter configuraГ§ГЈo atual com cget
def show_config():
    print(f'Label text: {label.cget("text")}')
    print(f'Button fg_color: {button.cget("fg_color")}')
    print(f'Button state: {button.cget("state")}')
    print(f'Entry placeholder: {entry.cget("placeholder_text")}')
    print(f'Progress value: {progress.get()}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Ver Configs', command=show_config).pack(pady=5)

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdDescription: Vincula eventos de teclado, mouse e sistema a widgets
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Eventos')
app.geometry('500x500')

log = ctk.CTkTextbox(app, height=200)
log.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

def add_log(msg):
    log.insert('end', msg + '\n')
    log.see('end')

# Exemplo 1: Eventos de teclado
def on_key(event):
    add_log(f'Tecla: {event.keysym} (char: {event.char})')

app.bind('<Key>', on_key)

# Exemplo 2: Teclas especГӯficas
def on_enter(event):
    add_log('Enter pressionado!')

def on_escape(event):
    add_log('Escape pressionado!')
    # app.destroy()  # Fechar app com Escape

app.bind('<Return>', on_enter)
app.bind('<Escape>', on_escape)

# Exemplo 3: CombinaГ§Гөes de teclas
def on_ctrl_s(event):
    add_log('Ctrl+S: Salvar!')

def on_ctrl_z(event):
    add_log('Ctrl+Z: Desfazer!')

app.bind('<Control-s>', on_ctrl_s)
app.bind('<Control-z>', on_ctrl_z)

# Exemplo 4: Eventos de mouse
frame = ctk.CTkFrame(app, width=400, height=100, fg_color='#3B8ED0')
frame.pack(pady=10, padx=20)
frame.pack_propagate(False)
label_frame = ctk.CTkLabel(frame, text='Passe o mouse aqui')
label_frame.pack(expand=True)

def on_mouse_enter(event):
    frame.configure(fg_color='#e94560')
    label_frame.configure(text='Mouse dentro!')

def on_mouse_leave(event):
    frame.configure(fg_color='#3B8ED0')
    label_frame.configure(text='Passe o mouse aqui')

def on_click(event):
    add_log(f'Clique em: x={event.x}, y={event.y}')

def on_right_click(event):
    add_log(f'Clique direito em: x={event.x}, y={event.y}')

def on_double_click(event):
    add_log('Duplo clique!')

frame.bind('<Enter>', on_mouse_enter)
frame.bind('<Leave>', on_mouse_leave)
frame.bind('<Button-1>', on_click)
frame.bind('<Button-3>', on_right_click)
frame.bind('<Double-Button-1>', on_double_click)

# Exemplo 5: Evento de redimensionamento
def on_resize(event):
    if event.widget == app:
        add_log(f'Janela: {event.width}x{event.height}')

app.bind('<Configure>', on_resize)

# Exemplo 6: Evento de fechar janela
def on_close():
    print('Janela sendo fechada!')
    app.destroy()

app.protocol('WM_DELETE_WINDOW', on_close)

# Exemplo 7: Entry com evento
entry = ctk.CTkEntry(app, placeholder_text='Digite algo...')
entry.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')

def on_entry_change(event):
    add_log(f'Entry: {entry.get()}')

entry.bind('<KeyRelease>', on_entry_change)

# Eventos comuns:
# <Button-1>: clique esquerdo
# <Button-3>: clique direito
# <Double-Button-1>: duplo clique
# <Enter>: mouse entra no widget
# <Leave>: mouse sai do widget
# <Key>: qualquer tecla
# <Return>: Enter
# <Escape>: Escape
# <Control-s>: Ctrl+S
# <Configure>: redimensionamento
# <FocusIn>: widget ganha foco
# <FocusOut>: widget perde foco
# <MouseWheel>: scroll do mouse

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdName: Erro: TclError - bad window path name
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao tentar acessar widget jГЎ destruГӯdo ou janela fechada
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Erro TclError')
app.geometry('400x300')

# Exemplo 1: Widget destruГӯdo
label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Texto')
label.pack()
label.destroy()

try:
    label.configure(text='Novo texto')  # Widget jГЎ destruГӯdo
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Erro 1: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: Toplevel fechado
def open_and_access():
    top = ctk.CTkToplevel(app)
    top.title('TemporГЎria')
    lbl = ctk.CTkLabel(top, text='TemporГЎrio')
    lbl.pack()
    top.destroy()  # Fechar janela
    
    try:
        lbl.configure(text='Teste')  # Tentar acessar widget na janela destruГӯda
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Erro 2: {type(e).__name__}: {e}')

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Testar', command=open_and_access).pack(pady=20)

# Exemplo 3: Verificar se widget existe
def safe_configure(widget, **kwargs):
    try:
        if widget.winfo_exists():
            widget.configure(**kwargs)
            print('Widget configurado com sucesso')
        else:
            print('Widget nГЈo existe mais')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Erro: {e}')

# Exemplo 4: Causas comuns e soluГ§Гөes
print('\nCausas comuns de TclError:')
print('  1. Widget jГЎ foi destruГӯdo com .destroy()')
print('  2. Janela pai foi fechada')
print('  3. ReferГӘncia a widget em callback apГіs destruiГ§ГЈo')
print('  4. Thread tentando acessar widget da UI')
print('\nSoluГ§Гөes:')
print('  1. Verificar com .winfo_exists() antes de acessar')
print('  2. Usar try/except ao redor de operaГ§Гөes em widgets')
print('  3. Usar app.after() para operaГ§Гөes da thread principal')
print('  4. Setar referГӘncias como None apГіs destroy()')

app.mainloop()

commands.cmdName: Erro: RuntimeError - main thread is not in main loop
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao atualizar widgets de uma thread secundГЎria
commands.cmdCode:
import customtkinter as ctk
import threading
import time

app = ctk.CTk()
app.title('Threading Error')
app.geometry('400x300')

label = ctk.CTkLabel(app, text='Status: Aguardando', font=('Arial', 16))
label.pack(pady=20)

progress = ctk.CTkProgressBar(app)
progress.pack(pady=10, padx=20, fill='x')
progress.set(0)

# Exemplo 1: ERRO - Atualizar widget de thread secundГЎria
def wrong_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            try:
                # ERRADO: atualizar widget da thread secundГЎria
                label.configure(text=f'Progresso: {i}%')
                progress.set(i / 100)
            except RuntimeError as e:
                print(f'Erro: {e}')
                break
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task).start()

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - Usar app.after()
def correct_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            # CORRETO: agendar atualizaГ§ГЈo na thread principal
            app.after(0, lambda v=i: label.configure(text=f'Progresso: {v}%'))
            app.after(0, lambda v=i: progress.set(v / 100))
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()

# Exemplo 3: CORRETO - Usar queue
import queue

msg_queue = queue.Queue()

def process_queue():
    try:
        while True:
            msg = msg_queue.get_nowait()
            label.configure(text=msg)
    except queue.Empty:
        pass
    app.after(100, process_queue)  # Verificar a cada 100ms

def queue_thread_update():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            msg_queue.put(f'Progresso: {i}%')
            time.sleep(0.03)
    
    threading.Thread(target=task, daemon=True).start()

process_queue()  # Iniciar processamento

ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Errado (Thread)', command=wrong_thread_update, fg_color='#e94560').pack(pady=5)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Correto (after)', command=correct_thread_update, fg_color='#2ecc71').pack(pady=5)
ctk.CTkButton(app, text='Correto (Queue)', command=queue_thread_update, fg_color='#2ecc71').pack(pady=5)

print('\nSoluГ§Гөes para threading:')
print('  1. app.after(ms, callback) - agenda na thread principal')
print('  2. queue.Queue - fila thread-safe')
print('  3. Nunca chamar .configure() de thread secundГЎria')
print('  4. Usar daemon=True para threads que devem encerrar com app')

app.mainloop()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

SoluГ§Гөes para threading:
  1. app.after(ms, callback) - agenda na thread principal
  2. queue.Queue - fila thread-safe
  3. Nunca chamar .configure() de thread secundГЎria
  4. Usar daemon=True para threads que devem encerrar com app

(BotГЈo vermelho: causa RuntimeError ao tentar atualizar da thread)
(BotГЈo verde 'after': atualiza label e progress suavemente)
(BotГЈo verde 'Queue': atualiza via fila thread-safe)
Erro: main thread is not in main loop

commands.cmdDescription: Cria janela principal com suporte a menu, toolbar, statusbar e widget central
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget,
                              QLabel, QVBoxLayout, QMenuBar, QToolBar,
                              QStatusBar)
from PyQt6.QtGui import QAction, QIcon
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)

# Exemplo 1: MainWindow bГЎsica
class MainWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('MainWindow')
        self.setGeometry(100, 100, 800, 600)
        
        # Widget central obrigatГіrio
        central = QWidget()
        self.setCentralWidget(central)
        
        layout = QVBoxLayout(central)
        layout.addWidget(QLabel('ConteГәdo Central'))

window = MainWindow()
window.show()

# Exemplo 2: MainWindow com menu, toolbar e statusbar
class FullWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('App Completa')
        self.setGeometry(100, 100, 800, 600)
        
        # Menu Bar
        menu_bar = self.menuBar()
        file_menu = menu_bar.addMenu('&Arquivo')
        
        new_action = QAction('&Novo', self)
        new_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+N')
        new_action.triggered.connect(lambda: print('Novo arquivo'))
        file_menu.addAction(new_action)
        
        open_action = QAction('&Abrir', self)
        open_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+O')
        open_action.triggered.connect(lambda: print('Abrir arquivo'))
        file_menu.addAction(open_action)
        
        file_menu.addSeparator()
        
        exit_action = QAction('&Sair', self)
        exit_action.setShortcut('Ctrl+Q')
        exit_action.triggered.connect(self.close)
        file_menu.addAction(exit_action)
        
        edit_menu = menu_bar.addMenu('&Editar')
        edit_menu.addAction('Copiar')
        edit_menu.addAction('Colar')
        
        # Tool Bar
        toolbar = QToolBar('Barra Principal')
        self.addToolBar(toolbar)
        toolbar.addAction(new_action)
        toolbar.addAction(open_action)
        toolbar.addSeparator()
        toolbar.addAction(exit_action)
        
        # Status Bar
        self.statusBar().showMessage('Pronto', 3000)  # 3 segundos
        
        # Widget Central
        central = QWidget()
        self.setCentralWidget(central)
        layout = QVBoxLayout(central)
        layout.addWidget(QLabel('ГҒrea de trabalho principal'))

window = FullWindow()
window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botГЈo clicГЎvel com texto, Гӯcone e estilos
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton, QVBoxLayout
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, QSize
from PyQt6.QtGui import QIcon, QFont

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('BotГөes')
window.resize(400, 600)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: BotГЈo bГЎsico
btn1 = QPushButton('Clique Aqui')
btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: print('BotГЈo 1 clicado!'))
layout.addWidget(btn1)

# Exemplo 2: BotГЈo com mГ©todo
def on_click():
    print('BotГЈo 2 clicado!')

btn2 = QPushButton('Com FunГ§ГЈo')
btn2.clicked.connect(on_click)
layout.addWidget(btn2)

# Exemplo 3: BotГЈo com tamanho fixo
btn3 = QPushButton('Tamanho Fixo')
btn3.setFixedSize(200, 50)
layout.addWidget(btn3)

# Exemplo 4: BotГЈo com Гӯcone
# btn4 = QPushButton('Com ГҚcone')
# btn4.setIcon(QIcon('icon.png'))
# btn4.setIconSize(QSize(24, 24))
# layout.addWidget(btn4)

# Exemplo 5: BotГЈo estilizado com CSS
btn5 = QPushButton('Estilizado')
btn5.setStyleSheet('''
    QPushButton {
        background-color: #e94560;
        color: white;
        border: none;
        padding: 12px 24px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: bold;
    }
    QPushButton:hover {
        background-color: #c0392b;
    }
    QPushButton:pressed {
        background-color: #a93226;
    }
    QPushButton:disabled {
        background-color: #bdc3c7;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(btn5)

# Exemplo 6: BotГЈo desabilitado
btn6 = QPushButton('Desabilitado')
btn6.setEnabled(False)
layout.addWidget(btn6)

# Exemplo 7: BotГЈo toggle (checkable)
btn7 = QPushButton('Toggle ON/OFF')
btn7.setCheckable(True)
btn7.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Toggle: {"ON" if checked else "OFF"}'))
layout.addWidget(btn7)

# Exemplo 8: BotГЈo com fonte grande
btn8 = QPushButton('Fonte Grande')
btn8.setFont(QFont('Helvetica', 18, QFont.Weight.Bold))
layout.addWidget(btn8)

# Exemplo 9: BotГЈo com tooltip
btn9 = QPushButton('Com Tooltip')
btn9.setToolTip('Este Г© um botГЈo com dica de ferramenta')
layout.addWidget(btn9)

# Exemplo 10: BotГЈo com shortcut
btn10 = QPushButton('&Atalho (Alt+A)')
btn10.setShortcut('Ctrl+Return')
btn10.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Atalho ativado!'))
layout.addWidget(btn10)

# Exemplo 11: Alterar texto em runtime
btn11 = QPushButton('Original')
counter = [0]
def increment():
    counter[0] += 1
    btn11.setText(f'Clicado {counter[0]}x')
btn11.clicked.connect(increment)
layout.addWidget(btn11)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com 11 botГөes empilhados)
(btn1: clica -> imprime 'BotГЈo 1 clicado!')
(btn5: botГЈo vermelho com hover mais escuro)
(btn6: botГЈo cinza nГЈo clicГЎvel)
(btn7: toggle imprime 'Toggle: ON' / 'Toggle: OFF')
(btn9: mostra tooltip ao passar mouse)
(btn10: Ctrl+Enter ativa o botГЈo)
(btn11: texto muda para 'Clicado 1x', 'Clicado 2x'...)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria campo de entrada de texto de linha Гәnica
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QLineEdit,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt
from PyQt6.QtGui import QFont

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('LineEdit')
window.resize(400, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: LineEdit bГЎsico
edit1 = QLineEdit()
edit1.setPlaceholderText('Digite seu nome...')
layout.addWidget(edit1)

# Exemplo 2: LineEdit com texto inicial
edit2 = QLineEdit('Texto prГ©-preenchido')
layout.addWidget(edit2)

# Exemplo 3: LineEdit para senha
edit3 = QLineEdit()
edit3.setPlaceholderText('Senha')
edit3.setEchoMode(QLineEdit.EchoMode.Password)
layout.addWidget(edit3)

# Exemplo 4: LineEdit somente leitura
edit4 = QLineEdit('Somente leitura')
edit4.setReadOnly(True)
layout.addWidget(edit4)

# Exemplo 5: LineEdit com tamanho mГЎximo
edit5 = QLineEdit()
edit5.setPlaceholderText('MГЎximo 10 caracteres')
edit5.setMaxLength(10)
layout.addWidget(edit5)

# Exemplo 6: LineEdit com validaГ§ГЈo em tempo real
label6 = QLabel('Caracteres: 0')
layout.addWidget(label6)

edit6 = QLineEdit()
edit6.setPlaceholderText('Digite e veja a contagem')
edit6.textChanged.connect(lambda text: label6.setText(f'Caracteres: {len(text)}'))
layout.addWidget(edit6)

# Exemplo 7: LineEdit com evento Enter
edit7 = QLineEdit()
edit7.setPlaceholderText('Pressione Enter')
edit7.returnPressed.connect(lambda: print(f'Enter: {edit7.text()}'))
layout.addWidget(edit7)

# Exemplo 8: LineEdit estilizado
edit8 = QLineEdit()
edit8.setPlaceholderText('Estilizado')
edit8.setStyleSheet('''
    QLineEdit {
        border: 2px solid #3B8ED0;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        font-size: 14px;
        background-color: #1a1a2e;
        color: white;
    }
    QLineEdit:focus {
        border-color: #e94560;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(edit8)

# Exemplo 9: LineEdit com alinhamento
edit9 = QLineEdit('Centralizado')
edit9.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter)
layout.addWidget(edit9)

# Exemplo 10: Obter e limpar texto
def get_and_clear():
    print(f'Texto edit1: "{edit1.text()}"')
    print(f'Texto edit2: "{edit2.text()}"')
    edit1.clear()
    edit2.selectAll()  # Selecionar tudo

btn = QPushButton('Obter e Limpar')
btn.clicked.connect(get_and_clear)
layout.addWidget(btn)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com campos de texto empilhados)
(edit1: placeholder 'Digite seu nome...')
(edit3: campo de senha com bolinhas)
(edit4: campo cinza nГЈo editГЎvel)
(edit5: aceita no mГЎximo 10 caracteres)
(edit6: label atualiza 'Caracteres: 5' em tempo real)
(edit7: Enter imprime 'Enter: texto digitado')
(edit8: campo escuro com borda azul, foco vermelho)
(BotГЈo imprime: Texto edit1: "JoГЈo", Texto edit2: "Texto prГ©-preenchido")

commands.cmdDescription: Organiza widgets verticalmente (de cima para baixo)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QVBoxLayout,
                              QPushButton, QLabel)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('VBoxLayout')
window.resize(300, 400)

# Exemplo 1: Layout vertical bГЎsico
layout = QVBoxLayout()
layout.addWidget(QLabel('Elemento 1'))
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('BotГЈo 1'))
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('BotГЈo 2'))
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('BotГЈo 3'))

# Exemplo 2: Layout com espaГ§amento
layout.setSpacing(15)  # EspaГ§o entre widgets
layout.setContentsMargins(20, 20, 20, 20)  # left, top, right, bottom

# Exemplo 3: Adicionar espaГ§amento fixo
layout.addSpacing(30)  # 30 pixels de espaГ§o
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('ApГіs EspaГ§o'))

# Exemplo 4: Adicionar stretch (espaГ§o flexГӯvel)
layout.addStretch(1)  # Empurra tudo para cima
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('No Fundo'))

# Exemplo 5: Inserir widget em posiГ§ГЈo especГӯfica
btn_inserted = QPushButton('Inserido na posiГ§ГЈo 1')
layout.insertWidget(1, btn_inserted)

# Exemplo 6: Contar e remover widgets
print(f'Total de itens: {layout.count()}')

window.setLayout(layout)
window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

(Janela com widgets empilhados verticalmente)

(30px de espaГ§o)

commands.cmdDescription: Organiza widgets horizontalmente (da esquerda para direita)

commands.cmdDescription: Organiza widgets em grade (linhas e colunas)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QGridLayout,
                              QPushButton, QLabel, QLineEdit)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('GridLayout')
window.resize(400, 300)

# Exemplo 1: Grid bГЎsico
grid = QGridLayout()

# addWidget(widget, row, col)
grid.addWidget(QLabel('Nome:'), 0, 0)
grid.addWidget(QLineEdit(), 0, 1)

grid.addWidget(QLabel('Email:'), 1, 0)
grid.addWidget(QLineEdit(), 1, 1)

grid.addWidget(QLabel('Senha:'), 2, 0)
edit_senha = QLineEdit()
edit_senha.setEchoMode(QLineEdit.EchoMode.Password)
grid.addWidget(edit_senha, 2, 1)

# Exemplo 2: Widget ocupando mГәltiplas colunas (colspan)
# addWidget(widget, row, col, rowspan, colspan)
grid.addWidget(QPushButton('Enviar (colspan=2)'), 3, 0, 1, 2)

# Exemplo 3: Calculadora (grid perfeito)
calc_grid = QGridLayout()
botoes = [
    ['7', '8', '9', '/'],
    ['4', '5', '6', '*'],
    ['1', '2', '3', '-'],
    ['0', '.', '=', '+']
]

for row, linha in enumerate(botoes):
    for col, texto in enumerate(linha):
        btn = QPushButton(texto)
        btn.setFixedSize(60, 40)
        calc_grid.addWidget(btn, row, col)

# Exemplo 4: Layout com espaГ§amento
grid.setSpacing(10)
grid.setContentsMargins(15, 15, 15, 15)

# Exemplo 5: Stretch de colunas
grid.setColumnStretch(1, 1)  # Coluna 1 expande

# Combinar layouts
main = QGridLayout()
main.addLayout(grid, 0, 0)
main.addLayout(calc_grid, 1, 0)

window.setLayout(main)
window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com formulГЎrio em grid)
(Linha 0: Label 'Nome:' | LineEdit)
(Linha 1: Label 'Email:' | LineEdit)
(Linha 2: Label 'Senha:' | LineEdit com senha)
(Linha 3: BotГЈo 'Enviar' ocupando 2 colunas)
(Abaixo: grid de calculadora 4x4)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria caixa de seleГ§ГЈo com estados marcado, desmarcado e parcial
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QCheckBox,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('CheckBox')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: CheckBox bГЎsico
cb1 = QCheckBox('Aceito os termos')
layout.addWidget(cb1)

# Exemplo 2: CheckBox com callback
def on_check(state):
    if state == Qt.CheckState.Checked.value:
        print('Marcado!')
    else:
        print('Desmarcado!')

cb2 = QCheckBox('Com callback')
cb2.stateChanged.connect(on_check)
layout.addWidget(cb2)

# Exemplo 3: CheckBox prГ©-selecionado
cb3 = QCheckBox('PrГ©-marcado')
cb3.setChecked(True)
layout.addWidget(cb3)

# Exemplo 4: CheckBox com trГӘs estados
cb4 = QCheckBox('TrГӘs estados')
cb4.setTristate(True)
cb4.setCheckState(Qt.CheckState.PartiallyChecked)
layout.addWidget(cb4)

# Exemplo 5: CheckBox desabilitado
cb5 = QCheckBox('Desabilitado')
cb5.setEnabled(False)
cb5.setChecked(True)
layout.addWidget(cb5)

# Exemplo 6: CheckBox estilizado
cb6 = QCheckBox('Estilizado')
cb6.setStyleSheet('''
    QCheckBox {
        font-size: 16px;
        spacing: 10px;
    }
    QCheckBox::indicator {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
    }
    QCheckBox::indicator:checked {
        background-color: #e94560;
        border: 2px solid #e94560;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(cb6)

# Exemplo 7: Obter valores
def show_values():
    print(f'cb1: {cb1.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb2: {cb2.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb3: {cb3.isChecked()}')
    print(f'cb4 state: {cb4.checkState()}')

btn = QPushButton('Mostrar Valores')
btn.clicked.connect(show_values)
layout.addWidget(btn)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com checkboxes empilhados)
(cb2: imprime 'Marcado!' ou 'Desmarcado!' ao clicar)
(cb3: jГЎ marcado ao abrir)
(cb4: quadrado parcialmente preenchido)
(cb5: marcado mas cinza, nГЈo clicГЎvel)
(BotГЈo imprime: cb1: False, cb2: False, cb3: True, cb4 state: Qt.CheckState.PartiallyChecked)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botГЈo de opГ§ГЈo para seleГ§ГЈo mutuamente exclusiva
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QRadioButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QGroupBox, QPushButton,
                              QButtonGroup)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('RadioButton')
window.resize(300, 400)
main_layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Radio buttons em grupo visual
group_box1 = QGroupBox('Tamanho')
group_layout1 = QVBoxLayout()

rb1 = QRadioButton('Pequeno')
rb2 = QRadioButton('MГ©dio')
rb3 = QRadioButton('Grande')
rb2.setChecked(True)  # Selecionado por padrГЈo

group_layout1.addWidget(rb1)
group_layout1.addWidget(rb2)
group_layout1.addWidget(rb3)
group_box1.setLayout(group_layout1)
main_layout.addWidget(group_box1)

# Exemplo 2: Segundo grupo independente
group_box2 = QGroupBox('Cor')
group_layout2 = QVBoxLayout()

rb4 = QRadioButton('Vermelho')
rb5 = QRadioButton('Verde')
rb6 = QRadioButton('Azul')
rb4.setChecked(True)

group_layout2.addWidget(rb4)
group_layout2.addWidget(rb5)
group_layout2.addWidget(rb6)
group_box2.setLayout(group_layout2)
main_layout.addWidget(group_box2)

# Exemplo 3: QButtonGroup para controle programГЎtico
bt_group = QButtonGroup()
bt_group.addButton(rb1, 1)  # id = 1
bt_group.addButton(rb2, 2)  # id = 2
bt_group.addButton(rb3, 3)  # id = 3

def on_button_clicked(button):
    print(f'Selecionado: {button.text()} (id={bt_group.id(button)})')

bt_group.buttonClicked.connect(on_button_clicked)

# Exemplo 4: Com callback
rb4.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Vermelho: {checked}') if checked else None)
rb5.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Verde: {checked}') if checked else None)
rb6.toggled.connect(lambda checked: print(f'Azul: {checked}') if checked else None)

# Exemplo 5: Obter seleГ§ГЈo
def show_selection():
    for rb in [rb1, rb2, rb3]:
        if rb.isChecked():
            print(f'Tamanho: {rb.text()}')
    for rb in [rb4, rb5, rb6]:
        if rb.isChecked():
            print(f'Cor: {rb.text()}')
    print(f'Checked ID: {bt_group.checkedId()}')

btn = QPushButton('Mostrar SeleГ§ГЈo')
btn.clicked.connect(show_selection)
main_layout.addWidget(btn)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

(Janela com 2 grupos de radio buttons)
(Grupo 'Tamanho': MГ©dio selecionado por padrГЈo)
(Grupo 'Cor': Vermelho selecionado por padrГЈo)
(Clicar Grande imprime: Selecionado: Grande (id=3))
(Clicar Verde imprime: Verde: True)
(BotГЈo imprime: Tamanho: MГ©dio, Cor: Vermelho, Checked ID: 2)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria dropdown para seleГ§ГЈo de opГ§Гөes em lista suspensa
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QComboBox,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton, QLabel)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ComboBox')
window.resize(350, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: ComboBox bГЎsico
cb1 = QComboBox()
cb1.addItems(['Python', 'Java', 'C++', 'JavaScript', 'Go'])
layout.addWidget(cb1)

# Exemplo 2: ComboBox com itens individuais
cb2 = QComboBox()
cb2.addItem('Selecione...')
cb2.addItem('OpГ§ГЈo A')
cb2.addItem('OpГ§ГЈo B')
cb2.addItem('OpГ§ГЈo C')
layout.addWidget(cb2)

# Exemplo 3: ComboBox com callback
label3 = QLabel('SeleГ§ГЈo: Nenhuma')
layout.addWidget(label3)

cb3 = QComboBox()
cb3.addItems(['SГЈo Paulo', 'Rio de Janeiro', 'Belo Horizonte', 'Curitiba'])
cb3.currentTextChanged.connect(lambda text: label3.setText(f'SeleГ§ГЈo: {text}'))
layout.addWidget(cb3)

# Exemplo 4: ComboBox com Гӯndice
cb4 = QComboBox()
cb4.addItems(['Item 0', 'Item 1', 'Item 2'])
cb4.currentIndexChanged.connect(lambda index: print(f'ГҚndice: {index}'))
cb4.setCurrentIndex(1)  # Selecionar Item 1
layout.addWidget(cb4)

# Exemplo 5: ComboBox editГЎvel
cb5 = QComboBox()
cb5.setEditable(True)
cb5.addItems(['Existente 1', 'Existente 2'])
cb5.setPlaceholderText('Digite ou selecione...')
layout.addWidget(cb5)

# Exemplo 6: ComboBox estilizado
cb6 = QComboBox()
cb6.addItems(['Dark', 'Light', 'System'])
cb6.setStyleSheet('''
    QComboBox {
        background-color: #1a1a2e;
        color: white;
        border: 2px solid #e94560;
        border-radius: 5px;
        padding: 5px 10px;
        font-size: 14px;
    }
    QComboBox::drop-down {
        border: none;
    }
