commands.cmdDescription: Cria controle deslizante para seleГ§ГЈo de valores numГ©ricos
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QSlider,
                              QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Slider')
window.resize(400, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Slider horizontal
slider1 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider1.setMinimum(0)
slider1.setMaximum(100)
slider1.setValue(50)
layout.addWidget(slider1)

# Exemplo 2: Slider com label de valor
label2 = QLabel('Valor: 50')
label2.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter)
layout.addWidget(label2)

slider2 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider2.setRange(0, 100)
slider2.setValue(50)
slider2.valueChanged.connect(lambda v: label2.setText(f'Valor: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(slider2)

# Exemplo 3: Slider com ticks (marcaГ§Гөes)
slider3 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider3.setRange(0, 100)
slider3.setTickPosition(QSlider.TickPosition.TicksBelow)
slider3.setTickInterval(10)
slider3.setSingleStep(5)  # Step com setas
slider3.setPageStep(20)  # Step com Page Up/Down
layout.addWidget(slider3)

# Exemplo 4: Slider vertical
h_layout = QHBoxLayout()

for i in range(3):
    v_slider = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Vertical)
    v_slider.setRange(0, 100)
    v_slider.setValue(30 * (i + 1))
    v_slider.setFixedHeight(150)
    h_layout.addWidget(v_slider)

layout.addLayout(h_layout)

# Exemplo 5: Slider estilizado
slider5 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider5.setRange(0, 100)
slider5.setValue(70)
slider5.setStyleSheet('''
    QSlider::groove:horizontal {
        border: 1px solid #999;
        height: 8px;
        background: #2d3436;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
    QSlider::handle:horizontal {
        background: #e94560;
        border: none;
        width: 20px;
        margin: -6px 0;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }
    QSlider::sub-page:horizontal {
        background: #e94560;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(slider5)

# Exemplo 6: Eventos especГӯficos
slider6 = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider6.setRange(0, 100)
slider6.sliderPressed.connect(lambda: print('Slider pressionado'))
slider6.sliderReleased.connect(lambda: print(f'Solto em: {slider6.value()}'))
slider6.sliderMoved.connect(lambda v: print(f'Movendo: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(slider6)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria barra de progresso com valor determinado ou indeterminado
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QProgressBar,
                              QVBoxLayout, QPushButton)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QTimer

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ProgressBar')
window.resize(400, 300)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: ProgressBar bГЎsica
pb1 = QProgressBar()
pb1.setValue(75)
layout.addWidget(pb1)

# Exemplo 2: ProgressBar com range customizado
pb2 = QProgressBar()
pb2.setRange(0, 1000)
pb2.setValue(450)
pb2.setFormat('%v / %m (%p%)')  # valor / mГЎximo (percentual%)
layout.addWidget(pb2)

# Exemplo 3: ProgressBar indeterminada
pb3 = QProgressBar()
pb3.setRange(0, 0)  # Range 0,0 = indeterminada
layout.addWidget(pb3)

# Exemplo 4: ProgressBar com animaГ§ГЈo via Timer
pb4 = QProgressBar()
pb4.setRange(0, 100)
pb4.setValue(0)
layout.addWidget(pb4)

timer = QTimer()
progress_value = [0]

def update_progress():
    progress_value[0] += 1
    pb4.setValue(progress_value[0])
    if progress_value[0] >= 100:
        timer.stop()
        print('Progresso completo!')

timer.timeout.connect(update_progress)

def start_progress():
    progress_value[0] = 0
    pb4.setValue(0)
    timer.start(50)  # Atualiza a cada 50ms

btn_start = QPushButton('Iniciar Progresso')
btn_start.clicked.connect(start_progress)
layout.addWidget(btn_start)

# Exemplo 5: ProgressBar estilizada
pb5 = QProgressBar()
pb5.setValue(60)
pb5.setStyleSheet('''
    QProgressBar {
        border: 2px solid #2d3436;
        border-radius: 8px;
        text-align: center;
        font-weight: bold;
        background-color: #2d3436;
        color: white;
        height: 25px;
    }
    QProgressBar::chunk {
        background-color: #e94560;
        border-radius: 6px;
    }
''')
layout.addWidget(pb5)

# Exemplo 6: ProgressBar sem texto
pb6 = QProgressBar()
pb6.setValue(40)
pb6.setTextVisible(False)
layout.addWidget(pb6)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria diГЎlogos de mensagem padrГЈo (informaГ§ГЈo, aviso, erro, confirmaГ§ГЈo)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QMessageBox)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('MessageBox')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: InformaГ§ГЈo
def show_info():
    QMessageBox.information(window, 'InformaГ§ГЈo', 'OperaГ§ГЈo concluГӯda com sucesso!')
    print('Info fechada')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('InformaГ§ГЈo', clicked=show_info))

# Exemplo 2: Aviso
def show_warning():
    QMessageBox.warning(window, 'Aviso', 'AtenГ§ГЈo! Dados podem ser perdidos.')
    print('Aviso fechado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Aviso', clicked=show_warning))

# Exemplo 3: Erro
def show_error():
    QMessageBox.critical(window, 'Erro', 'Falha ao conectar com o servidor!')
    print('Erro fechado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Erro', clicked=show_error))

# Exemplo 4: Pergunta com retorno
def show_question():
    reply = QMessageBox.question(
        window,
        'ConfirmaГ§ГЈo',
        'Deseja realmente sair?',
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No,
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.No  # PadrГЈo
    )
    if reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:
        print('UsuГЎrio clicou Sim')
    else:
        print('UsuГЎrio clicou NГЈo')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Pergunta', clicked=show_question))

# Exemplo 5: Pergunta com 3 botГөes
def show_save_question():
    reply = QMessageBox.question(
        window,
        'Salvar',
        'Deseja salvar as alteraГ§Гөes?',
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Save |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Discard |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel
    )
    if reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Save:
        print('Salvar')
    elif reply == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Discard:
        print('Descartar')
    else:
        print('Cancelar')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Salvar/Descartar', clicked=show_save_question))

# Exemplo 6: MessageBox personalizada
def show_custom():
    msg = QMessageBox(window)
    msg.setWindowTitle('Personalizada')
    msg.setText('Mensagem principal aqui.')
    msg.setInformativeText('Texto informativo adicional.')
    msg.setDetailedText('Detalhes tГ©cnicos:\nErro cГіdigo: 42\nMГіdulo: database')
    msg.setIcon(QMessageBox.Icon.Warning)
    msg.setStandardButtons(
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok |
        QMessageBox.StandardButton.Cancel
    )
    msg.setDefaultButton(QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok)
    
    result = msg.exec()
    if result == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Ok:
        print('OK clicado')
    else:
        print('Cancel clicado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Personalizada', clicked=show_custom))

# Exemplo 7: About
def show_about():
    QMessageBox.about(window, 'Sobre', 'Minha App v1.0\n\nDesenvolvido com PyQt6')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Sobre', clicked=show_about))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QFileDialog)

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('FileDialog')
window.resize(400, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

label = QLabel('Nenhum arquivo selecionado')
label.setWordWrap(True)
layout.addWidget(label)

# Exemplo 1: Abrir arquivo Гәnico
def open_file():
    file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(
        window,
        'Abrir Arquivo',
        '',  # DiretГіrio inicial
        'Todos (**);;Python (*.py);;Texto (*.txt);;Imagens (*.png *.jpg)'
    )
    if file_path:
        label.setText(f'Arquivo: {file_path}')
        print(f'Arquivo selecionado: {file_path}')
    else:
        print('Cancelado')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Abrir Arquivo', clicked=open_file))

# Exemplo 2: Abrir mГәltiplos arquivos
def open_files():
    files, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileNames(
        window,
        'Abrir Arquivos',
        '',
        'Todos (**);;Python (*.py)'
    )
    if files:
        label.setText(f'Arquivos: {len(files)} selecionados\n{chr(10).join(files)}')
        print(f'Selecionados: {files}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Abrir MГәltiplos', clicked=open_files))

# Exemplo 3: Salvar arquivo
def save_file():
    file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(
        window,
        'Salvar Arquivo',
        'documento.txt',  # Nome sugerido
        'Texto (*.txt);;Python (*.py);;Todos (*.*)'

    if file_path:
        label.setText(f'Salvar em: {file_path}')
        print(f'Salvar em: {file_path}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Salvar Arquivo', clicked=save_file))

# Exemplo 4: Selecionar diretГіrio
def select_dir():
    dir_path = QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory(
        window,
        'Selecionar Pasta',
        ''  # DiretГіrio inicial
    )
    if dir_path:
        label.setText(f'Pasta: {dir_path}')
        print(f'Pasta: {dir_path}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Selecionar Pasta', clicked=select_dir))

# Exemplo 5: FileDialog personalizado
def custom_dialog():
    dialog = QFileDialog(window)
    dialog.setWindowTitle('Dialog Custom')
    dialog.setFileMode(QFileDialog.FileMode.ExistingFiles)
    dialog.setNameFilter('Imagens (*.png *.jpg *.gif);;Todos (*.*)')
    dialog.setViewMode(QFileDialog.ViewMode.Detail)
    dialog.setDirectory('/home')  # ou 'C:/' no Windows
    
    if dialog.exec():
        files = dialog.selectedFiles()
        label.setText(f'Custom: {files}')
        print(f'Custom: {files}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Dialog Custom', clicked=custom_dialog))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Sistema de comunicaГ§ГЈo entre objetos do PyQt6 (eventos e callbacks)
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QLineEdit, QSlider)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, pyqtSignal, QObject

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Signals & Slots')
window.resize(400, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Signal bГЎsico (clicked)
btn1 = QPushButton('Clique (Signal bГЎsico)')
btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Signal clicked emitido!'))
layout.addWidget(btn1)

# Exemplo 2: Signal com parГўmetro
slider = QSlider(Qt.Orientation.Horizontal)
slider.setRange(0, 100)
label_slider = QLabel('Valor: 0')
slider.valueChanged.connect(lambda v: label_slider.setText(f'Valor: {v}'))
layout.addWidget(label_slider)
layout.addWidget(slider)

# Exemplo 3: Conectar signal a mГәltiplos slots
btn3 = QPushButton('MГәltiplos Slots')
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 1 executado'))
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 2 executado'))
btn3.clicked.connect(lambda: print('Slot 3 executado'))
layout.addWidget(btn3)

# Exemplo 4: Desconectar signal
btn4 = QPushButton('Conectado')
handler = lambda: print('Conectado!')
btn4.clicked.connect(handler)

def toggle_connection():
    try:
        btn4.clicked.disconnect(handler)
        btn4.setText('Desconectado')
        print('Signal desconectado')
    except TypeError:
        btn4.clicked.connect(handler)
        btn4.setText('Conectado')
        print('Signal reconectado')

btn_toggle = QPushButton('Toggle ConexГЈo')
btn_toggle.clicked.connect(toggle_connection)
layout.addWidget(btn4)
layout.addWidget(btn_toggle)

# Exemplo 5: Signal customizado
class Worker(QObject):
    # Definir signals customizados
    started = pyqtSignal()
    progress = pyqtSignal(int)
    finished = pyqtSignal(str)
    error = pyqtSignal(str, int)  # mensagem, cГіdigo
    
    def run(self):
        self.started.emit()
        for i in range(0, 101, 20):
            self.progress.emit(i)
        self.finished.emit('ConcluГӯdo!')

worker = Worker()

label5 = QLabel('Worker: Idle')
layout.addWidget(label5)

worker.started.connect(lambda: label5.setText('Worker: Iniciado'))
worker.progress.connect(lambda v: label5.setText(f'Worker: {v}%'))
worker.finished.connect(lambda msg: label5.setText(f'Worker: {msg}'))
worker.error.connect(lambda msg, code: print(f'Erro: {msg} (cГіdigo {code})'))

btn5 = QPushButton('Executar Worker')
btn5.clicked.connect(worker.run)
layout.addWidget(btn5)

# Exemplo 6: Signal entre widgets
edit6 = QLineEdit()
edit6.setPlaceholderText('Digite e veja abaixo...')
label6 = QLabel('Espelho: ')
edit6.textChanged.connect(lambda t: label6.setText(f'Espelho: {t}'))
layout.addWidget(edit6)
layout.addWidget(label6)

# Exemplo 7: Signal com mГ©todo de classe
class MyWindow(QWidget):
    # Signal customizado
    data_changed = pyqtSignal(dict)
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.data_changed.connect(self.on_data_changed)
    
    def on_data_changed(self, data):
        print(f'Dados alterados: {data}')
    
    def update_data(self):
        self.data_changed.emit({'nome': 'JoГЈo', 'idade': 30})

print('\nSignals mais comuns:')
print('  QPushButton: clicked, pressed, released, toggled')
print('  QLineEdit: textChanged, returnPressed, editingFinished')
print('  QSlider: valueChanged, sliderPressed, sliderReleased')
print('  QCheckBox: stateChanged, toggled')
print('  QComboBox: currentIndexChanged, currentTextChanged')
print('  QSpinBox: valueChanged')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

Signals mais comuns:
  QPushButton: clicked, pressed, released, toggled
  QLineEdit: textChanged, returnPressed, editingFinished
  QSlider: valueChanged, sliderPressed, sliderReleased
  QCheckBox: stateChanged, toggled
  QComboBox: currentIndexChanged, currentTextChanged
  QSpinBox: valueChanged
(Janela com widgets demonstrando signals)
(btn1 clique -> Signal clicked emitido!)
(slider -> label atualiza em tempo real)
(btn3 -> 3 prints em sequГӘncia)
(btn5 -> label muda: Iniciado, 0%, 20%, 40%...100%, ConcluГӯdo!)
(edit6 -> label espelha texto digitado)

commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QTimer, QTime

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('QTimer')
window.resize(300, 400)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Timer repetitivo (relГіgio)
label_clock = QLabel('00:00:00')
label_clock.setStyleSheet('font-size: 32px; font-family: monospace;')
layout.addWidget(label_clock)

timer_clock = QTimer()
timer_clock.timeout.connect(
    lambda: label_clock.setText(QTime.currentTime().toString('HH:mm:ss'))
)
timer_clock.start(1000)  # 1000ms = 1 segundo

# Exemplo 2: Timer com contagem regressiva
label_countdown = QLabel('Contagem: 10')
layout.addWidget(label_countdown)

countdown = [10]
timer_countdown = QTimer()

def update_countdown():
    countdown[0] -= 1
    label_countdown.setText(f'Contagem: {countdown[0]}')
    if countdown[0] <= 0:
        timer_countdown.stop()
        label_countdown.setText('Tempo esgotado!')
        print('Contagem finalizada!')

timer_countdown.timeout.connect(update_countdown)

def start_countdown():
    countdown[0] = 10
    label_countdown.setText('Contagem: 10')
    timer_countdown.start(1000)

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Iniciar Contagem', clicked=start_countdown))

# Exemplo 3: Timer de disparo Гәnico (singleShot)
def delayed_action():
    print('AГ§ГЈo executada apГіs 3 segundos!')
    label_single.setText('AГ§ГЈo executada!')

label_single = QLabel('Esperando...')
layout.addWidget(label_single)

def trigger_single():
    label_single.setText('Aguarde 3s...')
    QTimer.singleShot(3000, delayed_action)  # 3000ms = 3 segundos

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Disparo Гҡnico (3s)', clicked=trigger_single))

# Exemplo 4: Controle de timer (start/stop)
label_counter = QLabel('Contador: 0')
layout.addWidget(label_counter)

counter = [0]
timer_counter = QTimer()
timer_counter.timeout.connect(lambda: (
    counter.__setitem__(0, counter[0] + 1),
    label_counter.setText(f'Contador: {counter[0]}')
))

def toggle_timer():
    if timer_counter.isActive():
        timer_counter.stop()
        btn_toggle.setText('Iniciar')
    else:
        timer_counter.start(100)  # 100ms
        btn_toggle.setText('Parar')

btn_toggle = QPushButton('Iniciar')
btn_toggle.clicked.connect(toggle_timer)
layout.addWidget(btn_toggle)

# Exemplo 5: Timer com intervalo variГЎvel
print('MГ©todos do QTimer:')
print(f'  .start(ms) - Inicia com intervalo em milissegundos')
print(f'  .stop() - Para o timer')
print(f'  .isActive() - Verifica se estГЎ rodando')
print(f'  .setInterval(ms) - Altera intervalo')
print(f'  .setSingleShot(True) - Disparo Гәnico')
print(f'  QTimer.singleShot(ms, callback) - EstГЎtico')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

MГ©todos do QTimer:
  .start(ms) - Inicia com intervalo em milissegundos
  .stop() - Para o timer
  .isActive() - Verifica se estГЎ rodando
  .setInterval(ms) - Altera intervalo
  .setSingleShot(True) - Disparo Гәnico

commands.cmdDescription: Cria painel de abas para organizaГ§ГЈo de conteГәdo em mГәltiplas seГ§Гөes

import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QTabWidget,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QLineEdit,
                              QPushButton, QCheckBox)
from PyQt6.QtGui import QIcon

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('TabWidget')
window.resize(500, 400)
main_layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: TabWidget bГЎsico
tabs = QTabWidget()

# Aba 1 - Geral
tab1 = QWidget()
tab1_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab1)
tab1_layout.addWidget(QLabel('Aba Geral'))
tab1_layout.addWidget(QLineEdit())
tab1_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('BotГЈo na aba 1'))
tabs.addTab(tab1, 'Geral')

# Aba 2 - ConfiguraГ§Гөes
tab2 = QWidget()
tab2_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab2)
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('OpГ§ГЈo 1'))
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('OpГ§ГЈo 2'))
tab2_layout.addWidget(QCheckBox('OpГ§ГЈo 3'))
tabs.addTab(tab2, 'ConfiguraГ§Гөes')

# Aba 3 - Sobre
tab3 = QWidget()
tab3_layout = QVBoxLayout(tab3)
tab3_layout.addWidget(QLabel('App v1.0'))
tab3_layout.addWidget(QLabel('Feito com PyQt6'))
tabs.addTab(tab3, 'Sobre')

# Exemplo 2: Eventos de aba

# Exemplo 3: Abas fechГЎveis
tabs.setTabsClosable(True)
tabs.tabCloseRequested.connect(lambda index: (
    print(f'Fechando aba: {tabs.tabText(index)}'),
    tabs.removeTab(index)
))

# tabs.setTabPosition(QTabWidget.TabPosition.West)   # Esquerda
# tabs.setTabPosition(QTabWidget.TabPosition.East)   # Direita

# Exemplo 5: Controle programГЎtico
def add_new_tab():
    new_tab = QWidget()
    new_layout = QVBoxLayout(new_tab)
    new_layout.addWidget(QLabel(f'Nova aba {tabs.count() + 1}'))
    tabs.addTab(new_tab, f'Aba {tabs.count() + 1}')

# Exemplo 6: Ir para aba especГӯfica

btn_first.clicked.connect(lambda: goto_tab(0))
main_layout.addWidget(btn_first)

print(f'Aba atual: {tabs.currentIndex()}')

commands.cmdDescription: Cria lista de itens selecionГЎveis com suporte a seleГ§ГЈo mГәltipla
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QListWidget,
                              QListWidgetItem, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout,
                              QPushButton, QLineEdit, QLabel)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('ListWidget')
window.resize(400, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Lista bГЎsica
list_widget = QListWidget()
list_widget.addItem('Item 1')
list_widget.addItem('Item 2')
list_widget.addItem('Item 3')
list_widget.addItems(['Item 4', 'Item 5', 'Item 6'])
layout.addWidget(list_widget)

# Exemplo 2: Callback de seleГ§ГЈo
label = QLabel('Selecionado: Nenhum')
layout.addWidget(label)

list_widget.currentItemChanged.connect(
    lambda current, previous: label.setText(f'Selecionado: {current.text() if current else "Nenhum"}')
)

# Exemplo 3: Duplo clique
list_widget.itemDoubleClicked.connect(
    lambda item: print(f'Duplo clique: {item.text()}')
)

# Exemplo 4: Adicionar e remover itens
input_layout = QHBoxLayout()
edit = QLineEdit()
edit.setPlaceholderText('Novo item...')
input_layout.addWidget(edit)

def add_item():
    text = edit.text().strip()
    if text:
        list_widget.addItem(text)
        edit.clear()

def remove_item():
    current = list_widget.currentRow()
    if current >= 0:
        item = list_widget.takeItem(current)
        print(f'Removido: {item.text()}')

input_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Adicionar', clicked=add_item))
layout.addLayout(input_layout)
layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Remover Selecionado', clicked=remove_item))

# Exemplo 5: SeleГ§ГЈo mГәltipla
list_multi = QListWidget()
list_multi.setSelectionMode(QListWidget.SelectionMode.MultiSelection)
list_multi.addItems(['OpГ§ГЈo A', 'OpГ§ГЈo B', 'OpГ§ГЈo C', 'OpГ§ГЈo D'])
list_multi.setMaximumHeight(100)
layout.addWidget(QLabel('SeleГ§ГЈo MГәltipla:'))
layout.addWidget(list_multi)

def show_selected():
    selected = [item.text() for item in list_multi.selectedItems()]
    print(f'Selecionados: {selected}')
    single = list_widget.currentItem()
    print(f'Single: {single.text() if single else "Nenhum"}')
    print(f'Total itens: {list_widget.count()}')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Mostrar SeleГ§ГЈo', clicked=show_selected))

# Exemplo 6: Ordenar e limpar
btn_layout = QHBoxLayout()
btn_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Ordenar', clicked=list_widget.sortItems))
btn_layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Limpar', clicked=list_widget.clear))
layout.addLayout(btn_layout)

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Cria tabela com linhas e colunas para exibiГ§ГЈo e ediГ§ГЈo de dados
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QTableWidget,
                              QTableWidgetItem, QVBoxLayout, QPushButton,
                              QHeaderView)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('TableWidget')
window.resize(600, 500)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

# Exemplo 1: Tabela bГЎsica
table = QTableWidget(5, 4)  # 5 linhas, 4 colunas
table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(['Nome', 'Idade', 'Cidade', 'Email'])

# Popular dados
dados = [
    ['Ana Silva', '28', 'SГЈo Paulo', 'ana@email.com'],
    ['Pedro Costa', '35', 'Rio de Janeiro', 'pedro@email.com'],
    ['Maria Souza', '22', 'Curitiba', 'maria@email.com'],
    ['JoГЈo Lima', '41', 'Recife', 'joao@email.com'],
    ['Julia Santos', '30', 'BH', 'julia@email.com']
]

for row, pessoa in enumerate(dados):
    for col, valor in enumerate(pessoa):
        item = QTableWidgetItem(valor)
        table.setItem(row, col, item)

layout.addWidget(table)

# Exemplo 2: CabeГ§alho ajustГЎvel
table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch)
# Ou por coluna:
# table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(0, QHeaderView.ResizeMode.ResizeToContents)

# Exemplo 3: SeleГ§ГЈo por linha inteira
table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectionBehavior.SelectRows)

# Exemplo 4: CГ©lula somente leitura
item_readonly = QTableWidgetItem('NГЈo editГЎvel')
item_readonly.setFlags(item_readonly.flags() & ~Qt.ItemFlag.ItemIsEditable)
table.setItem(0, 0, item_readonly)

# Exemplo 5: Callback de clique
def on_cell_click(row, col):
    item = table.item(row, col)
    if item:
        print(f'CГ©lula ({row},{col}): {item.text()}')

table.cellClicked.connect(on_cell_click)

# Exemplo 6: Adicionar e remover linhas
def add_row():
    row = table.rowCount()
    table.insertRow(row)
    table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem('Novo'))
    table.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem('0'))
    table.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(''))
    table.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(''))

def remove_row():
    current = table.currentRow()
    if current >= 0:
        table.removeRow(current)

btn_add = QPushButton('Adicionar Linha', clicked=add_row)
btn_remove = QPushButton('Remover Linha', clicked=remove_row)
layout.addWidget(btn_add)
layout.addWidget(btn_remove)

# Exemplo 7: Obter dados
def get_all_data():
    for row in range(table.rowCount()):
        row_data = []
        for col in range(table.columnCount()):
            item = table.item(row, col)
            row_data.append(item.text() if item else '')
        print(f'Linha {row}: {row_data}')
    print(f'Total: {table.rowCount()} linhas, {table.columnCount()} colunas')

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('Obter Dados', clicked=get_all_data))

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())

commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao esquecer de chamar super().__init__() em classes que herdam de QWidget
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QApplication, QWidget, QMainWindow, QPushButton

app = QApplication(sys.argv)

# Exemplo 1: ERRO - esquecer super().__init__()
class WindowErrada(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        # FALTOU: super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle('Vai dar erro')

try:
    w = WindowErrada()
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 1: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - com super().__init__()
class WindowCorreta(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()  # OBRIGATГ“RIO
        self.setWindowTitle('Funciona!')

try:
    w = WindowCorreta()
    print(f'Janela criada: {w.windowTitle()}')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 2: {e}')

# Exemplo 3: ERRO - QApplication nГЈo existe
try:
    # Se QApplication nГЈo foi criada
    # widget = QWidget()
    print('QApplication deve existir antes de criar widgets')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 3: {e}')

# Exemplo 4: ERRO - duas QApplications
try:
    # app2 = QApplication(sys.argv)  # Segunda instГўncia
    print('Apenas uma QApplication permitida')
except RuntimeError as e:
    print(f'Erro 4: {e}')

# Exemplo 5: Causas comuns
print('\nCausas comuns de RuntimeError no PyQt6:')
print('  1. Esquecer super().__init__() em classes herdadas')
print('  2. Criar widget sem QApplication existente')
print('  3. Criar segunda instГўncia de QApplication')
print('  4. Acessar widget destruГӯdo')
print('  5. Thread tentando acessar GUI')
print('\nSoluГ§ГЈo: Sempre chamar super().__init__() no __init__')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Erro 1: super-class __init__() of type WindowErrada was never called
Janela criada: Funciona!
QApplication deve existir antes de criar widgets
Apenas uma QApplication permitida

Causas comuns de RuntimeError no PyQt6:
  1. Esquecer super().__init__() em classes herdadas
  2. Criar widget sem QApplication existente
  3. Criar segunda instГўncia de QApplication
  4. Acessar widget destruГӯdo
  5. Thread tentando acessar GUI

SoluГ§ГЈo: Sempre chamar super().__init__() no __init__

commands.cmdName: Erro: Acessar GUI de Thread secundГЎria
commands.cmdDescription: Ocorre ao tentar modificar widgets fora da thread principal
commands.cmdCode:
import sys
import threading
import time
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QWidget, QPushButton,
                              QVBoxLayout, QLabel, QProgressBar)
from PyQt6.QtCore import QThread, pyqtSignal, QObject, QTimer

app = QApplication(sys.argv)
window = QWidget()
window.setWindowTitle('Threading')
window.resize(400, 300)
layout = QVBoxLayout(window)

label = QLabel('Status: Pronto')
layout.addWidget(label)
progress = QProgressBar()
layout.addWidget(progress)

# Exemplo 1: ERRADO - Modificar GUI da thread
def wrong_thread():
    def task():
        for i in range(101):
            # ERRADO: acessar widget da thread secundГЎria
            try:
                label.setText(f'Progresso: {i}%')  # CRASH!
            except RuntimeError as e:
                print(f'Erro thread: {e}')
                return
            time.sleep(0.05)
    threading.Thread(target=task).start()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('ERRADO (Thread)', clicked=wrong_thread))

# Exemplo 2: CORRETO - QThread com Signals
class Worker(QObject):
    progress_changed = pyqtSignal(int)
    status_changed = pyqtSignal(str)
    finished = pyqtSignal()
    
    def run(self):
        self.status_changed.emit('Processando...')
        for i in range(101):
            self.progress_changed.emit(i)
            time.sleep(0.03)
        self.status_changed.emit('ConcluГӯdo!')
        self.finished.emit()

def correct_thread():
    thread = QThread()
    worker = Worker()
    worker.moveToThread(thread)
    
    thread.started.connect(worker.run)
    worker.progress_changed.connect(progress.setValue)
    worker.status_changed.connect(label.setText)
    worker.finished.connect(thread.quit)
    worker.finished.connect(worker.deleteLater)
    thread.finished.connect(thread.deleteLater)
    
    thread.start()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('CORRETO (QThread)', clicked=correct_thread))

# Exemplo 3: CORRETO - QTimer.singleShot na thread principal
def timer_approach():
    progress.setValue(0)
    step = [0]
    
    def update():
        step[0] += 1
        progress.setValue(step[0])
        label.setText(f'Timer: {step[0]}%')
        if step[0] < 100:
            QTimer.singleShot(30, update)
        else:
            label.setText('Timer concluГӯdo!')
    
    update()

layout.addWidget(QPushButton('CORRETO (QTimer)', clicked=timer_approach))

print('Regras de threading PyQt6:')
print('  1. NUNCA modificar widgets de threads secundГЎrias')
print('  2. Usar QThread + Worker + Signals para tarefas longas')
print('  3. Signals sГЈo thread-safe (entregues na thread do receptor)')
print('  4. QTimer para tarefas curtas periГіdicas')
print('  5. moveToThread() move QObject para outra thread')

window.show()
sys.exit(app.exec())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Regras de threading PyQt6:
  1. NUNCA modificar widgets de threads secundГЎrias
  2. Usar QThread + Worker + Signals para tarefas longas
  3. Signals sГЈo thread-safe (entregues na thread do receptor)
  4. QTimer para tarefas curtas periГіdicas
  5. moveToThread() move QObject para outra thread
(BotГЈo ERRADO: causa RuntimeError ou crash silencioso)
(BotГЈo CORRETO QThread: barra progride suavemente 0-100%)
(BotГЈo CORRETO QTimer: barra progride sem thread separada)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria widget de texto com suporte a markup e formataГ§ГЈo
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class LabelApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Label simples
        lbl1 = Label(text='Texto Simples')
        layout.add_widget(lbl1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Label com tamanho de fonte
        lbl2 = Label(text='Fonte Grande', font_size='32sp')
        layout.add_widget(lbl2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Label com cor
        lbl3 = Label(
            text='Texto Colorido',
            color=(1, 0.2, 0.3, 1)  # RGBA (0-1)
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Label com markup
        lbl4 = Label(
            text='[b]Negrito[/b] [i]ItГЎlico[/i] [color=ff0000]Vermelho[/color]',
            markup=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Label com quebra de linha
        lbl5 = Label(
            text='Texto longo que serГЎ quebrado automaticamente em vГЎrias linhas',
            text_size=(300, None),  # Largura fixa, altura auto
            halign='left',
            valign='top'
        )
        lbl5.bind(texture_size=lbl5.setter('size'))
        layout.add_widget(lbl5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Label com alinhamento
        lbl6 = Label(
            text='Centralizado',
            size_hint=(1, None),
            height=50,
            halign='center',
            valign='middle'
        )
        lbl6.bind(size=lbl6.setter('text_size'))
        layout.add_widget(lbl6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: Label com fundo (usando canvas)
        from kivy.graphics import Color, Rectangle
        lbl7 = Label(text='Com Fundo', size_hint=(1, None), height=50)
        with lbl7.canvas.before:
            Color(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1)  # Azul
            lbl7._bg = Rectangle(pos=lbl7.pos, size=lbl7.size)
        lbl7.bind(pos=lambda inst, val: setattr(inst._bg, 'pos', val))
        lbl7.bind(size=lambda inst, val: setattr(inst._bg, 'size', val))
        layout.add_widget(lbl7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: Label com fonte customizada
        lbl8 = Label(
            text='Fonte Mono',
            font_name='RobotoMono-Regular',  # ou caminho para .ttf
            font_size='18sp'
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl8)
        
        return layout

LabelApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria botГЈo clicГЎvel com texto e eventos de toque
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class ButtonApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: BotГЈo bГЎsico
        btn1 = Button(text='Clique Aqui')
        btn1.bind(on_press=lambda x: print('BotГЈo pressionado!'))
        layout.add_widget(btn1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: BotГЈo com callback
        def on_click(instance):
            print(f'BotГЈo "{instance.text}" clicado!')
            instance.text = 'Clicado!'
        
        btn2 = Button(text='Com Callback')
        btn2.bind(on_press=on_click)
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: BotГЈo com on_release
        btn3 = Button(text='Press & Release')
        btn3.bind(
            on_press=lambda x: print('Pressionou'),
            on_release=lambda x: print('Soltou')
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: BotГЈo com tamanho fixo
        btn4 = Button(
            text='Tamanho Fixo',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(200, 60),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: BotГЈo com cores
        btn5 = Button(
            text='Colorido',
            background_color=(0.9, 0.2, 0.3, 1),  # Vermelho
            color=(1, 1, 1, 1),  # Texto branco
            font_size='20sp',
            bold=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: BotГЈo sem fundo padrГЈo
        btn6 = Button(
            text='Sem Background',
            background_normal='',
            background_color=(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: BotГЈo desabilitado
        btn7 = Button(
            text='Desabilitado',
            disabled=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: BotГЈo que altera label
        self.label = Label(text='Nenhum clique')
        layout.add_widget(self.label)
        
        counter = [0]
        def count_click(instance):
            counter[0] += 1
            self.label.text = f'Cliques: {counter[0]}'
        
        btn8 = Button(text='Contar Cliques')
        btn8.bind(on_press=count_click)
        layout.add_widget(btn8)
        
        return layout

ButtonApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria campo de entrada de texto com suporte a multilinha

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class TextInputApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: TextInput bГЎsico
        ti1 = TextInput(hint_text='Digite seu nome...')
        ti1.size_hint_y = None
        ti1.height = 40
        layout.add_widget(ti1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: TextInput multilinha
        ti2 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Texto multilinha...',
            multiline=True,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=100
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: TextInput de linha Гәnica (Enter confirma)
        ti3 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Linha Гәnica (Enter confirma)',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        ti3.bind(on_text_validate=lambda inst: print(f'Enter: {inst.text}'))
        layout.add_widget(ti3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: TextInput para senha
        ti4 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Senha',
            password=True,
            password_mask='*',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: TextInput somente leitura
        ti5 = TextInput(
            text='Somente leitura',
            readonly=True,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti5)
        
        # Exemplo 6: TextInput com estilo
        ti6 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Estilizado',
            background_color=(0.1, 0.1, 0.2, 1),
            foreground_color=(0, 1, 0.5, 1),
            cursor_color=(1, 0, 0, 1),
            hint_text_color=(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1),
            font_size='18sp',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=45
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti6)
        
        # Exemplo 7: TextInput com filtro numГ©rico
        ti7 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Apenas nГәmeros',
            input_filter='int',  # 'int', 'float', ou callable
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        layout.add_widget(ti7)
        
        # Exemplo 8: TextInput com evento de mudanГ§a
        self.label_count = Label(text='Caracteres: 0', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.label_count)
        
        ti8 = TextInput(
            hint_text='Digite e veja a contagem',
            multiline=False,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40
        )
        ti8.bind(text=lambda inst, val: setattr(
            self.label_count, 'text', f'Caracteres: {len(val)}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(ti8)
        
        # Exemplo 9: Obter e limpar
        def get_and_clear(instance):
            print(f'ti1: "{ti1.text}"')
            print(f'ti4 (senha): "{ti4.text}"')
            print(f'ti7 (nГәmero): "{ti7.text}"')
            ti1.text = ''  # Limpar
        
        btn = Button(text='Obter e Limpar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=get_and_clear)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        return layout

TextInputApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Organiza widgets em linha horizontal ou coluna vertical
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class BoxLayoutApp(App):
    def build(self):
        # Exemplo 1: Layout vertical (padrГЈo)
        root = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Layout horizontal dentro do vertical
        h_layout = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                             size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Esquerda'))
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Centro'))
        h_layout.add_widget(Button(text='Direita'))
        root.add_widget(h_layout)
        
        # Exemplo 3: size_hint para proporГ§Гөes
        h_layout2 = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                              size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='25%', size_hint_x=0.25))
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='50%', size_hint_x=0.50))
        h_layout2.add_widget(Button(text='25%', size_hint_x=0.25))
        root.add_widget(h_layout2)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Tamanho fixo (sem size_hint)
        h_layout3 = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                              size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        h_layout3.add_widget(Button(text='Fixo 100px',
                                     size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        h_layout3.add_widget(Button(text='Expande'))  # Ocupa o resto
        root.add_widget(h_layout3)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Padding e spacing
        padded = BoxLayout(
            orientation='vertical',
            padding=[20, 10, 20, 10],  # left, top, right, bottom
            spacing=15,
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=150
        )
        padded.add_widget(Button(text='Com Padding'))
        padded.add_widget(Button(text='E Spacing'))
        root.add_widget(padded)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Layouts aninhados
        nested = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', spacing=5,
                           size_hint_y=None, height=100)
        
        left_col = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=5)
        left_col.add_widget(Button(text='A1'))
        left_col.add_widget(Button(text='A2'))
        nested.add_widget(left_col)
        
        right_col = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=5)
        right_col.add_widget(Button(text='B1'))
        right_col.add_widget(Button(text='B2'))
        nested.add_widget(right_col)
        
        root.add_widget(nested)
        
        # Exemplo 7: Adicionar e remover widgets
        self.dynamic_layout = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal',
                                        spacing=5, size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        root.add_widget(self.dynamic_layout)
        
        btn_add = Button(text='Adicionar', size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        btn_add.bind(on_press=self.add_widget_dynamic)
        root.add_widget(btn_add)
        
        btn_remove = Button(text='Remover', size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        btn_remove.bind(on_press=self.remove_widget_dynamic)
        root.add_widget(btn_remove)
        
        return root
    
    counter = 0
    def add_widget_dynamic(self, instance):
        self.counter += 1
        self.dynamic_layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'#{self.counter}'))
    
    def remove_widget_dynamic(self, instance):
        children = self.dynamic_layout.children
        if children:
            self.dynamic_layout.remove_widget(children[0])

BoxLayoutApp().run()

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.gridlayout import GridLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput

class GridApp(App):
    def build(self):
        # Exemplo 1: Grid com colunas fixas
        root = GridLayout(cols=2, padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 2: FormulГЎrio com grid
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Nome:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, hint_text='Seu nome'))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Email:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, hint_text='Seu email'))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text='Senha:', size_hint_x=None, width=100))
        root.add_widget(TextInput(multiline=False, password=True))
        
        root.add_widget(Label(text=''))  # EspaГ§ador
        root.add_widget(Button(text='Enviar'))
        
        return root

# Exemplo 3: Calculadora com grid
class CalcApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(cols=4, spacing=5, padding=10)
        
        botoes = [
            '7', '8', '9', '/',
            '4', '5', '6', '*',
            '1', '2', '3', '-',
            'C', '0', '=', '+'
        ]
        
        for texto in botoes:
            btn = Button(
                text=texto,
                font_size='24sp',
                bold=True
            )
            btn.bind(on_press=lambda inst: print(f'Tecla: {inst.text}'))
            layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        return layout

# Exemplo 4: Grid com linhas fixas
class GridRowsApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(rows=3, spacing=5, padding=10)
        for i in range(9):
            layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'Item {i+1}'))
        return layout

# Exemplo 5: Grid com tamanhos mГӯnimos
class GridMinApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = GridLayout(
            cols=3,
            spacing=10,
            padding=10,
            row_default_height=60,
            row_force_default=True,
            col_default_width=120,
            col_force_default=True
        )
        for i in range(9):
            layout.add_widget(Button(text=f'Fixo {i+1}'))
        return layout

CalcApp().run()

commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.floatlayout import FloatLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class FloatApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = FloatLayout()
        
        # Exemplo 1: PosiГ§ГЈo absoluta
        btn1 = Button(
            text='Absoluto (50, 50)',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(150, 50),
            pos=(50, 50)
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: PosiГ§ГЈo relativa com pos_hint
        btn2 = Button(
            text='Centro',
            size_hint=(0.3, 0.1),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'center_y': 0.5}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Cantos
        btn3 = Button(
            text='Topo Direito',
            size_hint=(0.2, 0.08),
            pos_hint={'right': 1, 'top': 1}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn3)
        
        btn4 = Button(
            text='Inferior Esq',
            size_hint=(0.2, 0.08),
            pos_hint={'x': 0, 'y': 0}
        )
        layout.add_widget(btn4)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Label centralizado
        lbl = Label(
            text='FloatLayout',
            font_size='28sp',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(200, 50),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'top': 0.95}
        )
        layout.add_widget(lbl)
        
        # Exemplo 5: BotГЈo que se move
        self.moving_btn = Button(
            text='Me Mova',
            size_hint=(None, None),
            size=(120, 40),
            pos_hint={'center_x': 0.5, 'center_y': 0.3}
        )
        self.moving_btn.bind(on_press=self.move_button)
        layout.add_widget(self.moving_btn)
        
        return layout
    
    def move_button(self, instance):
        import random
        instance.pos_hint = {
            'center_x': random.uniform(0.1, 0.9),
            'center_y': random.uniform(0.1, 0.9)
        }
        print(f'Movido para: {instance.pos_hint}')

FloatApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Gerencia mГәltiplas telas com transiГ§Гөes animadas
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.screenmanager import ScreenManager, Screen
from kivy.uix.screenmanager import SlideTransition, FadeTransition
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class TelaInicio(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Tela Inicial', font_size='28sp'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Ir para ConfiguraГ§Гөes', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.go_config)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        btn2 = Button(text='Ir para Sobre', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn2.bind(on_press=self.go_about)
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        self.add_widget(layout)
    
    def go_config(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = SlideTransition(direction='left')
        self.manager.current = 'config'
    
    def go_about(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = FadeTransition()
        self.manager.current = 'about'

class TelaConfig(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='ConfiguraГ§Гөes', font_size='28sp'))
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='OpГ§Гөes aqui...'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Voltar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.go_back)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        self.add_widget(layout)
    
    def go_back(self, instance):
        self.manager.transition = SlideTransition(direction='right')
        self.manager.current = 'inicio'

class TelaSobre(Screen):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='Sobre', font_size='28sp'))
        layout.add_widget(Label(text='App v1.0\nFeito com Kivy'))
        
        btn = Button(text='Voltar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self.manager, 'current', 'inicio'))
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        self.add_widget(layout)

class ScreenApp(App):
    def build(self):
        sm = ScreenManager()
        sm.add_widget(TelaInicio(name='inicio'))
        sm.add_widget(TelaConfig(name='config'))
        sm.add_widget(TelaSobre(name='about'))
        
        print(f'Telas: {sm.screen_names}')
        print(f'Tela atual: {sm.current}')
        
        return sm

ScreenApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Carrega interface definida em linguagem KV (declarativa) a partir de string
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.properties import StringProperty

# Exemplo 1: KV string bГЎsica
KV = '''
BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: 20
    spacing: 10
    
    Label:
        text: 'Interface em KV Language'
        font_size: '24sp'
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
    
    TextInput:
        id: nome_input
        hint_text: 'Digite seu nome'
        multiline: False
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 40
    
    Button:
        text: 'Saudar'
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
        on_press: resultado.text = f'OlГЎ, {nome_input.text}!'
    
    Label:
        id: resultado
        text: 'Aguardando...'
        font_size: '20sp'
'''

class KVApp(App):
    def build(self):
        return Builder.load_string(KV)

KVApp().run()

# Exemplo 2: KV com classe customizada
KV2 = '''
<MeuWidget>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: 15
    spacing: 10
    
    Label:
        text: root.titulo
        font_size: '22sp'
        color: 0.2, 0.6, 1, 1
    
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: 50
        spacing: 5
        
        Button:
            text: 'BotГЈo 1'
            on_press: root.on_btn(1)
        
        Button:
            text: 'BotГЈo 2'
            on_press: root.on_btn(2)
    
    Label:
        id: status
        text: root.status_text

MeuWidget:
'''

class MeuWidget(BoxLayout):
    titulo = StringProperty('Widget Customizado')
    status_text = StringProperty('Nenhum botГЈo clicado')
    
    def on_btn(self, num):
        self.status_text = f'BotГЈo {num} clicado!'
        print(f'BotГЈo {num} pressionado')

class KV2App(App):
    def build(self):
        return Builder.load_string(KV2)

# === main.py ===
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty

class RootWidget(BoxLayout):
    counter = NumericProperty(0)
    status = StringProperty('Pronto')
    
    def increment(self):
        self.counter += 1
        self.status = f'Contagem: {self.counter}'
        print(f'Contador: {self.counter}')
    
    def reset(self):
        self.counter = 0
        self.status = 'Resetado!'

# Nome da classe App determina nome do arquivo .kv
# MeuApp -> meu.kv (remove 'App', lowercase)
class MeuApp(App):
    def build(self):
        return RootWidget()

MeuApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Propriedades observГЎveis que atualizam automaticamente a interface ao mudar
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.properties import (
    StringProperty, NumericProperty, BooleanProperty,
    ListProperty, DictProperty, ObjectProperty,
    BoundedNumericProperty, OptionProperty, AliasProperty
)

class MyWidget(BoxLayout):
    # Exemplo 1: StringProperty
    nome = StringProperty('Sem nome')
    
    # Exemplo 2: NumericProperty
    contador = NumericProperty(0)
    
    # Exemplo 3: BooleanProperty
    ativo = BooleanProperty(False)
    
    # Exemplo 4: ListProperty
    itens = ListProperty([])
    
    # Exemplo 5: DictProperty
    config = DictProperty({'tema': 'dark', 'font_size': 14})
    
    # Exemplo 6: BoundedNumericProperty (com limites)
    volume = BoundedNumericProperty(50, min=0, max=100)
    
    # Exemplo 7: OptionProperty (valores permitidos)
    modo = OptionProperty('normal', options=['normal', 'turbo', 'eco'])
    
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.orientation = 'vertical'
        self.padding = 10
        self.spacing = 10
        
        self.label = Label(text=f'Nome: {self.nome}')
        self.add_widget(self.label)
        
        self.label_count = Label(text=f'Contador: {self.contador}')
        self.add_widget(self.label_count)
        
        self.label_status = Label(text=f'Ativo: {self.ativo}')
        self.add_widget(self.label_status)
        
        # BotГөes
        btn_name = Button(text='Mudar Nome', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_name.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'nome', 'JoГЈo'))
        self.add_widget(btn_name)
        
        btn_count = Button(text='Incrementar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_count.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'contador', self.contador + 1))
        self.add_widget(btn_count)
        
        btn_toggle = Button(text='Toggle Ativo', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_toggle.bind(on_press=lambda x: setattr(self, 'ativo', not self.ativo))
        self.add_widget(btn_toggle)
        
        # Bind para observar mudanГ§as
        self.bind(nome=self.on_nome_changed)
        self.bind(contador=self.on_contador_changed)
        self.bind(ativo=self.on_ativo_changed)
    
    # Exemplo 8: Callbacks de mudanГ§a
    def on_nome_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label.text = f'Nome: {value}'
        print(f'Nome alterado para: {value}')
    
    def on_contador_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label_count.text = f'Contador: {value}'
        print(f'Contador: {value}')
    
    def on_ativo_changed(self, instance, value):
        self.label_status.text = f'Ativo: {value}'
        print(f'Ativo: {value}')
    
    # Exemplo 9: Callback automГЎtico (on_<property>)
    def on_volume(self, instance, value):
        print(f'Volume: {value}')
    
    def on_modo(self, instance, value):
        print(f'Modo: {value}')

class PropApp(App):
    def build(self):
        widget = MyWidget()
        
        # Exemplo 10: Alterar property externamente
        widget.nome = 'Maria'
        widget.itens.append('item1')
        widget.config['tema'] = 'light'
        widget.volume = 75
        widget.modo = 'turbo'
        
        # Exemplo 11: Erro - valor fora do range
        try:
            widget.volume = 150  # Max Г© 100
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f'Erro: {e}')
        
        # Exemplo 12: Erro - opГ§ГЈo invГЎlida
        try:
            widget.modo = 'invalido'
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f'Erro: {e}')
        
        print(f'\nItens: {widget.itens}')
        print(f'Config: {widget.config}')
        
        return widget

PropApp().run()

Erro: 'invalido' is not allowed for modo

commands.cmdDescription: Desenha formas, cores e grГЎficos no canvas do widget
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.widget import Widget
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.graphics import (
    Color, Rectangle, Ellipse, Line,
    Triangle, RoundedRectangle
)
from kivy.core.window import Window

class DrawWidget(Widget):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.bind(size=self.draw, pos=self.draw)
        self.draw()
    
    def draw(self, *args):
        self.canvas.clear()
        
        with self.canvas:
            # Exemplo 1: RetГўngulo com cor
            Color(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1)  # Azul
            Rectangle(pos=(50, 50), size=(150, 100))
            
            # Exemplo 2: CГӯrculo (Ellipse)
            Color(1, 0.3, 0.3, 1)  # Vermelho
            Ellipse(pos=(250, 50), size=(100, 100))
            
            # Exemplo 3: RetГўngulo arredondado
            Color(0.2, 0.8, 0.4, 1)  # Verde
            RoundedRectangle(
                pos=(400, 50),
                size=(150, 80),
                radius=[15]
            )
            
            # Exemplo 4: Linha
            Color(1, 1, 0, 1)  # Amarelo
            Line(
                points=[50, 200, 200, 300, 350, 200, 500, 300],
                width=3
            )
            
            # Exemplo 5: Linha com cГӯrculo
            Color(1, 0.5, 0, 1)  # Laranja
            Line(circle=(300, 350, 60), width=2)
            
            # Exemplo 6: Linha com retГўngulo
            Color(0.8, 0.2, 0.8, 1)  # Roxo
            Line(rectangle=(50, 300, 150, 80), width=2)
            
            # Exemplo 7: TriГўngulo
            Color(0, 0.8, 0.8, 1)  # Ciano
            Triangle(points=[500, 300, 450, 400, 550, 400])
            
            # Exemplo 8: Cor com transparГӘncia
            Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)  # Branco semi-transparente
            Rectangle(pos=(100, 250), size=(200, 150))

class CanvasApp(App):
    def build(self):
        return DrawWidget()

CanvasApp().run()

# Exemplo 9: Canvas em widget existente (background)
class LabelComFundo(BoxLayout):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.orientation = 'vertical'
        self.padding = 20
        
        from kivy.uix.label import Label
        lbl = Label(text='Com Fundo Customizado', font_size='20sp')
        
        with lbl.canvas.before:
            Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.25, 1)
            self._bg = Rectangle(pos=lbl.pos, size=lbl.size)
        
        lbl.bind(pos=lambda inst, val: setattr(self._bg, 'pos', val))
        lbl.bind(size=lambda inst, val: setattr(self._bg, 'size', val))
        
        self.add_widget(lbl)

# Exemplo 10: Desenho interativo
class PaintWidget(Widget):
    def on_touch_down(self, touch):
        with self.canvas:
            Color(1, 0.3, 0.3, 1)
            d = 30
            Ellipse(pos=(touch.x - d/2, touch.y - d/2), size=(d, d))
            touch.ud['line'] = Line(points=(touch.x, touch.y), width=2)
    
    def on_touch_move(self, touch):
        if 'line' in touch.ud:
            touch.ud['line'].points += [touch.x, touch.y]

commands.cmdDescription: Cria ГЎrea rolГЎvel para conteГәdo que excede o tamanho da tela
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.scrollview import ScrollView
from kivy.uix.gridlayout import GridLayout
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class ScrollApp(App):
    def build(self):
        root = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=5)
        root.add_widget(Label(
            text='ScrollView Demo',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=40,
            font_size='20sp'
        ))
        
        # Exemplo 1: ScrollView vertical
        scroll = ScrollView(
            size_hint=(1, 1),
            do_scroll_x=False,  # Sem scroll horizontal
            do_scroll_y=True    # Scroll vertical
        )
        
        # Layout interno deve ter tamanho fixo
        content = GridLayout(
            cols=1,
            spacing=5,
            size_hint_y=None,
            padding=10
        )
        # IMPORTANTE: altura deve ser calculada
        content.bind(minimum_height=content.setter('height'))
        
        for i in range(50):
            btn = Button(
                text=f'Item {i+1}',
                size_hint_y=None,
                height=50
            )
            btn.bind(on_press=lambda inst: print(f'Clicado: {inst.text}'))
            content.add_widget(btn)
        
        scroll.add_widget(content)
        root.add_widget(scroll)
        
        return root

# Exemplo 2: ScrollView horizontal
class HScrollApp(App):
    def build(self):
        scroll = ScrollView(
            do_scroll_x=True,
            do_scroll_y=False
        )
        
        content = BoxLayout(
            orientation='horizontal',
            spacing=10,
            size_hint_x=None,
            padding=10
        )
        content.bind(minimum_width=content.setter('width'))
        
        for i in range(30):
            btn = Button(
                text=f'Btn {i+1}',
                size_hint_x=None,
                width=120
            )
            content.add_widget(btn)
        
        scroll.add_widget(content)
        return scroll

# Exemplo 3: ScrollView com barra de rolagem
class BarScrollApp(App):
    def build(self):
        scroll = ScrollView(
            bar_width=10,
            bar_color=(0.2, 0.6, 1, 0.8),
            bar_inactive_color=(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.3),
            scroll_type=['bars', 'content'],  # Barra e arraste
            bar_pos_y='right',
            effect_cls='ScrollEffect'  # Sem efeito de overscroll
        )
        
        content = GridLayout(cols=1, size_hint_y=None, spacing=5, padding=10)
        content.bind(minimum_height=content.setter('height'))
        
        for i in range(100):
            content.add_widget(Label(
                text=f'Linha {i+1}: ConteГәdo de exemplo aqui',
                size_hint_y=None,
                height=30
            ))
        
        scroll.add_widget(content)
        return scroll

ScrollApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria janela popup/dialog flutuante sobre o conteГәdo principal
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput

class PopupApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        
        self.result_label = Label(text='Nenhum popup aberto', font_size='18sp')
        layout.add_widget(self.result_label)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Popup de informaГ§ГЈo
        btn1 = Button(text='Popup Info', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn1.bind(on_press=self.show_info)
        layout.add_widget(btn1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Popup de confirmaГ§ГЈo
        btn2 = Button(text='Popup ConfirmaГ§ГЈo', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn2.bind(on_press=self.show_confirm)
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Popup com input
        btn3 = Button(text='Popup Input', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn3.bind(on_press=self.show_input)
        layout.add_widget(btn3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Popup customizado
        btn4 = Button(text='Popup Custom', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn4.bind(on_press=self.show_custom)
        layout.add_widget(btn4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Popup auto-close
        btn5 = Button(text='Popup Auto-Close (2s)', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn5.bind(on_press=self.show_auto_close)
        layout.add_widget(btn5)
        
        return layout
    
    def show_info(self, instance):
        popup = Popup(
            title='InformaГ§ГЈo',
            content=Label(text='OperaГ§ГЈo concluГӯda!'),
            size_hint=(0.7, 0.3)
        )
        popup.open()
    
    def show_confirm(self, instance):
        content = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=10, padding=10)
        content.add_widget(Label(text='Deseja realmente continuar?'))
        
        btn_layout = BoxLayout(spacing=10, size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        popup = Popup(title='ConfirmaГ§ГЈo', content=content, size_hint=(0.7, 0.4))
        
        btn_sim = Button(text='Sim')
        btn_sim.bind(on_press=lambda x: (self.on_confirm(True), popup.dismiss()))
        btn_nao = Button(text='NГЈo')
        btn_nao.bind(on_press=lambda x: (self.on_confirm(False), popup.dismiss()))
        
        btn_layout.add_widget(btn_sim)
        btn_layout.add_widget(btn_nao)
        content.add_widget(btn_layout)
        
        popup.open()
    
    def on_confirm(self, result):
        self.result_label.text = f'Resposta: {"Sim" if result else "NГЈo"}'
        print(f'ConfirmaГ§ГЈo: {result}')
    
    def show_input(self, instance):
        content = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=10, padding=10)
        text_input = TextInput(hint_text='Digite algo...', multiline=False,
                              size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        content.add_widget(text_input)
        
        popup = Popup(title='Entrada', content=content, size_hint=(0.7, 0.35))
        
        btn_ok = Button(text='OK', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_ok.bind(on_press=lambda x: (
            setattr(self.result_label, 'text', f'Digitado: {text_input.text}'),
            popup.dismiss()
        ))
        content.add_widget(btn_ok)
        
        popup.open()
    
    def show_custom(self, instance):
        popup = Popup(
            title='Popup Customizado',
            content=Label(text='Sem fechar clicando fora!'),
            size_hint=(0.8, 0.5),
            auto_dismiss=False,  # NГЈo fechar ao clicar fora
            separator_color=(1, 0.3, 0.3, 1),
            title_color=(1, 0.3, 0.3, 1),
            title_size='20sp'
        )
        
        content = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10)
        content.add_widget(Label(text='Clique no botГЈo para fechar'))
        btn = Button(text='Fechar', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=popup.dismiss)
        content.add_widget(btn)
        popup.content = content
        
        popup.open()
    
    def show_auto_close(self, instance):
        from kivy.clock import Clock
        popup = Popup(
            title='Auto Close',
            content=Label(text='Fechando em 2 segundos...'),
            size_hint=(0.6, 0.3)
        )
        popup.open()
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: popup.dismiss(), 2)

PopupApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Agenda funГ§Гөes para execuГ§ГЈo futura, periГіdica ou na prГіxima frame
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.uix.progressbar import ProgressBar

class ClockApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Clock periГіdico (relГіgio)
        import time
        self.clock_label = Label(
            text=time.strftime('%H:%M:%S'),
            font_size='36sp',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=60
        )
        layout.add_widget(self.clock_label)
        
        Clock.schedule_interval(self.update_clock, 1)  # A cada 1 segundo
        
        # Exemplo 2: Clock com delay Гәnico
        self.delay_label = Label(text='Aguardando...', size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        layout.add_widget(self.delay_label)
        
        btn_delay = Button(text='AГ§ГЈo em 3 segundos', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_delay.bind(on_press=self.start_delay)
        layout.add_widget(btn_delay)
        
        # Exemplo 3: ProgressBar com Clock
        self.progress = ProgressBar(max=100, value=0, size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.progress)
        self.progress_label = Label(text='0%', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.progress_label)
        
        btn_progress = Button(text='Iniciar Progresso', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_progress.bind(on_press=self.start_progress)
        layout.add_widget(btn_progress)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Contagem regressiva
        self.countdown_label = Label(text='10', font_size='48sp')
        layout.add_widget(self.countdown_label)
        self.countdown_value = 10
        
        btn_countdown = Button(text='Iniciar Contagem', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_countdown.bind(on_press=self.start_countdown)
        layout.add_widget(btn_countdown)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Cancelar Clock
        self.timer_event = None
        btn_stop = Button(text='Parar Tudo', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn_stop.bind(on_press=self.stop_all)
        layout.add_widget(btn_stop)
        
        return layout
    
    def update_clock(self, dt):
        import time
        self.clock_label.text = time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')
    
    def start_delay(self, instance):
        self.delay_label.text = 'Aguarde 3s...'
        Clock.schedule_once(self.on_delay_done, 3)  # Disparo Гәnico
    
    def on_delay_done(self, dt):
        self.delay_label.text = 'AГ§ГЈo executada!'
        print('Delay de 3s concluГӯdo!')
    
    def start_progress(self, instance):
        self.progress.value = 0
        self.progress_event = Clock.schedule_interval(self.update_progress, 0.05)
    
    def update_progress(self, dt):
        self.progress.value += 1
        self.progress_label.text = f'{int(self.progress.value)}%'
        if self.progress.value >= 100:
            self.progress_event.cancel()  # Cancelar evento
            self.progress_label.text = 'ConcluГӯdo!'
            print('Progresso completo!')
    
    def start_countdown(self, instance):
        self.countdown_value = 10
        self.countdown_label.text = '10'
        self.timer_event = Clock.schedule_interval(self.update_countdown, 1)
    
    def update_countdown(self, dt):
        self.countdown_value -= 1
        self.countdown_label.text = str(self.countdown_value)
        if self.countdown_value <= 0:
            self.timer_event.cancel()
            self.countdown_label.text = 'FIM!'
            print('Contagem finalizada!')
    
    def stop_all(self, instance):
        Clock.unschedule(self.update_clock)
        if self.timer_event:
            self.timer_event.cancel()
        print('Todos os timers parados!')
        
        # MГ©todos do Clock:
        print('\nClock API:')
        print('  schedule_interval(func, interval) - Repetitivo')
        print('  schedule_once(func, delay) - Disparo Гәnico')
        print('  unschedule(func) - Cancelar por funГ§ГЈo')
        print('  event.cancel() - Cancelar evento retornado')
        print('  create_trigger(func) - Criar trigger reutilizГЎvel')

ClockApp().run()

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.image import Image, AsyncImage
from kivy.uix.button import Button
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class ImageApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=10, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Image de arquivo local
        # img1 = Image(source='logo.png')
        # layout.add_widget(img1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Image com propriedades
        # img2 = Image(
        #     source='photo.jpg',
        #     allow_stretch=True,  # Permitir esticar
        #     keep_ratio=True,     # Manter proporГ§ГЈo
        #     size_hint_y=None,
        #     height=200
        # )
        # layout.add_widget(img2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: AsyncImage (carrega de URL)
        img3 = AsyncImage(
            source='https://picsum.photos/400/200',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=200,
            allow_stretch=True,
            keep_ratio=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(img3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: AsyncImage com placeholder
        img4 = AsyncImage(
            source='https://picsum.photos/400/150',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=150,
            allow_stretch=True
        )
        # img4.anim_delay = 0.05  # Velocidade de animaГ§ГЈo GIF
        layout.add_widget(img4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Trocar imagem em runtime
        self.dynamic_img = AsyncImage(
            source='https://picsum.photos/300/150',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=150,
            allow_stretch=True
        )
        layout.add_widget(self.dynamic_img)
        
        btn = Button(text='Nova Imagem', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.change_image)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Propriedades da imagem
        layout.add_widget(Label(
            text='Propriedades: source, allow_stretch,\nkeep_ratio, anim_delay, nocache',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        ))
        
        # Exemplo 7: Image sem cache
        img7 = AsyncImage(
            source='https://picsum.photos/200/100',
            nocache=True,  # Recarregar sempre
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=100
        )
        layout.add_widget(img7)
        
        return layout
    
    counter = 0
    def change_image(self, instance):
        self.counter += 1
        self.dynamic_img.source = f'https://picsum.photos/300/150?random={self.counter}'
        print(f'Imagem alterada: {self.dynamic_img.source}')

ImageApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria controle deslizante horizontal ou vertical para seleГ§ГЈo de valores
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.slider import Slider
from kivy.uix.label import Label
from kivy.uix.button import Button

class SliderApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=10)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Slider bГЎsico
        slider1 = Slider(min=0, max=100, value=50)
        layout.add_widget(slider1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Slider com label de valor
        self.label2 = Label(text='Valor: 50', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.label2)
        
        slider2 = Slider(min=0, max=100, value=50, step=1)
        slider2.bind(value=lambda inst, val: setattr(
            self.label2, 'text', f'Valor: {int(val)}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(slider2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Slider com step (incremento)
        self.label3 = Label(text='Step: 0', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.label3)
        
        slider3 = Slider(min=0, max=100, value=0, step=10)
        slider3.bind(value=lambda inst, val: setattr(
            self.label3, 'text', f'Step: {int(val)}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(slider3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Slider com cores
        slider4 = Slider(
            min=0, max=255, value=128,
            cursor_size=(30, 30),
            value_track=True,
            value_track_color=(1, 0.3, 0.3, 1),  # Trilha preenchida vermelha
            value_track_width='4dp'
        )
        layout.add_widget(slider4)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Slider vertical
        h_layout = BoxLayout(orientation='horizontal', size_hint_y=None, height=200)
        
        for i in range(3):
            v_slider = Slider(
                orientation='vertical',
                min=0, max=100,
                value=30 * (i + 1),
                value_track=True,
                value_track_color=(0.2, 0.6, 1, 1)
            )
            h_layout.add_widget(v_slider)
        
        layout.add_widget(h_layout)
        
        # Exemplo 6: Slider controlando propriedade
        self.target_label = Label(
            text='RGB',
            font_size='24sp',
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=60
        )
        layout.add_widget(self.target_label)
        
        self.r_slider = Slider(min=0, max=1, value=0.5, step=0.01, size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        self.g_slider = Slider(min=0, max=1, value=0.5, step=0.01, size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        self.b_slider = Slider(min=0, max=1, value=0.5, step=0.01, size_hint_y=None, height=40)
        
        for s in [self.r_slider, self.g_slider, self.b_slider]:
            s.bind(value=self.update_color)
            layout.add_widget(s)
        
        return layout
    
    def update_color(self, instance, value):
        r = self.r_slider.value
        g = self.g_slider.value
        b = self.b_slider.value
        self.target_label.color = (r, g, b, 1)
        self.target_label.text = f'RGB({r:.2f}, {g:.2f}, {b:.2f})'

SliderApp().run()

commands.cmdDescription: Cria dropdown/seletor de opГ§Гөes (equivalente a ComboBox)
commands.cmdCode:
from kivy.app import App
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.spinner import Spinner
from kivy.uix.label import Label

class SpinnerApp(App):
    def build(self):
        layout = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', padding=20, spacing=15)
        
        # Exemplo 1: Spinner bГЎsico
        spinner1 = Spinner(
            text='Selecione...',
            values=('Python', 'Java', 'C++', 'JavaScript', 'Go', 'Rust'),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        )
        layout.add_widget(spinner1)
        
        # Exemplo 2: Spinner com callback
        self.label2 = Label(text='SeleГ§ГЈo: Nenhuma', size_hint_y=None, height=30)
        layout.add_widget(self.label2)
        
        spinner2 = Spinner(
            text='Cidade',
            values=('SГЈo Paulo', 'Rio de Janeiro', 'Curitiba', 'BH', 'Recife'),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        )
        spinner2.bind(text=lambda inst, val: setattr(
            self.label2, 'text', f'SeleГ§ГЈo: {val}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(spinner2)
        
        # Exemplo 3: Spinner estilizado
        spinner3 = Spinner(
            text='Tema',
            values=('Dark', 'Light', 'System'),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50,
            background_color=(0.9, 0.2, 0.3, 1),
            color=(1, 1, 1, 1),
            font_size='18sp',
            bold=True
        )
        spinner3.bind(text=lambda inst, val: print(f'Tema: {val}'))
        layout.add_widget(spinner3)
        
        # Exemplo 4: Spinner com valores dinГўmicos
        self.dynamic_spinner = Spinner(
            text='DinГўmico',
            values=('Item 1', 'Item 2', 'Item 3'),
            size_hint_y=None,
            height=50
        )
        layout.add_widget(self.dynamic_spinner)
        
        from kivy.uix.button import Button
        btn = Button(text='Adicionar Item', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn.bind(on_press=self.add_item)
        layout.add_widget(btn)
        
        # Exemplo 5: Obter valor
        btn2 = Button(text='Mostrar Valores', size_hint_y=None, height=50)
        btn2.bind(on_press=lambda x: print(
            f'Spinner1: {spinner1.text}\n'
            f'Spinner2: {spinner2.text}\n'
            f'Spinner3: {spinner3.text}\n'
            f'Dynamic: {self.dynamic_spinner.text}\n'
            f'OpГ§Гөes dynamic: {self.dynamic_spinner.values}'
        ))
        layout.add_widget(btn2)
        
        return layout
    
    counter = 3
    def add_item(self, instance):
        self.counter += 1
        current = list(self.dynamic_spinner.values)
        current.append(f'Item {self.counter}')
        self.dynamic_spinner.values = tuple(current)
        print(f'Adicionado: Item {self.counter}')

SpinnerApp().run()
