commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo do WebSocket sГӯncrono para iniciar e manter a conexГЈo ativa indefinidamente. Libcurl processa pings/pongs automaticamente. Bloqueante atГ© a conexГЈo ser fechada.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Session, WebSocket

cont = {'msgs': 0}

def on_msg(ws, msg):
    cont['msgs'] += 1
    print('MSG:', msg[:50])
    if cont['msgs'] >= 3:
        ws.close()  # fechar apos 3 mensagens

# Exemplo 1: run_forever com close automatico
with Session() as session:
    ws = session.ws_connect(
        'wss://api.gemini.com/v1/marketdata/BTCUSD',
        on_message=on_msg
    )
    ws.run_forever()
print('Total msgs:', cont['msgs'])

# Exemplo 2: run_forever com impersonacao
with Session(impersonate='chrome') as session:
    ws = session.ws_connect(
        'wss://ws.exemplo.com/stream',
        on_message=lambda ws, msg: print(msg)
    )
    ws.run_forever()

from curl_cffi import Session
import json

# Exemplo 1: Enviar texto
def on_msg(ws, msg):
    print('Echo recebido:', msg)
    ws.close()

with Session() as session:
    ws = session.ws_connect(
        'wss://echo.websocket.org',
        on_message=on_msg,
        on_open=lambda ws: ws.send('Hello World!')
    )
    ws.run_forever()

# Exemplo 2: Enviar JSON serializado
def ao_abrir(ws):
    payload = json.dumps({'action': 'subscribe', 'channel': 'tickers'})
    ws.send(payload)

with Session() as session:
    ws = session.ws_connect(
        'wss://api.exemplo.com/ws',
        on_open=ao_abrir,
        on_message=lambda ws, msg: print(msg)
    )
    ws.run_forever()

commands.cmdDescription: Classe WebSocket assГӯncrona retornada por AsyncSession.ws_connect(). Suporta async for para iteraГ§ГЈo, send_str() e send_bytes() para envio, e close() para encerrar a conexГЈo.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
from curl_cffi import AsyncSession

# Exemplo 1: AsyncWebSocket com async for
async def ws_async():
    async with AsyncSession() as session:
        async with session.ws_connect('wss://echo.websocket.org') as ws:
            await ws.send_str('Hello!')
            async for msg in ws:
                print('Resposta:', msg)
                break  # sair apos 1 mensagem

asyncio.run(ws_async())

# Exemplo 2: Enviar multiplas mensagens simultaneamente
async def ws_multi():
    async with AsyncSession() as session:
        async with session.ws_connect('wss://echo.websocket.org') as ws:
            await asyncio.gather(
                *[ws.send_str(f'Msg {i}') for i in range(5)]
            )
            count = 0
            async for msg in ws:
                print(msg)
                count += 1
                if count >= 5:
                    break

asyncio.run(ws_multi())

# Exemplo 3: Enviar bytes
async def ws_bytes():
    async with AsyncSession() as session:
        async with session.ws_connect('wss://ws.exemplo.com') as ws:
            await ws.send_bytes(b'\x00\x01\x02\x03')
            async for msg in ws:
                print('Bytes recebidos:', msg)
                break

asyncio.run(ws_bytes())

b'Msg 0'

b'Msg 3'

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo de Session e AsyncSession para estabelecer uma conexГЈo WebSocket. Retorna WebSocket (sync) ou AsyncWebSocket (async). Aceita todos os parГўmetros comuns como headers, cookies, proxies, timeout, impersonate.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
from curl_cffi import Session, AsyncSession

# Exemplo 1: ws_connect sincrono
with Session() as s:
    ws = s.ws_connect(
        'wss://api.gemini.com/v1/marketdata/BTCUSD',
        on_message=lambda ws, msg: print(msg[:40])
    )
    ws.run_forever()

# Exemplo 2: ws_connect async (context manager)
async def ws_async():
    async with AsyncSession() as s:
        async with s.ws_connect('wss://echo.websocket.org') as ws:
            await ws.send_str('Ola!')
            async for msg in ws:
                print('Eco:', msg)
                break

asyncio.run(ws_async())

# Exemplo 3: ws_connect com parametros extras
async def ws_params():
    async with AsyncSession(impersonate='chrome') as s:
        async with s.ws_connect(
            'wss://ws.exemplo.com/stream',
            headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer token'},
            params={'v': '2'},
            timeout=30
        ) as ws:
            async for msg in ws:
                print(msg)
                break

asyncio.run(ws_params())

b'{"type":"update","product_id":"BTC...'

Eco: b'Ola!'

b'{"evento": "dados", ...}'

commands.cmdDescription: Classe de baixo nГӯvel que encapsula um handle libcurl (curl_easy_*). Oferece controle completo via setopt/getinfo. Ideal quando a API requests de alto nГӯvel nГЈo Г© suficiente.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from io import BytesIO

# Exemplo 1: Requisicao basica com Curl
buffer = BytesIO()
c = Curl()
c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer)
c.perform()
c.close()
print(buffer.getvalue().decode())

# Exemplo 2: Curl com impersonacao de navegador

c = Curl()
c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://tls.browserleaks.com/json')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer)
c.impersonate('chrome124')
c.perform()
c.close()
print(buffer.getvalue().decode())

# Exemplo 3: Curl com header customizado

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo de baixo nГӯvel para configurar opГ§Гөes do libcurl via enum CurlOpt. Equivalente ao curl_easy_setopt(). Usado para configurar URL, callbacks, headers, proxies, timeouts, SSL e muito mais.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from io import BytesIO

buffer = BytesIO()
c = Curl()

# Opcoes basicas de requisicao
c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer)
c.setopt(CurlOpt.FOLLOWLOCATION, 1)   # seguir redirects
c.setopt(CurlOpt.MAXREDIRS, 5)        # limite de redirects
c.setopt(CurlOpt.TIMEOUT, 30)         # timeout total
c.setopt(CurlOpt.CONNECTTIMEOUT, 10)  # timeout de conexao

# Proxy
c.setopt(CurlOpt.PROXY, b'http://proxy.exemplo.com:3128')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.PROXYUSERPWD, b'usuario:senha')

# SSL
c.setopt(CurlOpt.SSL_VERIFYPEER, 0)
c.setopt(CurlOpt.SSL_VERIFYHOST, 0)

# HTTP version
c.setopt(CurlOpt.HTTP_VERSION, 2)  # forcar HTTP/2

c.perform()
c.close()
print(buffer.getvalue()[:80])

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo de baixo nГӯvel para obter informaГ§Гөes sobre a requisiГ§ГЈo apГіs curl.perform(). Equivalente ao curl_easy_getinfo(). Usa CurlInfo como enum de opГ§Гөes.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt, CurlInfo
from io import BytesIO

buffer = BytesIO()
c = Curl()
c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer)
c.perform()

# Informacoes disponiveis apos perform()
status = c.getinfo(CurlInfo.RESPONSE_CODE)
tempo = c.getinfo(CurlInfo.TOTAL_TIME)
ip = c.getinfo(CurlInfo.PRIMARY_IP)
url_final = c.getinfo(CurlInfo.EFFECTIVE_URL)
tamanho = c.getinfo(CurlInfo.SIZE_DOWNLOAD)

print('Status:', status)
print('Tempo total:', tempo)
print('IP do servidor:', ip)
print('URL efetiva:', url_final)
print('Bytes baixados:', tamanho)

c.close()

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo de baixo nГӯvel para executar a requisiГ§ГЈo curl com todas as opГ§Гөes configuradas via setopt. Equivalente ao curl_easy_perform(). LanГ§a CurlError em caso de falha.

from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from curl_cffi.curl import CurlError
from io import BytesIO

# Exemplo 1: perform() com sucesso

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo para resetar todas as opГ§Гөes de um handle Curl para os valores padrГЈo. Equivalente ao curl_easy_reset(). Permite reutilizar o handle para uma nova requisiГ§ГЈo.

from io import BytesIO

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo para fechar e liberar os recursos de um handle Curl. Deve sempre ser chamado apГіs o uso para evitar memory leak. Use try/finally para garantir o fechamento.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from io import BytesIO

# Exemplo 1: Fechar manualmente apos uso
buffer = BytesIO()
c = Curl()
c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer)
c.perform()
c.close()  # liberar recursos
print('Curl encerrado com sucesso.')

# Exemplo 2: Garantir close com try/finally
buffer2 = BytesIO()
c2 = Curl()
try:
    c2.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/ip')
    c2.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buffer2)
    c2.perform()
    print(buffer2.getvalue())
finally:
    c2.close()  # sempre executado

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo para duplicar um handle Curl existente. Equivalente ao curl_easy_duphandle(). Headers e buffers Python precisam ser reconfigurados no clone.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from io import BytesIO

# Configurar handle base com opcoes comuns
c_base = Curl()
c_base.setopt(CurlOpt.FOLLOWLOCATION, 1)
c_base.setopt(CurlOpt.TIMEOUT, 30)
c_base.impersonate('chrome')

# Duplicar o handle (herda configs C-level)
c_clone = c_base.duphandle()

# Configurar URL e buffer no clone (nao herdados)
buf = BytesIO()
c_clone.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c_clone.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buf)
c_clone.perform()
c_clone.close()

c_base.close()
print(buf.getvalue()[:50])

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro nas funГ§Гөes de alto nГӯvel (requests/Session) para passar opГ§Гөes CurlOpt diretamente sem usar a API Curl. Aplicado apГіs todas as configuraГ§Гөes internas, evitando sobrescrita.

from curl_cffi import requests, CurlOpt

)

with Session(impersonate='chrome') as s:

            CurlOpt.CONNECTTIMEOUT: 5
        }
    )

# Exemplo 3: HTTP2 settings frame customizado

    'https://tls.browserleaks.com/json',
    impersonate='chrome',
    curl_options={

)

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro para descartar os cookies retornados em uma requisiГ§ГЈo especГӯfica, sem armazenГЎ-los na Session. Гҡtil para ignorar cookies de rotas especГӯficas.

import asyncio
from curl_cffi import AsyncSession

async def main():
    async with AsyncSession() as s:

        async with s.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/5') as r:

        async with s.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/3') as r:

c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/get')
c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buf)
c.perform()

# Consultar informacoes da requisicao
print('Status:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.RESPONSE_CODE))
print('Tempo total:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.TOTAL_TIME))
print('Tempo connect:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.CONNECT_TIME))
print('Tempo DNS:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.NAMELOOKUP_TIME))
print('IP servidor:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.PRIMARY_IP))
print('URL final:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.EFFECTIVE_URL))
print('Bytes baixados:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.SIZE_DOWNLOAD))
print('Velocidade:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.SPEED_DOWNLOAD))
print('HTTP version:', c.getinfo(CurlInfo.HTTP_VERSION))

c.close()

commands.cmdDescription: Enum com versГөes do protocolo HTTP para uso no parГўmetro http_version=. Valores: v1, v1_1, v2, v2_prior_knowledge (sem upgrade), v3, v3only.

commands.cmdDescription: ExceГ§ГЈo de baixo nГӯvel lanГ§ada pela API Curl quando o libcurl retorna um erro (como host invГЎlido, timeout, falha SSL). ContГ©m cГіdigo de erro e mensagem do libcurl.
commands.cmdCode:
from curl_cffi import Curl, CurlOpt
from curl_cffi.curl import CurlError
from io import BytesIO

# Exemplo 1: Host nao resolvido
buf = BytesIO()
c = Curl()
try:
    c.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://host-invalido.nao-existe.xyz')
    c.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buf)
    c.perform()
except CurlError as e:
    print('CurlError code:', e.code)
    print('CurlError msg:', str(e))
finally:
    c.close()

# Exemplo 2: Timeout
buf2 = BytesIO()
c2 = Curl()
try:
    c2.setopt(CurlOpt.URL, b'https://httpbin.org/delay/10')
    c2.setopt(CurlOpt.WRITEDATA, buf2)
    c2.setopt(CurlOpt.TIMEOUT, 2)
    c2.perform()
except CurlError as e:
    print('Timeout CurlError:', e)
finally:
    c2.close()

CurlError msg: Could not resolve host: host-invalido.nao-existe.xyz

commands.cmdDescription: Cria um contexto de streaming para requisiГ§Гөes sГӯncronas. Permite ler o corpo da resposta em chunks sem carregar tudo na memГіria.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Streaming bГЎsico de bytes
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/3') as response:
    for chunk in response.iter_bytes():
        print(chunk.decode(), end='')

# Exemplo 2: Streaming de texto
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/2') as response:
    for text in response.iter_text():
        print(text, end='')

# Exemplo 3: Streaming linha por linha
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/2') as response:
    for line in response.iter_lines():
        print(line)

# Exemplo 4: Streaming com POST
with httpx.stream('POST', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/2', json={'stream': True}) as response:
    for line in response.iter_lines():
        print(line)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria um cliente HTTP sГӯncrono persistente com connection pooling. Reutiliza conexГөes TCP entre mГәltiplas requisiГ§Гөes, sendo mais eficiente que as funГ§Гөes de mГіdulo.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Cliente bГЎsico com context manager
with httpx.Client() as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(response.status_code)

# Exemplo 2: Cliente com base_url
with httpx.Client(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
    response = client.get('/get')
    print(response.url)

# Exemplo 3: Cliente com headers padrГЈo
with httpx.Client(headers={'X-Api-Key': 'abc123'}) as client:
    r1 = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    r2 = client.post('https://httpbin.org/post')
    print(r1.json()['headers']['X-Api-Key'])

# Exemplo 4: Cliente com timeout global
with httpx.Client(timeout=30.0) as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/2')
    print(response.status_code)

# Exemplo 5: Cliente com cookies persistentes
with httpx.Client(cookies={'session_id': 'xyz789'}) as client:
    r1 = client.get('https://httpbin.org/cookies')
    print(r1.json()['cookies'])

# Exemplo 6: Cliente com autenticaГ§ГЈo
with httpx.Client(auth=('user', 'pass')) as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/basic-auth/user/pass')
    print(response.status_code)

# Exemplo 7: Cliente com HTTP/2
with httpx.Client(http2=True) as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(response.http_version)

# Exemplo 8: Cliente com proxy
with httpx.Client(proxy='http://localhost:8080') as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(response.status_code)

# Exemplo 9: Cliente sem verificaГ§ГЈo SSL
with httpx.Client(verify=False) as client:
    response = client.get('https://self-signed.badssl.com/')
    print(response.status_code)

# Exemplo 10: Cliente com limits personalizados
with httpx.Client(
    limits=httpx.Limits(max_connections=100, max_keepalive_connections=20)
) as client:
    response = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(response.status_code)

commands.cmdDescription: Envia um objeto Request prГ©-construГӯdo atravГ©s do cliente. Permite separar a construГ§ГЈo da requisiГ§ГЈo do envio.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

with httpx.Client(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
    # Construir e enviar
    request = client.build_request('GET', '/get', params={'q': 'teste'})
    response = client.send(request)
    print(response.url)
    print(response.status_code)

    # Construir, modificar e enviar
    request = client.build_request('POST', '/post', json={'key': 'value'})
    request.headers['X-Custom'] = 'added-later'
    response = client.send(request)
    print(response.json()['headers']['X-Custom'])

    # Enviar com timeout diferente
    request = client.build_request('GET', '/delay/1')
    response = client.send(request, timeout=10.0)
    print(response.status_code)

    # Enviar com follow_redirects override
    request = client.build_request('GET', '/redirect/1')
    response = client.send(request, follow_redirects=False)
    print(response.status_code)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria um cliente HTTP assГӯncrono persistente. Todos os mГ©todos (get, post, etc.) sГЈo coroutines que devem ser usados com await.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    # Exemplo 1: AsyncClient bГЎsico
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(response.status_code)

    # Exemplo 2: Com base_url
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
        response = await client.get('/get')
        print(response.url)

    # Exemplo 3: RequisiГ§Гөes paralelas
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        tarefas = [
            client.get(f'https://httpbin.org/delay/{i}')
            for i in range(3)
        ]
        respostas = await asyncio.gather(*tarefas)
        for r in respostas:
            print(r.status_code)

    # Exemplo 4: Com headers e auth
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(
        headers={'X-App': 'MyApp'},
        auth=('user', 'pass')
    ) as client:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/basic-auth/user/pass')
        print(response.status_code)

    # Exemplo 5: Com HTTP/2
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(http2=True) as client:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(response.http_version)

    # Exemplo 6: Com timeout
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1')
        print(response.status_code)

    # Exemplo 7: Com proxy
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(proxy='http://localhost:8080') as client:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(response.status_code)

asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

200

https://httpbin.org/get

200
200
200

200

HTTP/2

200

200

commands.cmdDescription: Fecha o cliente assГӯncrono manualmente. Deve ser usado com await quando nГЈo se utiliza o context manager.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    # Exemplo 1: Fechamento manual assГӯncrono
    client = httpx.AsyncClient()
    try:
        response = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(response.status_code)
    finally:
        await client.aclose()
    print('Cliente assincrono fechado')

    # Exemplo 2: Verificar estado
    client = httpx.AsyncClient()
    print('Aberto:', client.is_closed)
    await client.aclose()
    print('Fechado:', client.is_closed)

asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

200
Cliente assincrono fechado
Aberto: False
Fechado: True

import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Iterar bytes em streaming
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/3') as response:
    for chunk in response.iter_bytes():
        print(f'Chunk: {len(chunk)} bytes')

# Exemplo 2: Com tamanho de chunk personalizado
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/2') as response:
    for chunk in response.iter_bytes(chunk_size=64):
        print(f'{len(chunk)} bytes: {chunk[:40]}...')

# Exemplo 3: Baixar arquivo grande em chunks
with httpx.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/image/png') as response:
    total = 0
    with open('download.png', 'wb') as f:
        for chunk in response.iter_bytes():
            f.write(chunk)
            total += len(chunk)
    print(f'Total baixado: {total} bytes')

commands.cmdDescription: Classe que representa uma requisiГ§ГЈo HTTP prГ©-construГӯda. Pode ser inspecionada, modificada e enviada via client.send().

commands.cmdDescription: Classe base abstrata para criar autenticaГ§Гөes customizadas. Deve implementar auth_flow() como generator assГӯncrono.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

class TokenRefreshAuth(httpx.Auth):
    def __init__(self, token):
        self.token = token

    def auth_flow(self, request):
        request.headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {self.token}'
        yield request

# Usar autenticaГ§ГЈo customizada
auth = TokenRefreshAuth('custom-token-xyz')
with httpx.Client(auth=auth) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/bearer')
    print('Custom auth status:', r.status_code)

# Verificar header enviado
class HeaderInspectAuth(httpx.Auth):
    def auth_flow(self, request):
        request.headers['X-Custom-Auth'] = 'my-scheme credenciais'
        yield request

with httpx.Client(auth=HeaderInspectAuth()) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print('Custom header:', r.json()['headers']['X-Custom-Auth'])
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Custom auth status: 200
Custom header: my-scheme credenciais

commands.cmdDescription: Classe para configurar timeouts granulares por tipo de operaГ§ГЈo: connect, read, write, pool e overall.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Timeout Гәnico para tudo
timeout = httpx.Timeout(10.0)
with httpx.Client(timeout=timeout) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print('Simple timeout:', r.status_code)

# Exemplo 2: Timeout granular
timeout = httpx.Timeout(
    connect=5.0,
    read=10.0,
    write=5.0,
    pool=5.0
)
with httpx.Client(timeout=timeout) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print('Granular timeout:', r.status_code)

# Exemplo 3: Timeout com valor None (sem limite)
timeout = httpx.Timeout(connect=5.0, read=None, write=5.0)
print('Read sem limite:', timeout.read)

# Exemplo 4: Timeout apenas para connect
timeout = httpx.Timeout(5.0, connect=2.0)
print('Connect:', timeout.connect)
print('Read:', timeout.read)

# Exemplo 5: TimeoutException
timeout = httpx.Timeout(0.001)
try:
    httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1', timeout=timeout)
except httpx.TimeoutException as e:
    print(f'Timeout capturado: {type(e).__name__}')

commands.cmdDescription: ExceГ§ГЈo levantada quando o timeout do pool de conexГөes Г© atingido ao aguardar uma conexГЈo disponГӯvel.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx
import asyncio

# Exemplo 1: PoolTimeout com muitas conexГөes paralelas
async def fetch(client):
    try:
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1')
        return r.status_code
    except httpx.PoolTimeout as e:
        return f'PoolTimeout: {e}'

async def main():
    limits = httpx.Limits(max_connections=2, max_keepalive_connections=0)
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=httpx.Timeout(pool=0.001), limits=limits) as client:
        tasks = [fetch(client) for _ in range(10)]
        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
        for r in results:
            print(r)

asyncio.run(main())

commands.cmdDescription: Sistema de hooks que permitem executar funГ§Гөes antes ou depois de cada requisiГ§ГЈo/resposta no Client.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Hook de log em requisiГ§Гөes
log_requests = []
log_responses = []

def log_request(request):
    log_requests.append(f'{request.method} {request.url}')

def log_response(response):
    log_responses.append(f'{response.status_code}')

event_hooks = {
    'request': [log_request],
    'response': [log_response]
}

with httpx.Client(event_hooks=event_hooks) as client:
    client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    client.post('https://httpbin.org/post', json={'key': 'val'})

print('Requests:', log_requests)
print('Responses:', log_responses)

# Exemplo 2: Hook para adicionar header
def add_header(request):
    request.headers['X-Request-ID'] = '12345'

with httpx.Client(event_hooks={'request': [add_header]}) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print('Header adicionado:', r.json()['headers']['X-Request-ID'])

# Exemplo 3: Hook assГӯncrono com AsyncClient
async def async_log_request(request):
    print(f'Async request: {request.method} {request.url}')

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(
        event_hooks={'request': [async_log_request]}
    ) as client:
        await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')

import asyncio
asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Requests: ['GET https://httpbin.org/get', 'POST https://httpbin.org/post']
Responses: ['200', '200']
Header adicionado: 12345
Async request: GET https://httpbin.org/get

    request=httpx.Request('GET', 'https://example.com')
)
print('Status:', response.status_code)
print('Body:', response.text)
print('JSON:', response.json())

# Exemplo 2: Response com conteГәdo
response = httpx.Response(
    status_code=201,
    content=b'created',
    request=httpx.Request('POST', 'https://example.com')
)
print('Content:', response.content)
print('Is success:', response.is_success)

# Exemplo 3: Response de erro
response = httpx.Response(
    status_code=404,
    text='Not Found',
    request=httpx.Request('GET', 'https://example.com/missing')
)
print('Is error:', response.is_error)
print('Is client error:', response.is_client_error)
commands.cmdOutput:

Status: 200
Body: {"message": "hello"}
JSON: {'message': 'hello'}
Content: b'created'
Is success: True
Is error: True
Is client error: True

commands.cmdDescription: Classe para representar headers HTTP com busca case-insensitive e suporte a mГәltiplos valores por header.

import httpx

commands.cmdDescription: FunГ§ГЈo utilitГЎria para criar um contexto SSL customizado com configuraГ§Гөes especГӯficas de verificaГ§ГЈo e certificados.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx
import ssl

# Exemplo 1: Contexto padrГЈo

commands.cmdDescription: Subclasse especГӯfica de TimeoutException para timeouts do pool de conexГөes. Pode ser importada para captura seletiva.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx
from httpx import PoolTimeout

# Exemplo 1: Capturar PoolTimeout especificamente
limits = httpx.Limits(max_connections=1)
try:
    with httpx.Client(timeout=httpx.Timeout(pool=0.001), limits=limits) as client:
        import threading
        def block():
            client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1')
        t = threading.Thread(target=block)
        t.start()
        import time
        time.sleep(0.01)
        client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
except PoolTimeout as e:
    print(f'PoolTimeout capturado: {type(e).__name__}')
except httpx.TimeoutException as e:
    print(f'Outro timeout: {type(e).__name__}')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

PoolTimeout capturado: PoolTimeout

commands.cmdDescription: Atributo de Client e AsyncClient que indica se o cliente jГЎ foi fechado e nГЈo pode mais ser usado.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Verificar estado do Client
client = httpx.Client()
print('Antes de fechar:', client.is_closed)
client.close()
print('Depois de fechar:', client.is_closed)

# Exemplo 2: Dentro de context manager
with httpx.Client() as client:
    print('Dentro do context:', client.is_closed)
print('Fora do context:', client.is_closed)

# Exemplo 3: AsyncClient
import asyncio
async def main():
    client = httpx.AsyncClient()
    print('Async antes:', client.is_closed)
    await client.aclose()
    print('Async depois:', client.is_closed)
asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:

Antes de fechar: False
Depois de fechar: True
Dentro do context: False
Fora do context: True
Async antes: False
Async depois: True

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro para enviar cookies em uma requisiГ§ГЈo individual. Aceita dict ou objeto httpx.Cookies.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Dict de cookies
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/cookies', cookies={'session': 'abc', 'user': 'joao'})

# Cookies com Client (persistentes)

    r1 = client.get('https://httpbin.org/cookies')
    print('Client cookies:', r1.json()['cookies'])

    r2 = client.get('https://httpbin.org/cookies')
    print('Atualizado:', r2.json()['cookies'])

# Sobrescrever cookies do Client por requisiГ§ГЈo
with httpx.Client(cookies={'theme': 'dark'}) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/cookies', cookies={'theme': 'light'})
    print('Override:', r.json()['cookies'])

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro para configurar o tempo limite de requisiГ§ГЈo. Aceita float (segundos), None (sem limite) ou instГўncia de httpx.Timeout.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Float simples (aplica a tudo)
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/get', timeout=5.0)
print('Float:', r.status_code)

# None = sem limite (cuidado)
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/get', timeout=None)
print('None:', r.status_code)

# Timeout granular
r = httpx.get(
    'https://httpbin.org/get',
    timeout=httpx.Timeout(connect=5.0, read=10.0, write=5.0, pool=5.0)
)
print('Granular:', r.status_code)

# Timeout no Client (global)
with httpx.Client(timeout=30.0) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1')
    print('Client global:', r.status_code)

# Timeout por requisiГ§ГЈo sobrescreve Client
with httpx.Client(timeout=30.0) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get', timeout=5.0)
    print('Override:', r.status_code)

# Timeout com read=None (espera indefinida pelo corpo)
r = httpx.get(
    'https://httpbin.org/get',
    timeout=httpx.Timeout(5.0, read=None)
)
print('Read sem limite:', r.status_code)

None: 200
Granular: 200
Client global: 200
Override: 200
Read sem limite: 200

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro booleano para habilitar ou desabilitar o seguidor automГЎtico de redirecionamentos HTTP (padrГЈo False no nГӯvel de mГіdulo, True no Client).
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Seguir redirecionamento
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/1', follow_redirects=True)
print('Seguiu:', r.status_code, r.url)

# Nao seguir redirecionamento
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/1', follow_redirects=False)
print('Nao seguiu:', r.status_code)
print('Location:', r.headers.get('location'))

# Client com follow_redirects padrГЈo
with httpx.Client(follow_redirects=True) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/2')
    print('Client redirect:', r.status_code, f'steps={len(r.history)}')

# Limitar redirecionamentos
try:
    httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/5', follow_redirects=True, max_redirects=2)
except httpx.TooManyRedirects as e:
    print(f'Limite: {e}')

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro para configurar a verificaГ§ГЈo de certificados SSL/TLS. Aceita bool, string (caminho do CA bundle) ou contexto SSL.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx
import ssl

# True (padrГЈo) - verifica certificado
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/get', verify=True)
print('Verify true:', r.status_code)

# False - desativa verificaГ§ГЈo (inseguro)
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')
r = httpx.get('https://self-signed.badssl.com/', verify=False)
print('Verify false:', r.status_code)

# Caminho para CA bundle customizado
try:
    r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/get', verify='/path/to/ca-bundle.crt')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'CA bundle: {type(e).__name__}')

# Contexto SSL customizado
ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
r = httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/get', verify=ctx)
print('SSL context:', r.status_code)

# No Client
with httpx.Client(verify=False) as client:
    r = client.get('https://self-signed.badssl.com/')
    print('Client no verify:', r.status_code)

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro para upload de arquivos via multipart/form-data. Aceita dict, lista de tuplas ou objeto UploadFile.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Arquivo simples (dict)
files = {'file': ('relatorio.txt', b'conteudo do relatorio', 'text/plain')}
r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', files=files)
print('Arquivo:', r.json()['files'])

# Arquivo real do disco
files = {'file': ('dados.txt', open('/tmp/dados.txt', 'rb'), 'text/plain')}
try:
    r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', files=files)
except FileNotFoundError:
    # Criar arquivo temporГЎrio para demonstraГ§ГЈo
    with open('/tmp/dados.txt', 'w') as f:
        f.write('dados temporarios')
    files = {'file': ('dados.txt', open('/tmp/dados.txt', 'rb'), 'text/plain')}
    r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', files=files)
    print('Disco:', r.json()['files'])

# MГәltiplos arquivos
files = [
    ('files', ('a.txt', b'conteudo a', 'text/plain')),
    ('files', ('b.txt', b'conteudo b', 'text/plain'))
]
r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', files=files)
print('Multi files:', r.json()['files'])

# Arquivo + campos de formulГЎrio
files = {'arquivo': ('img.png', b'PNGDATA', 'image/png')}
data = {'titulo': 'Foto', 'descricao': 'Upload teste'}
r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', data=data, files=files)
print('Form:', r.json()['form'])
print('File:', 'img.png' in str(r.json()['files']))

# UploadFile
upload = httpx.UploadFile(filename='doc.pdf', content=b'PDF_CONTENT')
files = {'document': upload}
r = httpx.post('https://httpbin.org/post', files=files)
print('UploadFile:', r.json()['files'])

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro do construtor Client para definir uma URL base. Todas as requisiГ§Гөes usam essa base para resolver URLs relativas.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# URL relativa simples
with httpx.Client(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
    r = client.get('/get')
    print('Relativa:', r.url)

# URL absoluta ignora base
with httpx.Client(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
    r = client.get('https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1')
    print('Absoluta:', r.url)

# Com path no base
with httpx.Client(base_url='https://httpbin.org/v1') as client:
    r = client.get('/get')
    print('Com path:', r.url)

# Com URL object
base = httpx.URL('https://httpbin.org')
with httpx.Client(base_url=base) as client:
    r = client.get('/status/200')
    print('URL object:', r.url)

# MГәltiplas requisiГ§Гөes com mesma base
with httpx.Client(base_url='https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com') as client:
    r1 = client.get('/posts/1')
    r2 = client.get('/users/1')
    r3 = client.get('/comments?postId=1')
    print('Posts:', r1.url)
    print('Users:', r2.url)
    print('Comments:', r3.url)

Relativa: https://httpbin.org/get
Absoluta: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1
Com path: https://httpbin.org/v1/get
URL object: https://httpbin.org/status/200
Posts: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro do Client para configurar o nГәmero mГЎximo de redirecionamentos que serГЈo seguidos automaticamente.
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: Limite baixo
try:
    with httpx.Client(follow_redirects=True, max_redirects=2) as client:
        r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/5')
except httpx.TooManyRedirects as e:
    print(f'Limite 2: {e}')

# Exemplo 2: Limite suficiente
with httpx.Client(follow_redirects=True, max_redirects=10) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/5')
    print(f'Limite 10: {r.status_code}, steps={len(r.history)}')

# Exemplo 3: Zero redirecionamentos
with httpx.Client(follow_redirects=True, max_redirects=0) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/1')
    print(f'Zero: {r.status_code}')

# Exemplo 4: Em funГ§ГЈo de mГіdulo
type: httpx.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/1', follow_redirects=True, max_redirects=0)
print(f'Module zero: {r.status_code}')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Limite 2: Too many redirects.
Limite 10: 200, steps=5
Zero: 302
Module zero: 302

commands.cmdDescription: ParГўmetro do Client para habilitar suporte a HTTP/2. Requer a dependГӘncia h2 instalada (pip install httpx[http2]).
commands.cmdCode:
import httpx

# Exemplo 1: HTTP/2 habilitado
with httpx.Client(http2=True) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(f'HTTP/2: {r.http_version}')

# Exemplo 2: HTTP/1.1 (padrГЈo)
with httpx.Client(http2=False) as client:
    r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
    print(f'HTTP/1.1: {r.http_version}')

# Exemplo 3: MГәltiplas requisiГ§Гөes HTTP/2
with httpx.Client(http2=True) as client:
    for _ in range(3):
        r = client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(f'VersГЈo: {r.http_version}')

# Exemplo 4: AsyncClient com HTTP/2
import asyncio
async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(http2=True) as client:
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(f'Async HTTP/2: {r.http_version}')
asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:

HTTP/2: HTTP/2
HTTP/1.1: HTTP/1.1
VersГЈo: HTTP/2
VersГЈo: HTTP/2
VersГЈo: HTTP/2
Async HTTP/2: HTTP/2

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo assГӯncrono da Response para seguir manualmente um redirecionamento, retornando a prГіxima Response na cadeia.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=False) as client:
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/redirect/2')
        print(f'Step 0: {r.status_code}')
        
        r = await r.anext()
        print(f'Step 1: {r.status_code}')
        
        r = await r.anext()
        print(f'Step 2: {r.status_code}')
        
        # Tentar anext sem redirect
        try:
            await r.anext()
        except httpx.NotRedirectResponse as e:
            print(f'Sem redirect: {e}')

asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Step 0: 302
Step 1: 302
Step 2: 200
Sem redirect: Response is not a redirect response.

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo assГӯncrono para ler e carregar o corpo completo da resposta em memГіria dentro de um stream assГӯncrono.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        async with client.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/get') as response:
            # aread carrega todo o conteГәdo
            content = await response.aread()
            print(f'Type: {type(content).__name__}')
            print(f'Size: {len(content)} bytes')
            print(f'Preview: {content[:50]}')
            
            # Depois de aread, iteradores ficam vazios
            chunks = []
            async for chunk in response.aiter_bytes():
                chunks.append(chunk)
            print(f'Chunks apos aread: {len(chunks)}')

asyncio.run(main())

Size: 329 bytes
Preview: b'{\n  "args": {}, \n  "headers": {\n    "Accept"'
Chunks apos aread: 0

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo da Response em streaming para fechar a resposta e liberar a conexГЈo de volta ao pool manualmente.

import httpx

import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        stream = await client.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/get')
        response = stream.__enter__()
        content = await response.aread()
        print(f'Lido: {len(content)} bytes')

asyncio.run(main())

commands.cmdDescription: Atributo da Response que contГ©m o objeto Request original que gerou essa resposta. Permite inspecionar a requisiГ§ГЈo que foi enviada.

import httpx

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo assГӯncrono do AsyncClient que cria um contexto de streaming para ler a resposta em partes sem carregar tudo na memГіria.
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        # Exemplo 1: Streaming GET
        async with client.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/3') as response:
            async for line in response.aiter_lines():
                print(line)

        # Exemplo 2: Streaming POST
        async with client.stream('POST', 'https://httpbin.org/stream/2', json={'key': 'val'}) as response:
            async for chunk in response.aiter_bytes():
                print(f'Chunk: {len(chunk)} bytes')

        # Exemplo 3: Baixar arquivo grande
        async with client.stream('GET', 'https://httpbin.org/image/png') as response:
            total = 0
            async for chunk in response.aiter_bytes():
                total += len(chunk)
            print(f'Total async: {total} bytes')

asyncio.run(main())

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo assГӯncrono do AsyncClient para enviar um objeto Request prГ©-construГӯdo. Equivalente assГӯncrono do Client.send().
commands.cmdCode:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url='https://httpbin.org') as client:
        # Enviar request construГӯdo
        request = client.build_request('GET', '/get', params={'q': 'busca'})
        response = await client.send(request)
        print(f'URL: {response.url}')
        print(f'Status: {response.status_code}')

        # Modificar antes de enviar
        request = client.build_request('POST', '/post', json={'data': 'test'})
        request.headers['X-Extra'] = 'header'
        response = await client.send(request)
        print(f'Extra header: {response.json()["headers"]["X-Extra"]}')

        # Com timeout override
        request = client.build_request('GET', '/delay/1')
        response = await client.send(request, timeout=10.0)
        print(f'Delay status: {response.status_code}')

asyncio.run(main())
commands.cmdOutput:

URL: https://httpbin.org/get?q=busca
Status: 200
Extra header: header
Delay status: 200

import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        # GET simples
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get')
        print(f'Status: {r.status_code}')

        # GET com parГўmetros
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get', params={'page': 1})
        print(f'URL: {r.url}')

        # GET com headers
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/get', headers={'Accept': 'application/json'})
        print(f'Type: {r.headers["content-type"]}')

        # GET com timeout
        r = await client.get('https://httpbin.org/delay/1', timeout=5.0)
        print(f'Delay: {r.status_code}')

asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio
import httpx

async def main():

        # POST JSON

        print(f'JSON: {r.json()["json"]}')

        print(f'Form: {r.json()["form"]}')

        # POST com arquivo

            files={'file': ('test.txt', b'hello async', 'text/plain')}

        # POST content raw
        r = await client.post(
            'https://httpbin.org/post',
            content=b'raw async data',
            headers={'Content-Type': 'application/octet-stream'}
        )
        print(f'Raw: {r.json()["data"]}')

asyncio.run(main())

name: mechanize
description: mechanize Г© uma biblioteca Python para navegaГ§ГЈo web programГЎtica com estado (stateful). Simula um navegador web completo com suporte a formulГЎrios HTML, links, cookies, autenticaГ§ГЈo HTTP, redirecionamentos, histГіrico de navegaГ§ГЈo e robots.txt. Ideal para automaГ§ГЈo de tarefas web como login em sites, preenchimento e envio de formulГЎrios, extraГ§ГЈo de dados e scraping de pГЎginas que requerem interaГ§ГЈo. Гү o equivalente Python da biblioteca Perl WWW::Mechanize.

commands.cmdDescription: Cria uma instГўncia do browser mecГўnico. Гү o ponto de entrada principal da biblioteca. O objeto resultante simula um navegador web completo com suporte a formulГЎrios, links, cookies e histГіrico de navegaГ§ГЈo.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize

# Exemplo 1: Criacao basica do browser
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 2: Configuracao completa recomendada
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)      # ignorar robots.txt
br.set_handle_refresh(False)     # nao seguir Refresh
br.set_handle_equiv(True)        # tratar HTTP-EQUIV
br.set_handle_redirect(True)     # seguir redirects
br.set_handle_referer(True)      # enviar Referer
br.addheaders = [('User-agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36')]
print('Browser criado com sucesso!')

# Exemplo 3: Usando from mechanize import Browser
from mechanize import Browser
br2 = Browser()
print(type(br2))
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Browser criado com sucesso!

<class 'mechanize._mechanize.Browser'>

commands.cmdDescription: Abre uma URL e carrega a pГЎgina. Retorna um objeto de resposta. Aceita URL como string ou um objeto mechanize.Request. Гү o mГ©todo principal para navegar para uma pГЎgina.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Abrir URL simples
resposta = br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print(resposta.geturl())
print(resposta.code)

# Exemplo 2: Abrir com timeout
resposta = br.open('http://www.example.com/', timeout=10)
print(resposta.code)

# Exemplo 3: Abrir com POST data
import urllib
dados = urllib.parse.urlencode({'campo': 'valor'}).encode()
resposta = br.open('http://www.example.com/form', dados)
print(resposta.read().decode())

# Exemplo 4: Abrir com objeto mechanize.Request
req = mechanize.Request('http://www.example.com/', headers={'Accept': 'text/html'})
resposta = br.open(req)
print(resposta.code)

commands.cmdDescription: Abre uma URL sem visitar ou alterar o estado do browser (histГіrico, formulГЎrios, links). Гҡtil para buscar recursos secundГЎrios como imagens sem afetar a navegaГ§ГЈo principal.

import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Abrir sem visitar (nao altera historico)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

commands.cmdDescription: Substitui a resposta atual por uma personalizada. Гҡtil para processar HTML mal-formado ou manipular os dados antes da anГЎlise.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Modificar Content-Type da resposta
resposta = br.response()  # copia da resposta atual
cabecalhos = resposta.info()
cabecalhos['Content-type'] = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'
br.set_response(resposta)
print('Content-type atualizado!')

# Exemplo 2: Corrigir HTML mal-formado
resposta = br.response()
dados_originais = resposta.get_data()
dados_corrigidos = dados_originais.replace(b'<!---', b'<!--')
resposta.set_data(dados_corrigidos)
br.set_response(resposta)
print('HTML corrigido e re-definido no browser')

Content-type atualizado!

HTML corrigido e re-definido no browser

commands.cmdDescription: Encontra um link na pГЎgina atual com base em critГ©rios de filtragem. Retorna um objeto mechanize.Link. LanГ§a LinkNotFoundError se nГЈo encontrar.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize, re
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Buscar por texto exato
link = br.find_link(text='More information')
print('Encontrado:', link.url)

# Exemplo 2: Buscar por texto com regex
link = br.find_link(text_regex=re.compile(r'more', re.I))
print('Link regex:', link.url)

# Exemplo 3: Buscar por URL regex
link = br.find_link(url_regex=re.compile(r'iana\.org'))
print('Link por URL:', link.url)

# Exemplo 4: Buscar por nome (atributo name da tag)
# link = br.find_link(name='meu-link')

# Exemplo 5: Buscar por predicate
link = br.find_link(predicate=lambda l: len(l.attrs) > 0)
print('Link com attrs:', link.url)

# Exemplo 6: Pegar N-esimo link
link = br.find_link(nr=0)  # primeiro link
print('Primeiro link:', link.url)

# Exemplo 7: Tratar LinkNotFoundError
try:
    link = br.find_link(text='link-que-nao-existe')
except mechanize.LinkNotFoundError:
    print('Link nao encontrado!')

commands.cmdDescription: Seleciona um formulГЎrio para preenchimento por nome, nГәmero ou atributos HTML. O formulГЎrio selecionado torna-se br.form e fica pronto para ediГ§ГЈo e submit.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize, re
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/login')

# Exemplo 1: Selecionar por nome
br.select_form(name='loginForm')
print('Form selecionado por nome')

# Exemplo 2: Selecionar pelo numero (0 = primeiro)
br.select_form(nr=0)
print('Primeiro form selecionado')

# Exemplo 3: Selecionar por action exata
br.select_form(action='http://www.example.com/auth/login')
print('Form por action')

# Exemplo 4: Selecionar por atributo class com lambda
br.select_form(class_=lambda x: 'login' in (x or ''))
print('Form por class')

# Exemplo 5: Selecionar por atributo HTML personalizado com regex
br.select_form(data_form_type=re.compile(r'login|auth'))
print('Form por data attribute')

# Exemplo 6: Selecionar por predicate
br.select_form(predicate=lambda f: f.action and 'login' in f.action)
print('Form por predicate')

br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/form')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form

# Preencher varios campos
form['nome'] = 'Joao'
form['email'] = 'joao@email.com'
form['telefone'] = '11999999999'
print('Antes - nome:', form['nome'])
print('Antes - email:', form['email'])

# Exemplo 1: Limpar tudo
form.clear_all()
print('Apos clear_all - nome:', form['nome'])
print('Apos clear_all - email:', form['email'])

# Exemplo 2: Limpar tudo incluindo readonly
form.set_all_readonly(False)
form.clear_all()
print('Todos os campos limpos!')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Antes - nome: Joao
Antes - email: joao@email.com
Apos clear_all - nome: 
Apos clear_all - email: 

Todos os campos limpos!

commands.cmdDescription: Define o atributo readonly de todos os controles do formulГЎrio como True ou False. Permite editar campos que normalmente sГЈo somente leitura, como campos hidden e disabled.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/form')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form

# Exemplo 1: Liberar todos os campos para escrita
form.set_all_readonly(False)
print('Todos liberados para escrita!')

# Exemplo 2: Modificar campo hidden apos liberar
form.set_all_readonly(False)
form['_token_csrf'] = 'novo_token_aqui'
print('Token CSRF modificado')

# Exemplo 3: Bloqueiar tudo novamente
form.set_all_readonly(True)
print('Todos em readonly')

# Exemplo 4: Liberar readonly individual
control = form.find_control('campo_readonly')
control.readonly = False
control.value = 'novo_valor'
print('Campo individual liberado e definido')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Todos liberados para escrita!

Token CSRF modificado

Todos em readonly

Campo individual liberado e definido

commands.cmdDescription: Adiciona um arquivo para upload em um controle de tipo FILE do formulГЎrio. Define o objeto arquivo, tipo MIME e nome do arquivo.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/upload')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form

# Exemplo 1: Upload de arquivo simples
with open('documento.pdf', 'rb') as f:
    form.add_file(f, 'application/pdf', 'documento.pdf')
resposta = br.submit()
print('Upload realizado!')

# Exemplo 2: Upload de imagem
with open('foto.jpg', 'rb') as f:
    form.add_file(
        f,
        content_type='image/jpeg',
        filename='foto.jpg',
        name='arquivo'  # nome do campo FILE
    )
resposta = br.submit()
print('Imagem enviada:', resposta.code)

# Exemplo 3: Upload por id do campo
with open('relatorio.xlsx', 'rb') as f:
    form.add_file(
        f,
        'application/vnd.ms-excel',
        'relatorio.xlsx',
        id='file-input'
    )
br.submit()
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Upload realizado!

Imagem enviada: 200

(planilha enviada)

commands.cmdDescription: Retorna um objeto mechanize.Request que representaria o resultado de clicar em um controle do formulГЎrio, sem submeter. Гҡtil para inspecionar ou modificar a requisiГ§ГЈo.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/login')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form
form['username'] = 'usuario'
form['password'] = 'senha'

# Exemplo 1: Criar Request sem submeter
request = form.click()
print(type(request))
print('URL:', request.get_full_url())
print('Data:', request.get_data())

# Exemplo 2: Clicar em botao especifico
request = form.click(name='submit-login')
print('Request URL:', request.get_full_url())

# Exemplo 3: Modificar request antes de enviar
request = form.click()
request.add_header('X-Requested-With', 'XMLHttpRequest')
resposta = br.open(request)
print('Resposta:', resposta.code)
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

<class 'mechanize._request.Request'>
URL: http://www.example.com/login
Data: b'username=usuario&password=senha'

Request URL: http://www.example.com/login

Resposta: 200

commands.cmdDescription: Retorna uma lista de tuplas (name, value) que seriam enviadas ao clicar no formulГЎrio. Гҡtil para inspecionar os dados antes do envio.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/form')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form
form['nome'] = 'Joao'
form['email'] = 'joao@email.com'

# Exemplo 1: Ver pares de dados que seriam enviados
pares = form.click_pairs()
print('Dados do form:')
for nome, valor in pares:
    print(f'  {nome}: {valor}')

# Exemplo 2: Clicar em botao especifico
pares = form.click_pairs(name='btn_enviar')
for nome, valor in pares:
    print(f'{nome}={valor}')
commands.cmdOutput:

  _submit: Enviar

email=joao@email.com

commands.cmdDescription: Retorna uma tupla com (url, dados, headers) que representa os dados de submissГЈo do formulГЎrio. Alternativa a click() para inspecionar os dados diretamente.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/busca')
br.select_form(nr=0)
form = br.form
form['q'] = 'python'

# Exemplo 1: Obter dados da requisicao
url, dados, headers = form.click_request_data()
print('URL:', url)
print('Dados:', dados)
print('Headers:', dict(headers))

# Exemplo 2: Verificar dados antes de enviar
url, dados, headers = form.click_request_data()
if dados:
    print('POST form para:', url)
else:
    print('GET form para:', url + '?' + dados.decode())
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

URL: http://www.example.com/busca
Dados: b'q=python'
Headers: {'Content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}

POST form para: http://www.example.com/busca

commands.cmdDescription: Controla se o browser deve respeitar o arquivo robots.txt. Por padrГЈo Г© True. Deve ser definido antes de qualquer open().
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Ignorar robots.txt (mais comum em scraping)
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Aberto ignorando robots.txt')

# Exemplo 2: Respeitar robots.txt (comportamento padrao)
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.set_handle_robots(True)
try:
    br2.open('http://www.example.com/')
    print('Aberto respeitando robots.txt')
except mechanize.BrowserStateError as e:
    print('Bloqueado por robots.txt:', e)
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Aberto ignorando robots.txt

Aberto respeitando robots.txt

commands.cmdDescription: Controla se o browser deve seguir cabeГ§alhos HTTP Refresh e META Refresh. Desabilitar pode evitar travamentos em pГЎginas com Refresh infinito.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Desabilitar refresh (recomendado para evitar hangs)
br.set_handle_refresh(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Refresh desabilitado')

# Exemplo 2: Habilitar com max_time para evitar loop infinito
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.set_handle_refresh(
    mechanize._http.HTTPRefreshProcessor(),
    max_time=1
)
br2.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Refresh habilitado com max_time=1')

# Exemplo 3: Habilitar completamente
br3 = mechanize.Browser()
br3.set_handle_refresh(True)
br3.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Refresh habilitado')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Refresh desabilitado

Refresh habilitado com max_time=1

Refresh habilitado

commands.cmdDescription: Controla se o browser deve seguir redirecionamentos HTTP (301, 302, etc.). Por padrГЈo Г© True.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Seguir redirecionamentos (padrao)
br.set_handle_redirect(True)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('URL final apos redirects:', br.geturl())

# Exemplo 2: Desabilitar redirects
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.set_handle_redirect(False)
try:
    br2.open('http://www.example.com/')
    print('Sem redirect:', br2.geturl())
except mechanize.HTTPError as e:
    print('Redirect bloqueado, codigo:', e.code)
commands.cmdOutput:

URL final apos redirects: http://www.example.com/

Redirect bloqueado, codigo: 301

commands.cmdDescription: Habilita suporte a compressГЈo gzip nas respostas. Envia o cabeГ§alho Accept-Encoding: gzip e descomprime automaticamente as respostas.
commands.cmdCode:

commands.cmdDescription: Atributo de lista para definir cabeГ§alhos HTTP padrГЈo enviados em todas as requisiГ§Гөes. Cada item Г© uma tupla (nome, valor). Permite simular um User-Agent de navegador real.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Definir User-Agent de browser real
br.addheaders = [('User-agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36')]
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('User-Agent definido')

# Exemplo 2: Multiplos headers
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.addheaders = [
    ('User-agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 Firefox/120.0'),
    ('Accept', 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml'),
    ('Accept-Language', 'pt-BR,pt;q=0.9'),
    ('Accept-Encoding', 'gzip, deflate, br')
]
br2.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Headers multiplos definidos')

# Exemplo 3: Adicionar header sem remover os existentes
br3 = mechanize.Browser()
br3.addheaders.append(('X-Custom-Header', 'valor-custom'))
print('Headers atuais:', br3.addheaders)
commands.cmdOutput:

User-Agent definido

Headers multiplos definidos

Headers atuais: [('Host', None), ('X-Custom-Header', 'valor-custom')]

commands.cmdDescription: MГ©todo conveniente para definir ou remover um header em br.addheaders. Define um Гәnico header por chamada.

# Exemplo 3: Definir multiplos headers

commands.cmdDescription: Adiciona credenciais de autenticaГ§ГЈo HTTP Basic/Digest para um site protegido por senha.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Autenticacao HTTP Basic
br.add_password('http://www.example.com/protegido/', 'usuario', 'senha')
resposta = br.open('http://www.example.com/protegido/')
print('Autenticado com sucesso:', resposta.code)

# Exemplo 2: Multiplas credenciais para diferentes URLs
br.add_password('http://site1.com/admin/', 'admin1', 'pass1')
br.add_password('http://site2.com/api/', 'api_user', 'api_key')
print('Credenciais configuradas para 2 sites')

# Exemplo 3: Tratando erro de autenticacao
try:
    br.add_password('http://www.example.com/private/', 'user', 'wrong')
    br.open('http://www.example.com/private/')
except mechanize.HTTPError as e:
    if e.code == 401:
        print('Credenciais invalidas (401)')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Autenticado com sucesso: 200

Credenciais configuradas para 2 sites

Credenciais invalidas (401)

commands.cmdDescription: Adiciona credenciais de autenticaГ§ГЈo para uso com proxy HTTP que requer autenticaГ§ГЈo.

commands.cmdDescription: Configura os proxies a serem usados pelo browser. Aceita um dicionГЎrio com os protocolos como chave e URLs de proxy como valor.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Configurar proxy HTTP
br.set_proxies({'http': 'http://proxy.exemplo.com:3128'})
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Usando proxy HTTP')

# Exemplo 2: Proxy com autenticacao na URL
br.set_proxies({'http': 'http://usuario:senha@proxy.exemplo.com:3128'})
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Usando proxy com autenticacao')

# Exemplo 3: Proxy para HTTP e FTP
br.set_proxies({
    'http': 'http://proxy.exemplo.com:3128',
    'ftp': 'http://ftp-proxy.exemplo.com:3128'
})
print('Proxies configurados')

# Exemplo 4: Desabilitar proxies
br.set_proxies({})
print('Sem proxy')

# Exemplo 5: Proxy com bypass de dominio
def bypass_proxy(hostname):
    return hostname == 'localhost'
br.set_proxies(
    {'http': 'http://proxy:3128'},
    proxy_bypass=bypass_proxy
)
print('Proxy com bypass')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

Usando proxy HTTP

Usando proxy com autenticacao

Proxies configurados

Sem proxy

Proxy com bypass

commands.cmdDescription: Define o CookieJar usado pelo browser para gerenciar cookies. Por padrГЈo o browser jГЎ gerencia cookies automaticamente.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
import http.cookiejar

# Exemplo 1: Usar CookieJar padrao (automatico)
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_cookiejar(mechanize.CookieJar())
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('CookieJar padrao definido')

# Exemplo 2: Usar LWPCookieJar (persiste em arquivo)
cj = http.cookiejar.LWPCookieJar('cookies.txt')
try:
    cj.load()  # carregar cookies salvos
except FileNotFoundError:
    pass  # primeiro uso, arquivo nao existe
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.set_cookiejar(cj)
br2.open('http://www.example.com/')
cj.save()  # salvar cookies para proximo uso
print('Cookies salvos em cookies.txt')

# Exemplo 3: Desabilitar cookies completamente
br3 = mechanize.Browser()
br3.set_cookiejar()  # sem cookiejar = sem cookies
br3.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Cookies desabilitados')
commands.cmdOutput:
$ python script.py

CookieJar padrao definido

Cookies salvos em cookies.txt

Cookies desabilitados

commands.cmdDescription: Propriedade que retorna o CookieJar atual do browser. Permite acessar e inspecionar os cookies armazenados.

commands.cmdDescription: Define um cookie de forma simples especificando nome, valor, domГӯnio e path. O cookie nГЈo expira. Alternativa mais fГЎcil a set_cookie().
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Cookie simples
br.set_simple_cookie('minha_chave', 'meu_valor', '.example.com')
print('Cookie simples criado')

# Exemplo 2: Cookie com path especifico
br.set_simple_cookie(
    'session',
    'abc123xyz',
    '.example.com',
    path='/app'
)

# Exemplo 3: Verificar se cookie foi criado

        print(f'Cookie encontrado: {cookie.name}={cookie.value}')

commands.cmdDescription: Configura o contexto SSL/TLS para conexГөes HTTPS. Permite passar um CA bundle personalizado ou desabilitar a verificaГ§ГЈo de certificados SSL.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize, ssl
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Desabilitar verificacao SSL (nao recomendado em producao)
contexto = ssl._create_unverified_context(cert_reqs=ssl.CERT_NONE)
br.set_ca_data(context=contexto)
br.open('https://www.example.com/')
print('SSL nao verificado')

# Exemplo 2: CA bundle de arquivo
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br2.set_ca_data(cafile='/caminho/para/ca-bundle.crt')
br2.open('https://www.example.com/')
print('CA bundle customizado')

# Exemplo 3: CA bundle de diretorio
br3 = mechanize.Browser()
br3.set_ca_data(capath='/etc/ssl/certs/')
br3.open('https://www.example.com/')
print('CA do diretorio')
commands.cmdOutput:

SSL nao verificado

CA bundle customizado

commands.cmdDescription: Define um HTTPClientCertMgr para autenticaГ§ГЈo mГәtua TLS (client certificates). Permite que o browser apresente um certificado cliente para servidores que requerem isso.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()

# Exemplo 1: Definir gerenciador de certificado cliente
cert_mgr = mechanize.HTTPClientCertMgr()
cert_mgr.load_cert('cert.pem', 'key.pem', 'https://api.exemplo.com/')
br.set_client_cert_manager(cert_mgr)
br.open('https://api.exemplo.com/dados')
print('Autenticado com certificado cliente')

# Exemplo 2: Remover gerenciador de certificado
br.set_client_cert_manager(None)
print('Certificado cliente removido')

commands.cmdDescription: Habilita o log de informaГ§Гөes sobre redirecionamentos HTTP. Os logs sГЈo emitidos pelo mГіdulo logging do Python.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize, sys, logging
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Habilitar debug de redirects
br.set_debug_redirects(True)
logger = logging.getLogger('mechanize.http_redirects')
logger.addHandler(logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout))
logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 2: Desabilitar debug de redirects
br.set_debug_redirects(False)
print('Debug de redirects desabilitado')

commands.cmdDescription: Habilita o log dos corpos das respostas HTTP (HTML). Гҡtil para depurar quando a pГЎgina recebida nГЈo Г© a esperada.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize, sys, logging
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

commands.cmdDescription: Baixa uma URL para um arquivo local. Equivalente a urllib.request.urlretrieve(). Retorna (filename, headers).
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Baixar arquivo para disco
nome_arquivo, cabecalhos = br.retrieve('http://www.example.com/arquivo.pdf')
print('Arquivo salvo em:', nome_arquivo)
print('Content-Type:', cabecalhos['Content-Type'])

# Exemplo 2: Salvar com nome especifico
nome_arquivo, cabecalhos = br.retrieve(
    'http://www.example.com/imagem.png',
    filename='minha_imagem.png'
)
print('Salvo como:', nome_arquivo)

# Exemplo 3: Com funcao de progresso
def progresso(blocos_lidos, tamanho_bloco, tamanho_total):
    if tamanho_total > 0:
        pct = blocos_lidos * tamanho_bloco * 100 / tamanho_total
        print(f'Download: {pct:.1f}%')

nome, hdrs = br.retrieve(
    'http://www.example.com/grande.zip',
    reporthook=progresso
)
print('Download completo:', nome)

commands.cmdDescription: Retorna o 'formulГЎrio global': conjunto de controles de formulГЎrio que nГЈo estГЈo dentro de nenhuma tag <form> no HTML. Geralmente nГЈo usado em sites comuns.

br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Obter formulario global (controles sem form)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria um objeto de requisiГ§ГЈo HTTP customizado. Permite especificar URL, dados POST, headers personalizados e mГ©todo HTTP explicitamente.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Request GET simples
req = mechanize.Request('http://www.example.com/')
resposta = br.open(req)
print('GET:', resposta.code)

# Exemplo 2: Request POST com dados

    'http://www.example.com/api',
    data={'chave': 'valor'}
)

    'http://www.example.com/api/dados',

    }
)

# Exemplo 4: Request com metodo explicito
req = mechanize.Request(
    'http://www.example.com/recurso/1',

)

commands.cmdDescription: Cria um CookieJar para gerenciar cookies do browser. Pode ser compartilhado entre mГәltiplos browsers ou persistido em disco.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
import http.cookiejar

# Exemplo 1: CookieJar basico
cj = mechanize.CookieJar()
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_cookiejar(cj)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Cookies:', list(cj))

# Exemplo 2: Compartilhar cookies entre browsers
cj = mechanize.CookieJar()
br1 = mechanize.Browser()
br2 = mechanize.Browser()
br1.set_cookiejar(cj)
br2.set_cookiejar(cj)  # compartilhado!
br1.open('http://www.example.com/')  # login
br2.open('http://www.example.com/protegido/')  # usa cookies de br1
print('Cookies compartilhados entre browsers')

# Exemplo 3: LWPCookieJar (persistente em arquivo)
cj = http.cookiejar.LWPCookieJar(filename='sessao.txt')
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_cookiejar(cj)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
cj.save()  # salvar
print('Cookies salvos em sessao.txt')

commands.cmdDescription: Retorna os dados da resposta como bytes, posicionando o ponteiro no inГӯcio. Гү equivalente a seek(0) + read(). Гҡtil para reler dados sem chamar seek() explicitamente.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Obter dados sem se preocupar com seek
resposta = br.response()
html = resposta.get_data()
print('Dados lidos:', len(html), 'bytes')

# Exemplo 2: Reler dados multiplas vezes

    dados = resposta.get_data()  # automaticamente faz seek(0)

html_anterior = resposta_anterior.get_data()
print('HTML da pagina anterior:', len(html_anterior), 'bytes')

commands.cmdDescription: Define os dados da resposta como bytes. Permite modificar o conteГәdo da resposta antes de processГЎ-la com o browser.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Corrigir HTML mal-formado antes de processar
resposta = br.response()
dados = resposta.get_data()
dados_corrigidos = dados.replace(b'<!---', b'<!--')
resposta.set_data(dados_corrigidos)
br.set_response(resposta)

# Exemplo 2: Injetar conteudo customizado
resposta = br.response()
html_custom = b'<html><body><form name=teste><input name=campo></form></body></html>'
resposta.set_data(html_custom)
br.set_response(resposta)
print('Formulario injetado:', list(br.forms())[0].name)

commands.cmdDescription: Move o ponteiro de leitura da resposta. Como as respostas do mechanize sГЈo seekable, permite reler o conteГәdo sem fazer nova requisiГ§ГЈo.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
resposta = br.response()

# Exemplo 1: Ler e depois voltar ao inicio

print('Primeira leitura:', len(html), 'bytes')

resposta.seek(0)  # voltar ao inicio
html2 = resposta.read()
print('Segunda leitura:', len(html2), 'bytes')

# Exemplo 2: Pular bytes iniciais

parte = resposta.read(50)  # ler 50 bytes
print('Fragmento:', parte)

resposta.seek(0)
_ = resposta.read(100)

print('Posicao atual:', pos)

commands.cmdDescription: Atributo que contГ©m o cГіdigo de status HTTP da resposta (200, 301, 404, 500, etc.).
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize

br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Verificar codigo de status

commands.cmdDescription: Atributo que pode ser definido como uma funГ§ГЈo para adicionar, modificar ou remover cabeГ§alhos de todas as requisiГ§Гөes antes de enviГЎ-las.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Adicionar header customizado em todas as requisicoes
br.finalize_request_headers = lambda req, hdrs: hdrs.__setitem__(
    'X-Custom-Header', 'MeuValor'
)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Header customizado adicionado a todas as requests')

# Exemplo 2: Funcao mais complexa
def personalizar_headers(request, headers):
    headers['User-Agent'] = 'MeuBot/2.0'
    headers['Accept'] = 'text/html'
    if 'api' in request.get_full_url():
        headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer token123'
    return headers

br.finalize_request_headers = personalizar_headers
br.open('http://www.example.com/')
print('Headers personalizados por funcao')

commands.cmdDescription: Classe que representa um link na pГЎgina. Possui atributos text (texto do link), url (URL do link), tag (tipo de tag HTML), attrs (dicionГЎrio de atributos HTML) e base_url.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')

# Exemplo 1: Acessar atributos de um Link
link = br.find_link(nr=0)
print('Texto:', link.text)
print('URL:', link.url)
print('Tag:', link.tag)     # 'a', 'area', 'iframe'
print('Attrs:', link.attrs)
print('Base URL:', link.base_url)

# Exemplo 2: Filtrar links por atributo
for link in br.links():
    # links que sao imagens (area maps)
    if link.tag == 'area':
        print('Area map link:', link.url)
    # links com atributo class especifico
    attrs_dict = dict(link.attrs)
    if attrs_dict.get('class') == 'nav-link':
        print('Link de nav:', link.text, link.url)

# Exemplo 3: Usar Link com follow_link
links = list(br.links())
if links:
    br.follow_link(links[0])
    print('Seguiu para:', br.geturl())

commands.cmdDescription: ExceГ§ГЈo lanГ§ada quando o servidor retorna um cГіdigo de erro HTTP (4xx, 5xx). Herda de mechanize.URLError. Possui atributo code com o status HTTP.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)

# Exemplo 1: Capturar erro 404
try:
    br.open('http://www.example.com/pagina-nao-existe')
except mechanize.HTTPError as e:
    print(f'HTTPError: {e.code} {e.msg}')
    print('URL:', e.geturl())

# Exemplo 2: Capturar varios codigos
for url in [
    'http://httpbin.org/status/200',
    'http://httpbin.org/status/401',
    'http://httpbin.org/status/403',
    'http://httpbin.org/status/500'
]:
    try:
        br.open(url)
        print(f'{url}: OK')
    except mechanize.HTTPError as e:
        print(f'{url}: Erro {e.code}')

# Exemplo 3: Tratar 401 com autenticacao
try:
    br.open('http://www.example.com/admin/')
except mechanize.HTTPError as e:
    if e.code == 401:
        br.add_password('http://www.example.com/', 'admin', 'senha')
        br.open('http://www.example.com/admin/')
        print('Autenticado apos 401')

commands.cmdDescription: ExceГ§ГЈo lanГ§ada por select_form() quando nenhum formulГЎrio correspondente ao critГ©rio de busca Г© encontrado na pГЎgina.
commands.cmdCode:
import mechanize
br = mechanize.Browser()
br.set_handle_robots(False)
br.open('http://www.example.com/')  # pagina sem formularios

# Exemplo 1: Formulario por nome inexistente
try:
    br.select_form(name='form-inexistente')
except mechanize.FormNotFoundError as e:
    print('FormNotFoundError:', e)

# Exemplo 2: Formulario por numero alem do total
try:
    br.select_form(nr=99)
except mechanize.FormNotFoundError as e:
    print('Form nr 99 nao existe:', e)

# Exemplo 3: Prevenir com verificacao previa
forms = list(br.forms())
if forms:
    br.form = forms[0]
    print('Form selecionado:', br.form.name)
else:
    print('Pagina nao tem formularios')
